  return <div className="preview-wizard"><nav>{["Runtime", "Model", "Resources", "Safety", "Deploy"].map((item) => <button key={item} type="button">{item}</button>)}</nav><section className="preview-pane"><h3>Runtime Recipe</h3><ChipList items={["vLLM CUDA", "Qwen/Qwen2.5-Coder-7B", "Port 8020", "Profile: Large"]} /><button type="button">Preview compose file</button></section></div>;
}

function ArchiveWarsat() {
  return <div className="preview-recipe-library"><section className="preview-pane"><h3>Recipe Library</h3><RootButtons items={["Local chat model", "Coding model", "Embedding service"]} /></section><section className="preview-pane preview-document"><h3>Generated Compose Notes</h3><p>Review the generated compose plan as a document before approving deployment.</p></section></div>;
}

function WarmindSettings() {
  return <div className="preview-setting-matrix">{["Safety", "Models", "Knowledge", "Output"].map((item) => <section key={item} className="preview-console-card"><h3>{item}</h3><ChipList items={["Pending changes: 0", "Requires save", "Audit enabled"]} /></section>)}</div>;
}

function OperatorSettings() {
  return <div className="preview-settings-workbench"><nav>{["General", "Workspaces", "Safety", "Knowledge", "Output", "Appearance", "Admin"].map((item) => <button key={item} type="button">{item}</button>)}</nav><section className="preview-pane"><h3>Safety</h3><p>Settings use staged changes and explicit Save / Revert controls.</p><button type="button">Save changes</button></section></div>;
}

function ArchiveSettings() {
  return <div className="preview-preference-notebook"><section className="preview-pane"><h3>Preferences Notebook</h3><p>Settings are organized as readable sections with change history and plain-language descriptions.</p></section><section className="preview-pane"><h3>Appearance</h3><div className="preview-theme-grid">{themeOptions.slice(0, 6).map(([value, label]) => <span key={value}>{label}</span>)}</div></section></div>;
}

function WarmindPanels() {
  return <div className="preview-overlay-stack"><PanelCard title="Model Panel" /><PanelCard title="Mode Panel" /><PanelCard title="Approval Stack" /></div>;
}

function OperatorPanels() {
  return <div className="preview-panel-layout"><section className="preview-pane"><h3>Right Side Sheet</h3><p>Model selection, mode routing, and task details open as focused sheets.</p></section><section className="preview-pane"><h3>Bottom Drawer</h3><p>Logs and artifacts can expand without pushing the main chat away.</p></section></div>;
}

function ArchivePanels() {
  return <div className="preview-citation-panels"><section className="preview-pane"><h3>Citations</h3><ChipList items={["architecture.md:12", "README.md:44", "notes.pdf:3"]} /></section><section className="preview-pane"><h3>Memory Review</h3><p>Memory suggestions appear as reviewable notes, not raw system logs.</p></section></div>;
}

function ContextPanel({ screen }) {
  if (screen === "workspaces") {
    return <><h3>Workspace Context</h3><RootButtons /></>;
  }
  if (screen === "models" || screen === "warsat") {
    return <><h3>Runtime Context</h3><ChipList items={["Main model healthy", "Docker disabled", "1 launch plan"]} /></>;
  }
  return <><h3>Recent Chats</h3>{fixtures.sessions.map(([title, meta]) => <article key={title}><strong>{title}</strong><span>{meta}</span></article>)}</>;
}

function InspectorPanel({ screen, archive = false }) {
  const title = archive ? "Evidence Inspector" : "Details";
  return (
    <>
      <h3>{title}</h3>
      <p>{screenLabel(screen)} details stay visible without crowding the primary work area.</p>
      <ChipList items={archive ? ["Citations", "Memory", "Graph links"] : ["Task status", "Approvals", "Exports"]} />
    </>
  );
}

function TelemetryBlock({ title, items }) {
  return <section><h3>{title}</h3>{items.map((item) => <p key={item}>{item}</p>)}</section>;
}

function RootButtons({ items = ["Project Root", "Research PDFs", "Writing Output"] }) {
  return (
    <div className="preview-root-button-list">
      {items.map((root) => (
        <button key={root} type="button">
          <span>{root}</span>
          <small>mounted</small>
        </button>
      ))}
    </div>
  );
}

function FileRows() {
  return fixtures.files.map(([name, kind, detail, state]) => (
    <article key={name}>
      {kind === "folder" ? <Folder size={18} /> : <FileText size={18} />}
      <strong>{name}</strong>
      <span>{detail}</span>
      <small>{state}</small>
    </article>
  ));
}

function TaskStack({ status, compact = false }) {
  return fixtures.tasks
    .filter(([taskStatus]) => !status || taskStatus === status)
    .map(([taskStatus, title, progress, detail]) => (
      <article key={title} className={compact ? "is-compact" : ""}>
        <span className={`preview-state state-${taskStatus.toLowerCase()}`}>{taskStatus}</span>
        <strong>{title}</strong>
        <small>{progress}</small>
        {!compact && <p>{detail}</p>}
      </article>
    ));
}

function ModelRows() {
  return fixtures.models.map(([name, status, purpose]) => (
    <article key={name}>
      <Cpu size={20} />
      <div><strong>{name}</strong><span>{purpose}</span></div>
      <small>{status}</small>
    </article>
  ));
}

function ChipList({ items }) {
  return <div className="preview-chip-list">{items.map((item) => <span key={item}>{item}</span>)}</div>;
}

function PanelCard({ title }) {
  return <section className="preview-pane"><h3>{title}</h3><p>Previewed as its own spatial pattern instead of another identical page card.</p></section>;
}

function currentScreen() {
  const value = window.location.pathname.split("/").filter(Boolean)[1] || "home";
  return screens.some(([screen]) => screen === value) ? value : "home";
}

function AccessibilityChecklist({ variant, screen }) {
  const checks = useMemo(() => [
    "Each option changes layout structure, not only color or surface styling.",
    "Keyboard path reaches navigation, preview controller, cards, and panels.",
    "Focus rings use the active theme focus token.",
    "Interactive controls have visible labels or accessible names.",
    "Split and mobile widths avoid horizontal overflow.",
  ], []);
  return (
    <aside className="preview-a11y" data-testid="gui-preview-accessibility-checks">
      <div>
        <span className="preview-kicker">Accessibility</span>
        <strong>{variant.label} / {screenLabel(screen)}</strong>
      </div>
      {checks.map((check) => <p key={check}><CheckCircle2 size={15} />{check}</p>)}
    </aside>
  );
}

function screenLabel(screen) {
  return screens.find(([value]) => value === screen)?.[1] || "Home";
}


==================================================
FILE: .\frontend-src\src\styles\rasputin.css
==================================================

:root {
  --ras-sidebar: 252px;
  --ras-sidebar-collapsed: 70px;
  --ras-bg: #d9d3c8;
  --ras-canvas: #e4ded3;
  --ras-panel: #eee8dc;
  --ras-panel-2: #d2cabc;
  --ras-rail: #101318;
  --ras-rail-soft: #171b22;
  --ras-sidebar-bg: #101318;
  --ras-sidebar-bg-soft: #171b22;
  --ras-sidebar-text: #e9edf2;
  --ras-sidebar-muted: rgba(233, 237, 242, .64);
  --ras-sidebar-active-bg: rgba(239, 154, 82, .16);
  --ras-sidebar-active-border: #ef9a52;
  --ras-sidebar-hover-bg: rgba(239, 154, 82, .10);
  --ras-text: #181a1f;
  --ras-muted: #68707a;
  --ras-border: #d2cbc0;
  --ras-border-strong: #a9a196;
  --ras-accent: #bd4a28;
  --ras-accent-2: #ef9a52;
  --ras-blue: #315e84;
  --ras-safe: #337b5b;
  --ras-warn: #b97822;
  --ras-danger: #be3c33;
  --ras-shadow: 0 14px 30px rgba(23, 20, 17, .10);
  --ras-focus: rgba(239, 154, 82, .38);
  --ras-heading-font: "Rajdhani", ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif;
  --bs-body-bg: var(--ras-canvas);
  --bs-body-color: var(--ras-text);
  --bs-border-color: var(--ras-border);
  --bs-primary: var(--ras-accent);
  --bs-primary-rgb: 189, 74, 40;
  --bs-secondary-color: var(--ras-muted);
  --bs-tertiary-bg: var(--ras-panel-2);
  --bs-card-bg: var(--ras-panel);
  --bs-list-group-bg: var(--ras-panel);
  --bs-light-rgb: 238, 232, 220;
  --bs-body-font-family: ui-sans-serif, system-ui, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, "Segoe UI", sans-serif;
}

:root[data-theme="rasputin-dark"] {
  color-scheme: dark;
  --ras-bg: #090b0f;
  --ras-canvas: #0d1015;
  --ras-panel: #141820;
  --ras-panel-2: #1b2029;
  --ras-rail: #07090c;
  --ras-rail-soft: #11151c;
  --ras-sidebar-bg: #07090c;
  --ras-sidebar-bg-soft: #11151c;
  --ras-sidebar-text: #e9edf2;
  --ras-sidebar-muted: #9aa4b2;
  --ras-sidebar-active-bg: rgba(216, 91, 50, .18);
  --ras-sidebar-active-border: #d85b32;
  --ras-sidebar-hover-bg: rgba(216, 91, 50, .12);
  --ras-text: #e9edf2;
  --ras-muted: #9aa4b2;
  --ras-border: #2b333e;
  --ras-border-strong: #46515f;
  --ras-accent: #d85b32;
  --ras-accent-2: #ffb05c;
  --ras-blue: #7fa7c7;
  --ras-safe: #69b58e;
  --ras-warn: #d99a42;
  --ras-danger: #e05c55;
  --ras-shadow: 0 18px 44px rgba(0, 0, 0, .34);
}

:root[data-theme="contrast"] {
  color-scheme: light;
  --ras-bg: #ffffff;
  --ras-canvas: #ffffff;
  --ras-panel: #ffffff;
  --ras-panel-2: #f2f2f2;
  --ras-rail: #000000;
  --ras-rail-soft: #111111;
  --ras-sidebar-bg: #000000;
  --ras-sidebar-bg-soft: #111111;
  --ras-sidebar-text: #ffffff;
  --ras-sidebar-muted: #f2f2f2;
  --ras-sidebar-active-bg: #005fcc;
  --ras-sidebar-active-border: #ffffff;
  --ras-sidebar-hover-bg: #333333;
  --ras-text: #050505;
  --ras-muted: #333333;
  --ras-border: #666666;
  --ras-border-strong: #111111;
  --ras-accent: #005fcc;
  --ras-accent-2: #003f8a;
  --ras-blue: #005fcc;
  --ras-safe: #006b3a;
  --ras-warn: #8a5a00;
  --ras-danger: #b00020;
  --ras-shadow: none;
  --ras-focus: rgba(0, 95, 204, .42);
  --bs-primary: #005fcc;
  --bs-primary-rgb: 0, 95, 204;
}

:root[data-theme="bootswatch-slate"] {
  color-scheme: dark;
  --ras-bg: #272b30;
  --ras-canvas: #2e3338;
  --ras-panel: #3a3f44;
  --ras-panel-2: #32383e;
  --ras-rail: #1c1f22;
  --ras-rail-soft: #252a2f;
  --ras-sidebar-bg: #1c1f22;
  --ras-sidebar-bg-soft: #252a2f;
  --ras-sidebar-text: #f2f5f7;
  --ras-sidebar-muted: #c8d0d6;
  --ras-sidebar-active-bg: rgba(216, 91, 50, .18);
  --ras-sidebar-active-border: #d85b32;
  --ras-sidebar-hover-bg: rgba(255, 255, 255, .08);
  --ras-text: #f2f5f7;
  --ras-muted: #c8d0d6;
  --ras-border: #50575f;
  --ras-border-strong: #69727c;
  --ras-accent: #d85b32;
  --ras-accent-2: #ffb05c;
  --ras-blue: #8bb6d6;
  --ras-safe: #62c29a;
  --ras-warn: #f0ad4e;
  --ras-danger: #e15c55;
  --ras-shadow: 0 18px 44px rgba(0, 0, 0, .28);
}

:root[data-theme="bootswatch-cyborg"] {
  color-scheme: dark;
  --ras-bg: #060606;
  --ras-canvas: #0d0d0d;
  --ras-panel: #191919;
  --ras-panel-2: #242424;
  --ras-rail: #000000;
  --ras-rail-soft: #101010;
  --ras-sidebar-bg: #000000;
  --ras-sidebar-bg-soft: #101010;
  --ras-sidebar-text: #f7f7f7;
  --ras-sidebar-muted: #b9c3c9;
  --ras-sidebar-active-bg: rgba(255, 91, 69, .20);
  --ras-sidebar-active-border: #ff5b45;
  --ras-sidebar-hover-bg: rgba(42, 159, 214, .14);
  --ras-text: #f7f7f7;
  --ras-muted: #b9c3c9;
  --ras-border: #333333;
  --ras-border-strong: #555555;
  --ras-accent: #ff5b45;
  --ras-accent-2: #ffb000;
  --ras-blue: #2a9fd6;
  --ras-safe: #77b300;
  --ras-warn: #ff8800;
  --ras-danger: #cc0000;
  --ras-shadow: 0 18px 50px rgba(0, 0, 0, .42);
}

:root[data-theme="bootswatch-darkly"] {
  color-scheme: dark;
  --ras-bg: #222222;
  --ras-canvas: #262626;
  --ras-panel: #303030;
  --ras-panel-2: #3a3a3a;
  --ras-rail: #181818;
  --ras-rail-soft: #222222;
  --ras-sidebar-bg: #181818;
  --ras-sidebar-bg-soft: #222222;
  --ras-sidebar-text: #ffffff;
  --ras-sidebar-muted: #c7c7c7;
  --ras-sidebar-active-bg: rgba(0, 188, 140, .18);
  --ras-sidebar-active-border: #00bc8c;
  --ras-sidebar-hover-bg: rgba(255, 255, 255, .08);
  --ras-text: #ffffff;
  --ras-muted: #c7c7c7;
  --ras-border: #4b4b4b;
  --ras-border-strong: #666666;
  --ras-accent: #00bc8c;
  --ras-accent-2: #f39c12;
  --ras-blue: #3498db;
  --ras-safe: #00bc8c;
  --ras-warn: #f39c12;
  --ras-danger: #e74c3c;
  --ras-shadow: 0 18px 42px rgba(0, 0, 0, .36);
  --bs-primary: #00bc8c;
  --bs-primary-rgb: 0, 188, 140;
}

:root[data-theme="bootswatch-lux"] {
  color-scheme: light;
  --ras-bg: #f7f7f7;
  --ras-canvas: #ffffff;
  --ras-panel: #ffffff;
  --ras-panel-2: #f0f0f0;
  --ras-rail: #111111;
  --ras-rail-soft: #1b1b1b;
  --ras-sidebar-bg: #ffffff;
  --ras-sidebar-bg-soft: #f0f0f0;
  --ras-sidebar-text: #1a1a1a;
  --ras-sidebar-muted: #5b6068;
  --ras-sidebar-active-bg: rgba(26, 26, 26, .08);
  --ras-sidebar-active-border: #1a1a1a;
  --ras-sidebar-hover-bg: rgba(26, 26, 26, .05);
  --ras-text: #1a1a1a;
  --ras-muted: #5b6068;
  --ras-border: #dddddd;
  --ras-border-strong: #b7b7b7;
  --ras-accent: #1a1a1a;
  --ras-accent-2: #d85b32;
  --ras-blue: #1f5f8b;
  --ras-safe: #2e7d5b;
  --ras-warn: #9a6a10;
  --ras-danger: #b34037;
  --ras-shadow: 0 14px 32px rgba(0, 0, 0, .08);
  --bs-primary: #1a1a1a;
  --bs-primary-rgb: 26, 26, 26;
}

:root[data-theme="bootswatch-solar"] {
  color-scheme: dark;
  --ras-bg: #002b36;
  --ras-canvas: #073642;
  --ras-panel: #0b4150;
  --ras-panel-2: #123f49;
  --ras-rail: #001e26;
  --ras-rail-soft: #073642;
  --ras-sidebar-bg: #001e26;
  --ras-sidebar-bg-soft: #073642;
  --ras-sidebar-text: #fdf6e3;
  --ras-sidebar-muted: #b9ad88;
  --ras-sidebar-active-bg: rgba(181, 137, 0, .20);
  --ras-sidebar-active-border: #b58900;
  --ras-sidebar-hover-bg: rgba(38, 139, 210, .12);
  --ras-text: #fdf6e3;
  --ras-muted: #b9ad88;
  --ras-border: #31565f;
  --ras-border-strong: #5b7378;
  --ras-accent: #b58900;
  --ras-accent-2: #cb4b16;
  --ras-blue: #268bd2;
  --ras-safe: #859900;
  --ras-warn: #b58900;
  --ras-danger: #dc322f;
  --ras-shadow: 0 18px 44px rgba(0, 0, 0, .36);
  --bs-primary: #b58900;
  --bs-primary-rgb: 181, 137, 0;
}

:root[data-theme="bootswatch-superhero"] {
  color-scheme: dark;
  --ras-bg: #2b3e50;
  --ras-canvas: #33485c;
  --ras-panel: #3d566e;
  --ras-panel-2: #31475b;
  --ras-rail: #203040;
  --ras-rail-soft: #2b3e50;
  --ras-sidebar-bg: #203040;
  --ras-sidebar-bg-soft: #2b3e50;
  --ras-sidebar-text: #ebf2f8;
  --ras-sidebar-muted: #c4d4df;
  --ras-sidebar-active-bg: rgba(223, 105, 26, .20);
  --ras-sidebar-active-border: #df691a;
  --ras-sidebar-hover-bg: rgba(91, 192, 222, .12);
  --ras-text: #ebf2f8;
  --ras-muted: #c4d4df;
  --ras-border: #587087;
  --ras-border-strong: #708da4;
  --ras-accent: #df691a;
  --ras-accent-2: #f0ad4e;
  --ras-blue: #5bc0de;
  --ras-safe: #5cb85c;
  --ras-warn: #f0ad4e;
  --ras-danger: #d9534f;
  --ras-shadow: 0 18px 44px rgba(0, 0, 0, .32);
  --bs-primary: #df691a;
  --bs-primary-rgb: 223, 105, 26;
}

* {
  box-sizing: border-box;
}

html,
body,
#root {
  min-height: 100%;
}

body {
  margin: 0;
  overflow: hidden;
  background:
    linear-gradient(90deg, rgba(189, 74, 40, .055) 1px, transparent 1px),
    linear-gradient(0deg, rgba(49, 94, 132, .045) 1px, transparent 1px),
    var(--ras-bg);
  background-size: 44px 44px, 44px 44px, auto;
  color: var(--ras-text);
  text-rendering: optimizeLegibility;
}

button,
input,
select,
textarea {
  font: inherit;
}

h1,
h2,
h3,
.system-label,
.brand-mark,
.sidebar-title strong,
.nav-label,
.eyebrow,
.mode-trigger strong,
.mode-card-main strong {
  font-family: var(--ras-heading-font);
  letter-spacing: .015em;
}

button {
  color: inherit;
}

svg {
  flex: 0 0 auto;
}

:focus-visible {
  outline: 3px solid var(--ras-focus);
  outline-offset: 3px;
}

.visually-hidden {
  position: absolute !important;
  width: 1px !important;
  height: 1px !important;
  padding: 0 !important;
  margin: -1px !important;
  overflow: hidden !important;
  clip: rect(0, 0, 0, 0) !important;
  white-space: nowrap !important;
  border: 0 !important;
}

.skip-link {
  position: fixed;
  top: 10px;
  left: 12px;
  z-index: 1080;
  transform: translateY(-140%);
  border: 1px solid var(--ras-accent);
  border-radius: 8px;
  background: var(--ras-panel);
  padding: .55rem .75rem;
  color: var(--ras-text);
  font-weight: 800;
}

.skip-link:focus {
  transform: none;
}

.global-status {
  position: fixed;
  right: 1rem;
  bottom: 1rem;
  z-index: 1070;
  max-width: min(440px, calc(100vw - 2rem));
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: .65rem;
  border: 1px solid color-mix(in srgb, var(--ras-accent) 45%, var(--ras-border));
  border-radius: 8px;
  background: var(--ras-panel);
  color: var(--ras-text);
  box-shadow: var(--ras-shadow);
  padding: .75rem .875rem;
}

.global-status span {
  min-width: 0;
  overflow-wrap: anywhere;
}

.global-status button {
  width: 28px;
  height: 28px;
  flex: 0 0 auto;
  display: grid;
  place-items: center;
  border: 1px solid var(--ras-border);
  border-radius: 8px;
  background: transparent;
  color: var(--ras-muted);
  cursor: pointer;
}

.brand-mark {
  display: grid;
  place-items: center;
  width: 38px;
  height: 38px;
  border: 1px solid color-mix(in srgb, var(--ras-accent) 56%, transparent);
  border-radius: 8px;
  background:
    linear-gradient(135deg, rgba(216, 91, 50, .28), transparent),
    #11151b;
  color: #ffe3c5;
  font-weight: 900;
  box-shadow: inset 0 0 0 1px rgba(255, 176, 92, .12);
}

.brand-mark.large {
  width: 54px;
  height: 54px;
  font-size: 1.25rem;
}

.login-shell {
  min-height: 100vh;
  display: grid;
  place-items: center;
  padding: 1.5rem;
  background:
    linear-gradient(90deg, rgba(216, 91, 50, .08) 1px, transparent 1px),
    linear-gradient(0deg, rgba(49, 94, 132, .06) 1px, transparent 1px),
    var(--ras-bg);
  background-size: 42px 42px;
}

.login-card,
.card {
  border-color: var(--ras-border);
  border-radius: 8px;
  background: var(--ras-panel);
  color: var(--ras-text);
  box-shadow: none;
}

.bg-body,
.bg-body-tertiary,
.list-group-item,
.dropdown-menu,
.modal-content {
  border-color: var(--ras-border) !important;
  background-color: var(--ras-panel) !important;
  color: var(--ras-text) !important;
}

.text-body-secondary {
  color: var(--ras-muted) !important;
}

.btn-light,
.btn-outline-secondary {
  border-color: var(--ras-border) !important;
  background-color: color-mix(in srgb, var(--ras-panel) 82%, transparent) !important;
  color: var(--ras-text) !important;
}

.btn-light:hover,
.btn-outline-secondary:hover {
  border-color: color-mix(in srgb, var(--ras-accent) 54%, var(--ras-border)) !important;
  background-color: color-mix(in srgb, var(--ras-accent) 10%, var(--ras-panel)) !important;
  color: var(--ras-text) !important;
}

.badge.bg-light {
  border: 1px solid var(--ras-border);
  background-color: var(--ras-panel-2) !important;
  color: var(--ras-text) !important;
}

.form-check-input {
  border-color: var(--ras-border-strong);
  background-color: var(--ras-panel-2);
  min-width: 1.5rem;
  min-height: 1.5rem;
}

.form-check-input:checked {
  border-color: var(--ras-accent);
  background-color: var(--ras-accent);
}

.login-card {
  width: min(430px, 100%);
  box-shadow: var(--ras-shadow);
}

.app-frame {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: var(--ras-sidebar) minmax(0, 1fr);
  height: 100vh;
  height: 100dvh;
  overflow: hidden;
}

body.sidebar-collapsed .app-frame {
  grid-template-columns: var(--ras-sidebar-collapsed) minmax(0, 1fr);
}

.app-main {
  min-width: 0;
  overflow: hidden;
  background:
    linear-gradient(180deg, rgba(255, 255, 255, .22), transparent 180px),
  var(--ras-canvas);
}

.mobile-shell-toggle {
  display: none;
}

:root[data-theme="rasputin-dark"] .app-main {
  background:
    linear-gradient(180deg, rgba(216, 91, 50, .045), transparent 220px),
    var(--ras-canvas);
}

.app-view {
  display: none;
  height: 100vh;
  height: 100dvh;
  overflow: hidden;
}

.app-view.active {
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
}

.app-frame,
.app-main,
.app-view,
.app-view.active,
.page-header,
.page-header > div,
.chat-shell,
.thread-scroll,
.thread-list,
.chat-composer,
.composer-runbar,
.workspace-layout,
.workspace-side,
.workspace-main,
.workspace-preview-panel,
.workspace-browser,
.task-dashboard,
.activity-panel,
.models-content,
.models-grid,
.model-builder-panel,
.settings-layout,
.settings-panels,
.settings-pane,
.warsat-dashboard,
.settings-card,
.card,
.card-body,
.row > *,
.section-row > *,
.list-group-item {
  min-width: 0;
}

.app-view {
  max-width: 100%;
}

.app-sidebar {
  position: relative;
  min-width: 0;
  height: 100vh;
  height: 100dvh;
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  gap: clamp(.42rem, .9dvh, .7rem);
  overflow: hidden;
  border-right: 1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, .08);
  background:
    linear-gradient(180deg, color-mix(in srgb, var(--ras-sidebar-active-border) 12%, transparent), transparent 32%),
    var(--ras-sidebar-bg);
  color: var(--ras-sidebar-text);
  padding: clamp(.58rem, 1.15dvh, .8rem);
  transition: width .2s ease, padding .2s ease;
}

.sidebar-resonance {
  position: absolute;
  inset: 0;
  pointer-events: none;
  background:
    linear-gradient(90deg, color-mix(in srgb, var(--ras-sidebar-active-border) 18%, transparent) 1px, transparent 1px),
    linear-gradient(0deg, rgba(127, 167, 199, .09) 1px, transparent 1px);
  background-size: 34px 34px;
  opacity: .18;
}

.sidebar-head,
.sidebar-nav,
.sidebar-section,
.sidebar-context,
.new-task-btn {
  position: relative;
  z-index: 1;
}

.sidebar-head {
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: space-between;
  gap: .6rem;
}

.brand-button,
.nav-item,
.new-task-btn,
.sidebar-chip,
.icon-button,
.prompt-chip,
.runtime-chip,
.secondary-action,
.send-button,
.activity-tab,
.activity-row {
  border: 0;
  font: inherit;
}

.brand-button {
  min-width: 0;
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: .65rem;
  background: transparent;
  color: inherit;
  cursor: pointer;
  padding: 0;
}

.sidebar-title,
.nav-label {
  min-width: 0;
  overflow: hidden;
  text-overflow: ellipsis;
  white-space: nowrap;
}

.sidebar-title {
  display: grid;
  gap: .08rem;
  text-align: left;
}

.sidebar-title strong {
  line-height: 1.1;
}

.sidebar-title small {
  color: var(--ras-sidebar-muted);
  font-size: .75rem;
}

.icon-button {
  width: 38px;
  height: 38px;
  display: inline-grid;
  place-items: center;
  border: 1px solid color-mix(in srgb, currentColor 14%, transparent);
  border-radius: 8px;
  background: color-mix(in srgb, currentColor 5%, transparent);
  color: inherit;
  cursor: pointer;
}

.icon-button:hover {
  background: color-mix(in srgb, var(--ras-accent-2) 13%, transparent);
}

.mobile-shell-toggle.icon-button {
  display: none;
}

.new-task-btn {
  min-height: clamp(36px, 5dvh, 42px);
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: flex-start;
  gap: .6rem;
  border: 1px solid color-mix(in srgb, var(--ras-sidebar-active-border) 34%, transparent);
  border-radius: 8px;
  background: var(--ras-sidebar-active-bg);
  color: var(--ras-sidebar-text);
  padding: 0 .75rem;
  cursor: pointer;
}

.new-task-btn:hover {
  background: var(--ras-sidebar-hover-bg);
}

.sidebar-nav {
  flex: 0 0 auto;
  display: grid;
  gap: .25rem;
}

.nav-item {
  position: relative;
  min-height: clamp(36px, 5dvh, 42px);
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: flex-start;
  gap: .65rem;
  border-radius: 8px;
  background: transparent;
  color: var(--ras-sidebar-muted);
  padding: 0 .72rem;
  cursor: pointer;
}

.nav-item svg,
.nav-item .nav-label,
.nav-item .nav-count {
  pointer-events: none;
}

.nav-item:hover,
.nav-item.is-active {
  color: var(--ras-sidebar-text);
  background: var(--ras-sidebar-active-bg);
}

.nav-item.is-active::before {
  content: "";
  position: absolute;
  left: 0;
  width: 3px;
  height: 22px;
  border-radius: 0 4px 4px 0;
  background: var(--ras-sidebar-active-border);
}

.nav-count {
  margin-left: auto;
  min-width: 22px;
  border: 1px solid color-mix(in srgb, var(--ras-sidebar-active-border) 32%, transparent);
  border-radius: 999px;
  padding: .05rem .38rem;
  color: var(--ras-sidebar-text);
  font-size: .72rem;
  text-align: center;
}

.sidebar-context {
  flex: 0 0 auto;
  display: grid;
  gap: clamp(.28rem, .65dvh, .45rem);
  margin-top: 0;
  border-top: 1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, .08);
  padding-top: clamp(.42rem, .9dvh, .7rem);
}

.sidebar-section {
  flex: 1 1 auto;
  min-height: 0;
  overflow: hidden;
  border-top: 1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, .08);
  padding-top: clamp(.42rem, .85dvh, .65rem);
}

.sidebar-section[open] {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-rows: auto minmax(0, 1fr);
}

.sidebar-recent-section {
  flex: 1 1 0;
  min-height: clamp(260px, 42dvh, 680px);
}

.sidebar-recent-section[open] {
  display: grid;
  min-height: 0;
  grid-template-rows: auto minmax(0, 1fr);
}

.sidebar-recent-body {
  align-self: stretch;
  height: 100%;
  min-height: 0;
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  overflow: hidden;
}

.sidebar-section summary {
  min-height: clamp(28px, 4.2dvh, 34px);
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: space-between;
  gap: .5rem;
  border-radius: 8px;
  color: var(--ras-sidebar-muted);
  cursor: pointer;
  font-size: .78rem;
  font-weight: 850;
  list-style: none;
  padding: 0 .45rem;
  text-transform: uppercase;
}

.sidebar-section summary::-webkit-details-marker {
  display: none;
}

.sidebar-section summary:hover {
  background: var(--ras-sidebar-hover-bg);
  color: var(--ras-sidebar-text);
}

.sidebar-section-count {
  min-width: 22px;
  border: 1px solid color-mix(in srgb, var(--ras-sidebar-active-border) 34%, transparent);
  border-radius: 999px;
  color: var(--ras-sidebar-text);
  padding: .02rem .35rem;
  text-align: center;
}

.sidebar-session-list {
  flex: 1 1 0;
  display: grid;
  align-content: start;
  gap: .32rem;
  height: auto;
  min-height: 0;
  max-height: none;
  overflow-y: scroll;
  overflow-x: hidden;
  overscroll-behavior: contain;
  padding-top: .35rem;
  padding-right: .4rem;
  scrollbar-width: thin;
  scrollbar-color: var(--ras-sidebar-active-border) color-mix(in srgb, var(--ras-sidebar-bg-soft) 72%, transparent);
  scrollbar-gutter: stable;
}

.sidebar-session-list::-webkit-scrollbar {
  width: 10px;
}

.sidebar-session-list::-webkit-scrollbar-track {
  background: color-mix(in srgb, var(--ras-sidebar-bg-soft) 62%, transparent);
  border-radius: 999px;
}

.sidebar-session-list::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb {
  border: 2px solid color-mix(in srgb, var(--ras-sidebar-bg) 72%, transparent);
  border-radius: 999px;
  background: color-mix(in srgb, var(--ras-sidebar-active-border) 62%, transparent);
}

.sidebar-session-list::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb:hover {
  background: var(--ras-sidebar-active-border);
}

.sidebar-folder-tools {
  flex: 0 0 auto;
  min-width: 0;
  display: grid;
  gap: clamp(.3rem, .65dvh, .45rem);
  border: 1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, .07);
  border-radius: 12px;
  background:
    linear-gradient(180deg, rgba(255, 255, 255, .045), rgba(255, 255, 255, .018)),
    color-mix(in srgb, var(--ras-sidebar-bg-soft) 60%, transparent);
  margin: clamp(.12rem, .45dvh, .25rem) 0 clamp(.24rem, .65dvh, .45rem);
  padding: clamp(.36rem, .75dvh, .5rem);
}

.sidebar-search-field {
  min-width: 0;
  min-height: clamp(30px, 4.2dvh, 34px);
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: auto minmax(0, 1fr);
  align-items: center;
  gap: .42rem;
  border: 1px solid color-mix(in srgb, var(--ras-sidebar-text) 10%, transparent);
  border-radius: 9px;
  background: color-mix(in srgb, var(--ras-sidebar-bg-soft) 76%, transparent);
  color: var(--ras-sidebar-muted);
  padding: 0 .55rem;
}

.sidebar-search-field input {
  min-width: 0;
  border: 0;
  outline: 0;
  background: transparent;
  color: var(--ras-sidebar-text);
  font-size: .78rem;
  font-weight: 720;
}

.sidebar-search-field input::placeholder {
  color: color-mix(in srgb, var(--ras-sidebar-muted) 62%, transparent);
}

.sidebar-library-controls {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: minmax(0, 1.2fr) minmax(0, .85fr);
  gap: .4rem;
}

.sidebar-library-controls label {
  min-width: 0;
  display: grid;
  gap: .18rem;
  color: var(--ras-sidebar-muted);
  font-size: .62rem;
  font-weight: 900;
  letter-spacing: .04em;
  text-transform: uppercase;
}

.sidebar-folder-filter,
.sidebar-library-controls select,
.sidebar-session-folder {
  min-width: 0;
  min-height: clamp(28px, 3.9dvh, 31px);
  border: 1px solid color-mix(in srgb, var(--ras-sidebar-text) 11%, transparent);
  border-radius: 8px;
  background: color-mix(in srgb, var(--ras-sidebar-bg-soft) 88%, transparent);
  color: var(--ras-sidebar-text);
  cursor: pointer;
  font-size: .74rem;
  font-weight: 760;
  padding: 0 .45rem;
}

.sidebar-folder-create-shell {
  min-width: 0;
}

.sidebar-folder-create-shell summary {
  min-height: clamp(27px, 3.8dvh, 30px);
  display: inline-flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: .35rem;
  border: 1px solid color-mix(in srgb, var(--ras-sidebar-text) 11%, transparent);
  border-radius: 8px;
  background: color-mix(in srgb, var(--ras-sidebar-bg-soft) 80%, transparent);
  color: var(--ras-sidebar-muted);
  cursor: pointer;
  font-size: .72rem;
  font-weight: 850;
  list-style: none;
  padding: 0 .55rem;
  text-transform: none;
}

.sidebar-folder-create-shell summary::-webkit-details-marker {
  display: none;
}

.sidebar-folder-create-shell summary:hover,
.sidebar-folder-create-shell[open] summary {
  border-color: color-mix(in srgb, var(--ras-sidebar-active-border) 26%, transparent);
  background: var(--ras-sidebar-hover-bg);
  color: var(--ras-sidebar-text);
}

.sidebar-folder-create {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: minmax(0, 1fr) auto;
  gap: .35rem;
  padding-top: clamp(.25rem, .55dvh, .4rem);
}

.sidebar-folder-create input {
  min-width: 0;
  min-height: 31px;
  border: 1px solid color-mix(in srgb, var(--ras-sidebar-text) 11%, transparent);
  border-radius: 8px;
  background: color-mix(in srgb, var(--ras-sidebar-bg-soft) 88%, transparent);
  color: var(--ras-sidebar-text);
  font-size: .74rem;
  padding: 0 .55rem;
}

.sidebar-folder-create button {
  min-height: 31px;
  display: inline-flex;
  align-items: center;
  border: 1px solid color-mix(in srgb, var(--ras-sidebar-active-border) 34%, transparent);
  border-radius: 8px;
  background: var(--ras-sidebar-active-bg);
  color: var(--ras-sidebar-text);
  cursor: pointer;
  font-size: .72rem;
  font-weight: 850;
  padding: 0 .5rem;
}

.sidebar-folder-create button:hover {
  background: var(--ras-sidebar-hover-bg);
}

.sidebar-session-row {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: minmax(0, 1fr);
  gap: clamp(.22rem, .52dvh, .34rem);
  border: 1px solid transparent;
  border-radius: 10px;
  background: color-mix(in srgb, var(--ras-sidebar-bg-soft) 44%, transparent);
  padding: clamp(.18rem, .45dvh, .25rem);
}

.sidebar-session-row:hover,
.sidebar-session-row.is-active {
  border-color: color-mix(in srgb, var(--ras-sidebar-active-border) 26%, transparent);
  background: var(--ras-sidebar-hover-bg);
}

.sidebar-session {
  width: 100%;
  display: grid;
  gap: .12rem;
  border: 1px solid transparent;
  border-radius: 8px;
  background: transparent;
  color: var(--ras-sidebar-muted);
  cursor: pointer;
  padding: .48rem .55rem;
  text-align: left;
}

.sidebar-session:hover,
.sidebar-session-row.is-active .sidebar-session,
.sidebar-session:focus-visible {
  border-color: color-mix(in srgb, var(--ras-sidebar-active-border) 32%, transparent);
  background: var(--ras-sidebar-active-bg);
  color: var(--ras-sidebar-text);
}

.sidebar-session span,
.sidebar-session small {
  min-width: 0;
  overflow: hidden;
  text-overflow: ellipsis;
  white-space: nowrap;
}

.sidebar-session small {
  color: color-mix(in srgb, var(--ras-sidebar-muted) 76%, transparent);
  font-size: .72rem;
}

.sidebar-session.is-empty {
  border-color: color-mix(in srgb, var(--ras-sidebar-text) 9%, transparent);
  color: var(--ras-sidebar-muted);
}

.sidebar-session-actions {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: minmax(0, 1fr) minmax(96px, auto);
  align-items: center;
  gap: clamp(.22rem, .5dvh, .35rem);
  padding: 0 .1rem .08rem;
}

.sidebar-session-folder-badge {
  min-width: 0;
  overflow: hidden;
  border: 1px solid color-mix(in srgb, var(--ras-sidebar-text) 9%, transparent);
  border-radius: 999px;
  background: color-mix(in srgb, var(--ras-sidebar-bg-soft) 76%, transparent);
  color: var(--ras-sidebar-muted);
  font-size: .68rem;
  font-weight: 850;
  padding: .14rem .45rem;
  text-overflow: ellipsis;
  white-space: nowrap;
}

.sidebar-session-folder {
  width: 100%;
  min-height: 27px;
  border-radius: 999px;
  color: var(--ras-sidebar-text);
  font-size: .68rem;
  padding: 0 .34rem;
}

.context-line,
.sidebar-chip {
  min-height: clamp(30px, 4.2dvh, 34px);
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: .55rem;
}

.context-line {
  color: var(--ras-sidebar-muted);
  font-size: .82rem;
}

.status-dot {
  width: 8px;
  height: 8px;
  border-radius: 50%;
  background: var(--ras-safe);
  box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(105, 181, 142, .15);
}

.sidebar-chip {
  width: 100%;
  border: 1px solid color-mix(in srgb, var(--ras-sidebar-text) 9%, transparent);
  border-radius: 8px;
  background: color-mix(in srgb, var(--ras-sidebar-bg-soft) 72%, transparent);
  color: var(--ras-sidebar-text);
  padding: 0 .55rem;
  text-align: left;
  cursor: pointer;
}

.mobile-close {
  display: none;
}

body.sidebar-collapsed .app-sidebar {
  padding-inline: .7rem;
}

body.sidebar-collapsed .sidebar-title,
body.sidebar-collapsed .nav-label,
body.sidebar-collapsed .nav-count,
body.sidebar-collapsed .sidebar-section,
body.sidebar-collapsed .sidebar-context {
  display: none !important;
}

body.sidebar-collapsed .sidebar-head {
  justify-content: center;
}

body.sidebar-collapsed .brand-button {
  display: none;
}

body.sidebar-collapsed .nav-item,
body.sidebar-collapsed .new-task-btn {
  justify-content: center;
  width: 46px;
  padding-inline: 0;
}

.home-commandbar {
  min-height: 64px;
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: .85rem;
  border-bottom: 1px solid var(--ras-border);
  padding: .75rem 1rem;
}

.home-menu-button {
  display: none;
}

.home-title {
  display: grid;
  min-width: 0;
  margin-right: auto;
}

.system-label {
  color: var(--ras-text);
  font-size: .98rem;
  font-weight: 800;
}

.system-subtitle {
  color: var(--ras-muted);
  font-size: .78rem;
}

.home-runtime-strip,
.composer-chip-row,
.composer-meta,
.composer-actions,
.meta-row {
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: .55rem;
  flex-wrap: wrap;
}

.runtime-chip {
  min-height: 34px;
  display: inline-flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: .45rem;
  max-width: min(320px, 45vw);
  border: 1px solid var(--ras-border);
  border-radius: 8px;
  background: var(--ras-panel);
  color: var(--ras-text);
  padding: .36rem .55rem;
  font-size: .84rem;
  text-decoration: none;
}

button.runtime-chip {
  cursor: pointer;
}

.privacy-chip {
  min-height: 38px;
  padding-block: .28rem;
}

.privacy-chip span {
  display: grid;
  gap: 0;
  line-height: 1.05;
}

.privacy-chip strong,
.privacy-chip small {
  min-width: 0;
  overflow: hidden;
  text-overflow: ellipsis;
  white-space: nowrap;
}

.privacy-chip small {
  color: var(--ras-muted);
  font-size: .72rem;
  font-weight: 760;
}

.privacy-chip.is-safe small {
  color: color-mix(in srgb, var(--ras-safe) 72%, var(--ras-muted));
}

.privacy-chip.is-warn small {
  color: color-mix(in srgb, var(--ras-warn) 72%, var(--ras-muted));
}

.runtime-chip span {
  overflow: hidden;
  text-overflow: ellipsis;
  white-space: nowrap;
}

.runtime-chip.is-safe {
  border-color: color-mix(in srgb, var(--ras-safe) 46%, var(--ras-border));
  color: var(--ras-safe);
}

.runtime-chip.is-warn {
  border-color: color-mix(in srgb, var(--ras-warn) 46%, var(--ras-border));
  color: var(--ras-warn);
}

.runtime-chip.is-live {
  border-color: color-mix(in srgb, var(--ras-blue) 46%, var(--ras-border));
  color: var(--ras-blue);
}

.model-select-chip {
  gap: .45rem;
  padding-right: .35rem;
}

.chip-label {
  color: var(--ras-muted);
}

.model-select-chip select {
  min-width: 178px;
  max-width: 280px;
  border: 0;
  background: transparent;
  color: var(--ras-text);
  outline: 0;
}

.chat-shell {
  position: relative;
  flex: 1;
  min-height: 0;
  display: grid;
  grid-template-rows: minmax(0, 1fr) auto;
}

.thread-scroll {
  overflow: auto;
  padding: 2rem 1.25rem 1rem;
}

.welcome-panel,
.thread-list,
.chat-composer {
  width: min(900px, 100%);
  margin-inline: auto;
}

.welcome-panel {
  min-height: 0;
  display: grid;
  place-items: center;
  align-content: start;
  gap: .85rem;
  padding: clamp(1rem, 5vh, 3rem) 0 1rem;
  text-align: center;
}

.welcome-panel.hidden {
  display: none;
}

.warmind-sigil {
  position: relative;
  width: 68px;
  height: 68px;
  display: grid;
  place-items: center;
  border: 1px solid color-mix(in srgb, var(--ras-accent) 45%, transparent);
  border-radius: 50%;
  color: var(--ras-accent);
}

.warmind-sigil::before,
.warmind-sigil::after,
.warmind-sigil span {
  content: "";
  position: absolute;
  background: currentColor;
  opacity: .72;
}

.warmind-sigil::before {
  width: 1px;
  height: 48px;
}

.warmind-sigil::after {
  width: 48px;
  height: 1px;
}

.warmind-sigil span {
  width: 24px;
  height: 24px;
  border: 2px solid currentColor;
  border-radius: 50%;
  background: transparent;
}

.welcome-panel h1 {
  max-width: 760px;
  margin: 0;
  color: var(--ras-text);
  font-size: clamp(2.1rem, 4.4vw, 3.65rem);
  line-height: 1;
  letter-spacing: 0;
}

.welcome-panel p {
  max-width: 600px;
  margin: 0;
  color: var(--ras-muted);
  font-size: 1rem;
}

.prompt-strip {
  width: min(760px, 100%);
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: repeat(4, minmax(0, 1fr));
  gap: .6rem;
  margin-top: .25rem;
}

.prompt-chip {
  min-height: 46px;
  border: 1px solid var(--ras-border);
  border-radius: 8px;
  background: color-mix(in srgb, var(--ras-panel) 80%, transparent);
  color: var(--ras-text);
  padding: .65rem .7rem;
  text-align: left;
  font-weight: 750;
  cursor: pointer;
}

.prompt-chip:hover {
  border-color: color-mix(in srgb, var(--ras-accent) 52%, var(--ras-border));
  background: color-mix(in srgb, var(--ras-accent) 8%, var(--ras-panel));
}

.thread-list {
  display: grid;
  gap: 1.3rem;
}

.thread-item {
  display: grid;
  gap: .72rem;
}

.message {
  display: grid;
  gap: .35rem;
}

.message-label {
  color: var(--ras-muted);
  font-size: .78rem;
  font-weight: 700;
}

.user-message {
  justify-items: end;
}

.message-body,
.assistant-message {
  border: 1px solid var(--ras-border);
  border-radius: 8px;
  background: var(--ras-panel);
}

.user-bubble {
  max-width: min(690px, 86%);
  border-color: color-mix(in srgb, var(--ras-accent) 50%, var(--ras-border));
  background: color-mix(in srgb, var(--ras-accent) 12%, var(--ras-panel));
  padding: .78rem .9rem;
}

.assistant-message {
  padding: .95rem;
  box-shadow: 0 1px 0 rgba(255, 255, 255, .12) inset;
}

.assistant-label {
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: .5rem;
}

.status-pill {
  border: 1px solid var(--ras-border);
  border-radius: 999px;
  padding: .08rem .45rem;
  color: var(--ras-muted);
  font-size: .72rem;
  font-weight: 800;
}

.status-done {
  color: var(--ras-safe);
  border-color: color-mix(in srgb, var(--ras-safe) 42%, var(--ras-border));
}

.status-error,
.status-cancelled {
  color: var(--ras-danger);
  border-color: color-mix(in srgb, var(--ras-danger) 42%, var(--ras-border));
}

.status-running,
.status-queued,
.status-paused {
  color: var(--ras-warn);
  border-color: color-mix(in srgb, var(--ras-warn) 42%, var(--ras-border));
}

.markdown-body {
  line-height: 1.62;
  margin-top: .6rem;
}

.markdown-body > :last-child {
  margin-bottom: 0;
}

.markdown-body pre,
.markdown-body code {
  border-radius: 6px;
  background: color-mix(in srgb, var(--ras-panel-2) 80%, transparent);
}

.markdown-body code {
  padding: .08rem .25rem;
}

.markdown-body pre {
  overflow: auto;
  padding: .8rem;
}

.runtime-details {
  margin-top: .85rem;
  border-top: 1px solid var(--ras-border);
  padding-top: .65rem;
}

.runtime-details summary {
  color: var(--ras-accent);
  cursor: pointer;
  font-weight: 800;
}

.app-main details > summary {
  list-style: none;
}

.app-main details > summary::-webkit-details-marker {
  display: none;
}

.app-main details > summary::after {
  content: "Show";
  display: inline-flex;
  min-height: 24px;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: center;
  float: right;
  border: 1px solid color-mix(in srgb, var(--ras-accent) 34%, var(--ras-border));
  border-radius: 999px;
  background: color-mix(in srgb, var(--ras-accent) 8%, var(--ras-panel));
  color: var(--ras-accent);
  padding: .1rem .5rem;
  margin-left: .65rem;
  font-size: .72rem;
  font-weight: 900;
  line-height: 1;
  text-transform: uppercase;
}

.app-main details[open] > summary::after {
  content: "Hide";
}

.detail-grid,
.model-meta-grid {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: auto minmax(0, 1fr);
  gap: .25rem .75rem;
  margin: .65rem 0 0;
}

.detail-grid dd,
.model-meta-grid dd {
  min-width: 0;
  margin: 0;
  overflow-wrap: anywhere;
}

.detail-grid dt,
.model-meta-grid dt {
  min-width: 0;
}

.setup-card h3 {
  margin: 0;
  font-size: 1rem;
}

.setup-progress {
  display: grid;
  gap: .4rem;
  margin-top: .9rem;
}

.setup-progress strong {
  color: var(--ras-text);
}

.setup-progress-track {
  overflow: hidden;
  height: 8px;
  border: 1px solid var(--ras-border);
  border-radius: 999px;
  background: color-mix(in srgb, var(--ras-panel-2) 44%, transparent);
}

.setup-progress-track span {
  display: block;
  height: 100%;
  border-radius: inherit;
  background: linear-gradient(90deg, var(--ras-accent), color-mix(in srgb, var(--ras-accent) 58%, var(--ras-blue)));
}

.setup-step-list {
  display: grid;
  gap: .6rem;
  margin-top: .9rem;
}

.setup-step {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: auto minmax(0, 1fr) auto;
  gap: .7rem;
  align-items: center;
  border: 1px solid var(--ras-border);
  border-radius: 8px;
  background: color-mix(in srgb, var(--ras-panel-2) 34%, transparent);
  padding: .75rem;
}

.setup-step.is-done {
  border-color: color-mix(in srgb, var(--ras-good, #198754) 42%, var(--ras-border));
}

.setup-step.is-attention {
  border-color: color-mix(in srgb, var(--ras-warn, #b26a00) 42%, var(--ras-border));
}

.setup-step.is-blocked {
  border-color: color-mix(in srgb, var(--ras-danger, #dc3545) 42%, var(--ras-border));
}

.setup-step-icon {
  display: inline-flex;
  width: 34px;
  height: 34px;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: center;
  border: 1px solid color-mix(in srgb, var(--ras-accent) 34%, var(--ras-border));
  border-radius: 999px;
  color: var(--ras-accent);
}

.setup-step-body {
  display: grid;
  gap: .25rem;
  min-width: 0;
}

.setup-step-body > div {
  display: flex;
  flex-wrap: wrap;
  gap: .45rem;
  align-items: center;
}

.setup-step-body p {
  margin: 0;
  color: var(--ras-muted);
  font-size: .86rem;
  line-height: 1.42;
  overflow-wrap: anywhere;
}

.setup-ordered-list {
  display: grid;
  gap: .35rem;
  margin: .75rem 0 0;
  padding-left: 1.2rem;
  color: var(--ras-muted);
}

.setup-ordered-list code {
  color: var(--ras-accent);
  overflow-wrap: anywhere;
}

.test-checklist-grid {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: repeat(2, minmax(0, 1fr));
  gap: .75rem;
  margin-top: 1rem;
}

.test-checklist-item {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: minmax(0, 1fr) auto;
  align-items: start;
  gap: .75rem;
  min-width: 0;
  border: 1px solid color-mix(in srgb, var(--ras-border) 78%, transparent);
  border-radius: 8px;
  background:
    linear-gradient(135deg, color-mix(in srgb, var(--ras-accent) 6%, transparent), transparent 52%),
    color-mix(in srgb, var(--ras-panel-2) 36%, transparent);
  padding: .85rem;
}

.test-checklist-item strong,
.test-checklist-item p {
  min-width: 0;
  overflow-wrap: anywhere;
}

.test-checklist-item p {
  margin: .2rem 0 0;
  color: var(--ras-muted);
  font-size: .84rem;
  line-height: 1.42;
}

.chat-composer {
  position: relative;
  z-index: 2;
  margin-top: -1.2rem;
  margin-bottom: 1rem;
  border: 1px solid color-mix(in srgb, var(--ras-border-strong) 65%, var(--ras-border));
  border-radius: 8px;
  background: var(--ras-panel);
  box-shadow: var(--ras-shadow);
  padding: .75rem;
}

.composer-chip-row {
  justify-content: space-between;
  margin-bottom: .55rem;
}

.composer-chip-row:empty {
  display: none;
}

.composer-context-actions {
  display: inline-flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: .45rem;
  flex-wrap: wrap;
  margin-right: auto;
}

.composer-link-button {
  min-height: 32px;
  display: inline-flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: .38rem;
  border: 1px solid var(--ras-border);
  border-radius: 8px;
  background: color-mix(in srgb, var(--ras-panel-2) 26%, transparent);
  color: var(--ras-muted);
  cursor: pointer;
  padding: 0 .58rem;
  font-size: .82rem;
  font-weight: 780;
}

.composer-link-button:hover {
  border-color: color-mix(in srgb, var(--ras-accent) 44%, var(--ras-border));
  color: var(--ras-accent);
}

.jump-latest-button {
  position: absolute;
  left: 50%;
  bottom: 158px;
  z-index: 3;
  transform: translateX(-50%);
  min-height: 34px;
  border: 1px solid color-mix(in srgb, var(--ras-accent) 46%, var(--ras-border));
  border-radius: 999px;
  background: color-mix(in srgb, var(--ras-panel) 92%, transparent);
  color: var(--ras-accent);
  box-shadow: var(--ras-shadow);
  cursor: pointer;
  padding: 0 .75rem;
  font-size: .84rem;
  font-weight: 850;
}

.chat-composer textarea {
  width: 100%;
  min-height: 76px;
  max-height: 220px;
  resize: vertical;
  border: 0;
  outline: 0;
  background: transparent;
  color: var(--ras-text);
  padding: .25rem .1rem;
  line-height: 1.5;
}

.chat-composer textarea::placeholder {
  color: color-mix(in srgb, var(--ras-muted) 75%, transparent);
}

.composer-status {
  margin: 0 0 .45rem;
  color: var(--ras-danger);
  font-size: .86rem;
}

.agent-lane-shell {
  display: grid;
  gap: .45rem;
  min-width: 0;
  border: 1px solid color-mix(in srgb, var(--ras-border) 72%, transparent);
  border-radius: 8px;
  background: color-mix(in srgb, var(--ras-panel-2) 28%, transparent);
  padding: .55rem;
  margin-bottom: .55rem;
}

.agent-lane-head {
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: space-between;
  gap: .5rem;
  color: var(--ras-muted);
  font-size: .78rem;
  font-weight: 850;
}

.agent-lane-tabs {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(136px, 1fr));
  gap: .45rem;
  min-width: 0;
  overflow: visible;
  overscroll-behavior-inline: contain;
  padding-bottom: .1rem;
}

.agent-lane-tab {
  display: grid;
  gap: .12rem;
  min-width: 0;
  min-height: 72px;
  border: 1px solid color-mix(in srgb, var(--ras-border) 78%, transparent);
  border-radius: 8px;
  background: color-mix(in srgb, var(--ras-panel) 86%, transparent);
  color: var(--ras-text);
  cursor: pointer;
  padding: .55rem .6rem;
  text-align: left;
}

.agent-lane-tab:hover,
.agent-lane-tab:focus-visible,
.agent-lane-tab.is-active {
  border-color: color-mix(in srgb, var(--ras-accent) 58%, var(--ras-border));
  background: color-mix(in srgb, var(--ras-accent) 10%, var(--ras-panel));
}

.agent-lane-tab strong,
.agent-lane-tab span,
.agent-lane-tab em {
  min-width: 0;
  overflow: hidden;
  text-overflow: ellipsis;
  white-space: nowrap;
}

.agent-lane-tab strong {
  font-size: .88rem;
}

.agent-lane-tab span {
  color: var(--ras-muted);
  font-size: .75rem;
}

.agent-lane-tab em {
  color: var(--ras-muted);
  font-size: .72rem;
  font-style: normal;
  font-weight: 850;
}

.agent-lane-tab em.is-running {
  color: var(--ras-blue);
}

.agent-lane-current {
  border-top: 1px solid color-mix(in srgb, var(--ras-border) 68%, transparent);
  padding-top: .45rem;
}

.agent-lane-current dl {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: repeat(4, minmax(0, 1fr));
  gap: .4rem;
  margin: 0;
}

.agent-lane-current div {
  min-width: 0;
}

.agent-lane-current dt {
  color: var(--ras-muted);
  font-size: .68rem;
  font-weight: 900;
  text-transform: uppercase;
}

.agent-lane-current dd {
  margin: 0;
  color: var(--ras-text);
  font-size: .8rem;
  font-weight: 780;
  overflow: hidden;
  text-overflow: ellipsis;
  white-space: nowrap;
}

.composer-meta {
  justify-content: space-between;
  border-top: 1px solid var(--ras-border);
  margin-top: .55rem;
  padding-top: .65rem;
}

.model-health {
  flex: 1 1 280px;
  min-height: 34px;
  margin: 0;
  border-left: 3px solid currentColor;
  border-radius: 6px;
  background: color-mix(in srgb, var(--ras-panel-2) 58%, transparent);
  padding: .45rem .6rem;
  color: var(--ras-muted);
  font-size: .84rem;
}

.model-health.is-healthy {
  color: var(--ras-safe);
}

.model-health.is-unhealthy {
  color: var(--ras-danger);
}

.secondary-action,
.send-button {
  min-height: 38px;
  display: inline-flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: center;
  gap: .45rem;
  border-radius: 8px;
  cursor: pointer;
}

.secondary-action {
  border: 1px solid var(--ras-border);
  background: transparent;
  color: var(--ras-muted);
  padding: 0 .7rem;
}

.send-button {
  width: 42px;
  border: 1px solid color-mix(in srgb, var(--ras-accent) 70%, var(--ras-border));
  background: var(--ras-accent);
  color: #fff7ef;
}

.send-button:disabled {
  cursor: not-allowed;
  opacity: .48;
}

.page-header {
  min-height: 70px;
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: space-between;
  gap: .875rem;
  flex-wrap: wrap;
  border-bottom: 1px solid var(--ras-border);
  background: color-mix(in srgb, var(--ras-panel) 72%, transparent);
  padding: .75rem 1.5rem;
}

.page-header > div {
  flex: 1 1 260px;
  max-width: 100%;
}

.page-header > button,
.page-header > .btn,
.page-header > .ras-button {
  max-width: 100%;
  white-space: normal;
}

.page-header h1 {
  margin: 0;
  font-size: clamp(1.5rem, 3vw, 2.1rem);
  letter-spacing: 0;
}

.page-header p {
  margin: .15rem 0 0;
  color: var(--ras-muted);
  overflow-wrap: anywhere;
}

.task-dashboard,
.settings-panels {
  overflow: auto;
  padding: 1.25rem;
}

.eyebrow {
  display: inline-block;
  margin-bottom: .25rem;
  color: var(--ras-accent);
  font-size: .72rem;
  font-weight: 900;
  letter-spacing: .08em;
  text-transform: uppercase;
}

.composer-runbar {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: minmax(190px, .42fr) minmax(320px, 1fr);
  align-items: stretch;
  gap: .55rem;
  border-top: 1px solid color-mix(in srgb, var(--ras-border) 74%, transparent);
  margin-top: .45rem;
  padding-top: .55rem;
}

.mode-trigger,
.model-trigger,
.model-inline-select,
.parallel-agent-options {
  min-height: 50px;
  display: inline-flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: .42rem;
  border: 1px solid var(--ras-border);
  border-radius: 8px;
  background: color-mix(in srgb, var(--ras-panel-2) 42%, transparent);
  color: var(--ras-muted);
  font-size: .84rem;
}

.mode-trigger,
.model-trigger {
  width: 100%;
  justify-content: space-between;
  background:
    linear-gradient(90deg, color-mix(in srgb, var(--ras-accent) 10%, transparent), transparent 70%),
    color-mix(in srgb, var(--ras-panel-2) 42%, transparent);
  color: var(--ras-text);
  padding: .35rem .6rem;
  cursor: pointer;
}

.model-trigger {
  background:
    linear-gradient(90deg, color-mix(in srgb, var(--ras-blue) 9%, transparent), transparent 72%),
    color-mix(in srgb, var(--ras-panel-2) 42%, transparent);
}

.mode-trigger:hover,
.model-trigger:hover {
  border-color: color-mix(in srgb, var(--ras-accent) 46%, var(--ras-border));
}

.run-trigger-copy {
  min-width: 0;
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: auto minmax(0, 1fr) auto;
  align-items: baseline;
  gap: .25rem .5rem;
  width: 100%;
  text-align: left;
}

.run-trigger-copy strong,
.run-trigger-copy small,
.run-trigger-copy em {
  min-width: 0;
  overflow: hidden;
  text-overflow: ellipsis;
  white-space: nowrap;
}

.run-trigger-copy small {
  color: var(--ras-muted);
  font-size: .72rem;
  font-weight: 900;
  letter-spacing: .05em;
  text-transform: uppercase;
}

.run-trigger-copy strong {
  font-size: .95rem;
  color: var(--ras-text);
}

.run-trigger-copy em {
  color: var(--ras-muted);
  font-size: .76rem;
  font-style: normal;
}

.mode-segment-label,
.model-inline-select span {
  display: inline-flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: .35rem;
  padding: 0 .35rem;
  font-weight: 800;
}

.mode-option {
  min-height: 30px;
  min-width: 0;
  border: 1px solid transparent;
  border-radius: 7px;
  background: transparent;
  color: var(--ras-muted);
  padding: 0 .58rem;
  cursor: pointer;
  font-weight: 800;
  text-align: center;
}

.mode-option.is-active {
  border-color: color-mix(in srgb, var(--ras-accent) 55%, var(--ras-border));
  background: color-mix(in srgb, var(--ras-accent) 12%, var(--ras-panel));
  color: var(--ras-accent);
}

.mode-side-panel,
.model-side-panel {
  position: fixed;
  top: 76px;
  right: 1rem;
  bottom: 1rem;
  z-index: 1085;
  width: min(430px, calc(100vw - 2rem));
  display: grid;
  grid-template-rows: auto minmax(0, 1fr) auto;
  overflow: hidden;
  border: 1px solid color-mix(in srgb, var(--ras-accent) 42%, var(--ras-border));
  border-radius: 8px;
  background:
    linear-gradient(180deg, color-mix(in srgb, var(--ras-accent) 10%, transparent), transparent 160px),
    var(--ras-panel);
  box-shadow: var(--ras-shadow);
}

.model-side-panel {
  width: min(500px, calc(100vw - 2rem));
  grid-template-rows: auto minmax(0, 1fr) auto;
}

.mode-panel-head {
  display: flex;
  align-items: flex-start;
  justify-content: space-between;
  gap: .8rem;
  border-bottom: 1px solid var(--ras-border);
  padding: .85rem;
}

.mode-panel-head h2,
.mode-subagent-panel h3 {
  margin: 0;
  font-size: 1.15rem;
}

.mode-panel-list {
  min-height: 0;
  display: grid;
  gap: .45rem;
  overflow: auto;
  padding: .65rem;
}

.mode-card {
  display: grid;
  gap: .48rem;
  border: 1px solid var(--ras-border);
  border-radius: 8px;
  background: color-mix(in srgb, var(--ras-panel-2) 28%, transparent);
  padding: .58rem;
}

.mode-card.is-active {
  border-color: color-mix(in srgb, var(--ras-accent) 58%, var(--ras-border));
  background: color-mix(in srgb, var(--ras-accent) 10%, var(--ras-panel));
}

.mode-card-main {
  min-width: 0;
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: auto minmax(0, 1fr);
  gap: .55rem;
  border: 0;
  background: transparent;
  color: var(--ras-text);
  padding: 0;
  text-align: left;
  cursor: pointer;
}

.mode-card-main strong {
  font-size: .98rem;
}

.mode-card-main span,
.mode-model-override {
  min-width: 0;
  display: grid;
  gap: .18rem;
}

.mode-card-main small,
.mode-card p,
.mode-subagent-panel p {
  margin: 0;
  color: var(--ras-muted);
  font-size: .82rem;
}

.mode-route-grid,
.preview-meta-grid {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: auto minmax(0, 1fr);
  gap: .18rem .55rem;
  margin: 0;
  font-size: .84rem;
}

.model-panel-list {
  min-height: 0;
  display: grid;
  align-content: start;
  gap: .5rem;
  overflow: auto;
  padding: .7rem;
}

.model-choice {
  width: 100%;
  min-height: 58px;
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: auto minmax(0, 1fr) auto;
  align-items: center;
  gap: .65rem;
  border: 1px solid var(--ras-border);
  border-radius: 8px;
  background: color-mix(in srgb, var(--ras-panel-2) 26%, transparent);
  color: var(--ras-text);
  cursor: pointer;
  padding: .62rem .7rem;
  text-align: left;
}

.model-choice:hover,
.model-choice.is-active {
  border-color: color-mix(in srgb, var(--ras-accent) 52%, var(--ras-border));
  background: color-mix(in srgb, var(--ras-accent) 9%, var(--ras-panel));
}

.model-choice > span:not(.model-choice-status) {
  min-width: 0;
  display: grid;
  gap: .12rem;
}

.model-choice strong,
.model-choice small {
  min-width: 0;
  overflow: hidden;
  text-overflow: ellipsis;
  white-space: nowrap;
}

.model-choice small,
.model-choice em,
.model-panel-footer p {
  color: var(--ras-muted);
  font-size: .8rem;
}

.model-choice em {
  font-style: normal;
  font-weight: 850;
}

.model-choice-status {
  width: 9px;
  height: 9px;
  border-radius: 50%;
  background: var(--ras-muted);
  box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px color-mix(in srgb, currentColor 16%, transparent);
}

.model-choice-status.status-reachable {
  color: var(--ras-safe);
  background: var(--ras-safe);
}

.model-choice-status.status-unhealthy,
.model-choice-status.status-error {
  color: var(--ras-danger);
  background: var(--ras-danger);
}

.model-panel-footer {
  border-top: 1px solid var(--ras-border);
  padding: .75rem .85rem;
}

.model-panel-footer p {
  margin: 0;
}

.mode-route-grid dt,
.preview-meta-grid dt {
  color: var(--ras-muted);
}

.mode-route-grid dd,
.preview-meta-grid dd {
  min-width: 0;
  margin: 0;
  overflow-wrap: anywhere;
}

.mode-model-override span {
  color: var(--ras-muted);
  font-size: .78rem;
  font-weight: 800;
}

.mode-model-override select {
  min-height: 34px;
  border: 1px solid var(--ras-border);
  border-radius: 8px;
  background: var(--ras-panel);
  color: var(--ras-text);
  padding: 0 .55rem;
}

.mode-subagent-panel {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: minmax(0, 1fr) auto;
  gap: .75rem;
  align-items: center;
  border-top: 1px solid var(--ras-border);
  padding: .85rem;
}

.mode-subagent-panel label {
  display: grid;
  gap: .2rem;
  color: var(--ras-muted);
  font-size: .78rem;
  font-weight: 800;
}

.mode-subagent-panel input {
  width: 4.2rem;
  min-height: 34px;
  border: 1px solid var(--ras-border);
  border-radius: 8px;
  background: var(--ras-panel);
  color: var(--ras-text);
  padding: 0 .55rem;
  text-align: right;
}

.model-inline-select {
  padding: .27rem .45rem;
}

.model-inline-select select,
.parallel-agent-body input {
  min-width: 0;
  border: 0;
  background: transparent;
  color: var(--ras-text);
  outline: 0;
}

.model-inline-select select {
  flex: 1;
}

.parallel-agent-options {
  position: relative;
  grid-column: 1 / -1;
  width: min(240px, 100%);
  display: block;
  padding: 0;
}

.parallel-agent-options summary {
  min-height: 34px;
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: .42rem;
  cursor: pointer;
  padding: .26rem .55rem;
  font-weight: 800;
}

.parallel-agent-body {
  display: grid;
  gap: .45rem;
  border-top: 1px solid var(--ras-border);
  padding: .6rem;
}

.parallel-agent-body label {
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: space-between;
  gap: .5rem;
}

.parallel-agent-body input {
  width: 3.5rem;
  border-bottom: 1px solid var(--ras-border);
  text-align: right;
}

.parallel-agent-body p {
  margin: 0;
  color: var(--ras-muted);
  font-size: .78rem;
}

.parallel-note {
  color: var(--ras-muted);
  font-size: .82rem;
}

.parallel-run-strip {
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: .55rem;
  border: 1px solid color-mix(in srgb, var(--ras-blue) 42%, var(--ras-border));
  border-radius: 8px;
  background: color-mix(in srgb, var(--ras-blue) 8%, var(--ras-panel));
  color: var(--ras-blue);
  padding: .65rem .75rem;
}

.parallel-run-strip button,
.send-text-button,
.tiny-action {
  border: 1px solid var(--ras-border);
  border-radius: 8px;
  background: color-mix(in srgb, var(--ras-panel) 80%, transparent);
  color: var(--ras-text);
  cursor: pointer;
}

.parallel-run-strip button {
  margin-left: auto;
  padding: .25rem .55rem;
}

.send-text-button {
  min-height: 38px;
  display: inline-flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: center;
  gap: .38rem;
  padding: 0 .78rem;
  font-weight: 800;
}

.tiny-action {
  min-height: 30px;
  display: inline-flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: center;
  gap: .34rem;
  padding: 0 .55rem;
  color: var(--ras-muted);
  font-size: .82rem;
  font-weight: 800;
}

.tiny-action:hover,
.send-text-button:hover,
.parallel-run-strip button:hover {
  border-color: color-mix(in srgb, var(--ras-accent) 55%, var(--ras-border));
  color: var(--ras-accent);
}

.tiny-action.is-active {
  border-color: color-mix(in srgb, var(--ras-safe) 44%, var(--ras-border));
  background: color-mix(in srgb, var(--ras-safe) 10%, var(--ras-panel));
  color: var(--ras-safe);
}

.send-text-button:disabled,
.tiny-action:disabled {
  cursor: not-allowed;
  opacity: .58;
}

.tiny-action.danger {
  color: var(--ras-danger);
  border-color: color-mix(in srgb, var(--ras-danger) 38%, var(--ras-border));
}

.task-inline-actions,
.task-card-actions {
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: .45rem;
  flex-wrap: wrap;
  margin-top: .7rem;
}

.workspace-hero {
  min-height: 118px;
  display: flex;
  align-items: flex-end;
  justify-content: space-between;
  gap: 1rem;
  border-bottom: 1px solid var(--ras-border);
  background:
    linear-gradient(90deg, color-mix(in srgb, var(--ras-accent) 12%, transparent), transparent 42%),
    color-mix(in srgb, var(--ras-panel) 62%, transparent);
  padding: 1.4rem 1.5rem;
}

.compact-workspace-hero {
  min-height: 106px;
  align-items: center;
}

.workspace-hero h1 {
  margin: 0;
  font-size: clamp(2rem, 4vw, 3.4rem);
  line-height: 1;
}

.workspace-hero p {
  max-width: 780px;
  margin: .45rem 0 0;
  color: var(--ras-muted);
}

.workspace-layout {
  flex: 1;
  min-height: 0;
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: minmax(320px, 400px) minmax(420px, 1fr) minmax(310px, 380px);
  grid-template-areas: "workspace-side workspace-main workspace-preview";
  gap: .85rem;
  overflow: hidden;
  padding: 1rem;
}

.workspace-side {
  grid-area: workspace-side;
}

.workspace-main {
  grid-area: workspace-main;
}

.workspace-preview-panel {
  grid-area: workspace-preview;
}

.workspace-side,
.workspace-main,
.workspace-preview-panel {
  min-height: 0;
  overflow: auto;
}

.workspace-side,
.workspace-main,
.workspace-preview-panel,
.workspace-browser,
.workspace-section,
.active-run-panel,
.pipeline-panel,
.approval-card,
.empty-panel {
  border: 1px solid var(--ras-border);
  border-radius: 8px;
  background: color-mix(in srgb, var(--ras-panel) 78%, transparent);
}

.workspace-side,
.workspace-main,
.workspace-preview-panel {
  display: grid;
  align-content: start;
  gap: .75rem;
  padding: .75rem;
}

.workspace-active-panel {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: auto minmax(0, 1fr);
  gap: .95rem;
  border: 1px solid color-mix(in srgb, var(--ras-accent) 35%, var(--ras-border));
  border-radius: 8px;
  background: color-mix(in srgb, var(--ras-accent) 8%, var(--ras-panel));
  padding: 1rem;
}

.workspace-active-icon {
  width: 42px;
  height: 42px;
  display: grid;
  place-items: center;
  border: 1px solid color-mix(in srgb, var(--ras-accent) 42%, transparent);
  border-radius: 8px;
  color: var(--ras-accent);
}

.workspace-active-body {
  min-width: 0;
  display: grid;
  gap: .52rem;
}

.workspace-active-path {
  margin: 0 !important;
  color: var(--ras-text) !important;
  font-size: .88rem;
  line-height: 1.35;
}

.workspace-active-meta {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: 1fr;
  gap: .45rem;
  margin: 0;
}

.workspace-active-meta div {
  min-width: 0;
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: space-between;
  gap: .75rem;
  border: 1px solid color-mix(in srgb, var(--ras-border) 76%, transparent);
  border-radius: 8px;
  background: color-mix(in srgb, var(--ras-panel) 56%, transparent);
  padding: .5rem .6rem;
}

.workspace-active-meta dt {
  color: var(--ras-muted);
  font-size: .72rem;
  font-weight: 850;
  text-transform: uppercase;
}

.workspace-active-meta dd {
  min-width: 0;
  margin: 0;
  text-align: right;
  color: var(--ras-text);
  font-size: .86rem;
  font-weight: 850;
}

.workspace-active-panel h2,
.workspace-section h2,
.workspace-browser h2,
.guide-card h2,
.active-run-panel h2,
.pipeline-panel h2,
.empty-panel h2 {
  margin: 0;
  font-size: 1.05rem;
}

.workspace-active-panel p,
.workspace-section p,
.workspace-browser p,
.guide-card p,
.active-run-panel p,
.pipeline-panel p,
.empty-panel p {
  margin: .18rem 0 0;
  color: var(--ras-muted);
  overflow-wrap: anywhere;
}

.workspace-section,
.workspace-browser,
.workspace-guide,
.workspace-mount-panel {
  padding: .8rem;
}

.workspace-quick-add {
  display: grid;
  gap: .75rem;
}

.workspace-quick-add summary {
  cursor: pointer;
  color: var(--ras-accent);
  font-weight: 800;
}

.quick-folder-form {
  display: grid;
  gap: .6rem;
}

.quick-folder-form label {
  display: grid;
  gap: .32rem;
  color: var(--ras-muted);
  font-size: .84rem;
}

.quick-folder-form input {
  min-height: 40px;
  width: 100%;
  border: 1px solid var(--ras-border);
  border-radius: 8px;
  background: var(--ras-panel);
  color: var(--ras-text);
  padding: 0 .68rem;
}

.workspace-help-text {
  font-size: .84rem;
  line-height: 1.42;
}

.workspace-root-main {
  min-width: 0;
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: .6rem;
  border: 0;
  background: transparent;
  color: inherit;
  padding: 0;
  text-align: left;
  cursor: pointer;
}

.workspace-root-main span {
  min-width: 0;
  display: grid;
  gap: .12rem;
}

.workspace-root-main small,
.workspace-permission,
.mount-plan-card small {
  color: var(--ras-muted);
  overflow-wrap: anywhere;
}

.workspace-root-card {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: minmax(0, 1fr);
  gap: .45rem .65rem;
  align-items: start;
  border: 1px solid var(--ras-border);
  border-radius: 8px;
  background: color-mix(in srgb, var(--ras-panel-2) 30%, transparent);
  padding: .6rem;
}

.workspace-root-card.is-active {
  border-color: color-mix(in srgb, var(--ras-accent) 58%, var(--ras-border));
  background: color-mix(in srgb, var(--ras-accent) 10%, var(--ras-panel));
}

.workspace-root-card.is-browsing {
  outline: 2px solid color-mix(in srgb, var(--ras-blue) 54%, transparent);
  outline-offset: 2px;
}

.workspace-root-actions {
  display: flex;
  justify-content: flex-start;
  gap: .4rem;
  align-items: center;
  flex-wrap: wrap;
  max-width: none;
}

.workspace-permission {
  display: inline-flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: .35rem;
  font-size: .8rem;
  white-space: nowrap;
}

.workspace-permission.is-write {
  color: var(--ras-warn);
}

.browser-head {
  display: flex;
  align-items: flex-start;
  justify-content: space-between;
  gap: .75rem;
  flex-wrap: wrap;
  border-bottom: 1px solid var(--ras-border);
  margin-bottom: .85rem;
  padding-bottom: .85rem;
}

.workspace-entry-list {
  display: grid;
  gap: .36rem;
}

.workspace-entry-row {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: minmax(0, 1fr) auto;
  align-items: center;
  gap: .45rem;
  border: 1px solid color-mix(in srgb, var(--ras-border) 82%, transparent);
  border-radius: 8px;
  background: color-mix(in srgb, var(--ras-panel-2) 24%, transparent);
  min-height: 48px;
  padding: .38rem .45rem;
}

.workspace-entry-row.is-selected {
  border-color: color-mix(in srgb, var(--ras-accent) 55%, var(--ras-border));
  background: color-mix(in srgb, var(--ras-accent) 9%, var(--ras-panel));
}

.workspace-entry-name {
  min-width: 0;
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: .55rem;
  border: 0;
  background: transparent;
  color: var(--ras-text);
  min-height: 36px;
  padding: .22rem;
  text-align: left;
  cursor: pointer;
}

.workspace-entry-name span {
  min-width: 0;
  display: grid;
  gap: .05rem;
}

.workspace-entry-name strong,
.workspace-entry-name small,
.workspace-entry-meta {
  display: block;
  overflow: hidden;
  text-overflow: ellipsis;
  white-space: nowrap;
}

.workspace-entry-name strong {
  color: var(--ras-text);
  font-weight: 850;
  line-height: 1.15;
}

.workspace-entry-name small,
.workspace-entry-meta {
  color: var(--ras-muted);
  font-size: .78rem;
}

.workspace-entry-meta {
  display: none;
}

.workspace-action-row {
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: .5rem;
  flex-wrap: wrap;
}

.workspace-knowledge-panel {
  display: grid;
  gap: .75rem;
}

.workspace-knowledge-flow {
  display: grid;
  gap: .75rem;
  border-color: color-mix(in srgb, var(--ras-accent) 26%, var(--ras-border));
  background:
    linear-gradient(135deg, color-mix(in srgb, var(--ras-accent) 7%, transparent), transparent 44%),
    color-mix(in srgb, var(--ras-panel) 88%, transparent);
}

.knowledge-flow-list {
  display: grid;
  gap: .42rem;
  margin: 0;
  padding: 0;
  list-style: none;
}

.knowledge-flow-list li {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: 72px minmax(0, 1fr);
  gap: .55rem;
  align-items: start;
  border: 1px solid color-mix(in srgb, var(--ras-border) 78%, transparent);
  border-radius: 8px;
  background: color-mix(in srgb, var(--ras-panel-2) 42%, transparent);
  padding: .5rem .55rem;
}

.knowledge-flow-list li.is-complete {
  border-color: color-mix(in srgb, var(--ras-safe) 38%, var(--ras-border));
}

.knowledge-flow-list span {
  width: fit-content;
  border: 1px solid color-mix(in srgb, var(--ras-accent) 36%, var(--ras-border));
  border-radius: 999px;
  color: var(--ras-accent);
  font-size: .68rem;
  font-weight: 900;
  line-height: 1;
  padding: .25rem .42rem;
  text-transform: uppercase;
}

.knowledge-flow-list p {
  margin: 0;
  min-width: 0;
  overflow-wrap: anywhere;
  color: var(--ras-muted);
  font-size: .8rem;
  line-height: 1.35;
}

.knowledge-explainer,
.mount-intro {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: auto minmax(0, 1fr);
  gap: .55rem;
  align-items: start;
  border: 1px solid color-mix(in srgb, var(--ras-blue) 30%, var(--ras-border));
  border-radius: 8px;
  background: color-mix(in srgb, var(--ras-blue) 7%, var(--ras-panel));
  color: var(--ras-muted);
  padding: .65rem .7rem;
}

.knowledge-explainer p,
.mount-intro p {
  margin: 0;
  font-size: .82rem;
  line-height: 1.42;
}

.knowledge-explainer code,
.mount-plan-grid code {
  color: var(--ras-accent);
  overflow-wrap: anywhere;
}

.knowledge-stat-grid {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: repeat(4, minmax(0, 1fr));
  gap: .45rem;
}

.knowledge-metric {
  display: grid;
  gap: .05rem;
  border: 1px solid var(--ras-border);
  border-radius: 8px;
  background: color-mix(in srgb, var(--ras-panel-2) 30%, transparent);
  padding: .55rem;
}

.knowledge-metric strong {
  line-height: 1;
  font-size: 1.15rem;
}

.knowledge-metric span {
  color: var(--ras-muted);
  font-size: .74rem;
  font-weight: 800;
}

.knowledge-search-form {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: minmax(0, 1fr) auto;
  gap: .45rem;
}

.knowledge-search-form input {
  width: 100%;
  min-height: 38px;
  border: 1px solid var(--ras-border);
  border-radius: 8px;
  background: var(--ras-panel);
  color: var(--ras-text);
  padding: 0 .65rem;
}

.knowledge-result-stack {
  display: grid;
  gap: .45rem;
}

.knowledge-result-group {
  display: grid;
  gap: .45rem;
}

.knowledge-result-group h3 {
  margin: 0;
  color: var(--ras-muted);
  font-size: .76rem;
  font-weight: 900;
  letter-spacing: .02em;
  text-transform: uppercase;
}

.knowledge-result-card {
  display: grid;
  gap: .2rem;
  border: 1px solid var(--ras-border);
  border-radius: 8px;
  background: color-mix(in srgb, var(--ras-panel-2) 24%, transparent);
  padding: .6rem;
}

.knowledge-result-card strong,
.knowledge-result-card small,
.knowledge-result-type {
  min-width: 0;
  overflow: hidden;
  text-overflow: ellipsis;
  white-space: nowrap;
}

.knowledge-result-card small,
.knowledge-result-card p,
.knowledge-result-type {
  color: var(--ras-muted);
}

.knowledge-result-type {
  width: fit-content;
  border: 1px solid color-mix(in srgb, var(--ras-blue) 38%, var(--ras-border));
  border-radius: 999px;
  background: color-mix(in srgb, var(--ras-blue) 9%, transparent);
  color: var(--ras-blue);
  font-size: .66rem;
  font-weight: 900;
  line-height: 1;
  padding: .2rem .42rem;
  text-transform: uppercase;
}

.knowledge-result-card p {
  display: -webkit-box;
  overflow: hidden;
  margin: 0;
  -webkit-box-orient: vertical;
  -webkit-line-clamp: 3;
  font-size: .82rem;
}

.graph-evidence-stack,
.graph-settings-results {
  display: grid;
  gap: .55rem;
}

.graph-evidence-card {
  display: grid;
  gap: .55rem;
  min-width: 0;
  border: 1px solid color-mix(in srgb, var(--ras-border) 82%, transparent);
  border-radius: 8px;
  background:
    linear-gradient(90deg, color-mix(in srgb, var(--ras-accent) 8%, transparent), transparent 32%),
    color-mix(in srgb, var(--ras-panel-2) 34%, transparent);
  padding: .65rem;
}

.graph-evidence-card-head {
  display: flex;
  align-items: flex-start;
  justify-content: space-between;
  gap: .7rem;
  min-width: 0;
}

.graph-evidence-card-head > div {
  display: grid;
  gap: .25rem;
  min-width: 0;
}

.graph-evidence-card strong {
  min-width: 0;
  color: var(--ras-text);
  overflow-wrap: anywhere;
}

.graph-type-pill {
  width: fit-content;
  border: 1px solid color-mix(in srgb, var(--ras-accent) 38%, var(--ras-border));
  border-radius: 999px;
  background: color-mix(in srgb, var(--ras-accent) 10%, transparent);
  color: var(--ras-accent);
  font-size: .66rem;
  font-weight: 900;
  letter-spacing: .02em;
  line-height: 1;
  padding: .22rem .42rem;
  text-transform: uppercase;
}

.graph-evidence-meta,
.graph-evidence-title,
.graph-evidence-citation,
.graph-evidence-empty {
  color: var(--ras-muted);
  font-size: .76rem;
  font-weight: 800;
}

.graph-evidence-meta {
  flex: 0 0 auto;
  text-align: right;
}

.graph-evidence-why {
  margin: 0;
  color: var(--ras-muted);
  font-size: .82rem;
  line-height: 1.45;
}

.graph-evidence-list {
  display: grid;
  gap: .35rem;
}

.graph-evidence-title {
  color: color-mix(in srgb, var(--ras-text) 74%, var(--ras-muted));
  text-transform: uppercase;
}

.graph-evidence-item {
  display: grid;
  gap: .2rem;
  border-left: 2px solid color-mix(in srgb, var(--ras-accent) 42%, var(--ras-border));
  padding-left: .55rem;
}

.graph-evidence-citation,
.graph-evidence-snippet {
  overflow-wrap: anywhere;
}

.graph-evidence-snippet,
.graph-evidence-empty {
  margin: 0;
}

.graph-evidence-snippet {
  color: var(--ras-muted);
  display: -webkit-box;
  overflow: hidden;
  -webkit-box-orient: vertical;
  -webkit-line-clamp: 3;
  font-size: .8rem;
  line-height: 1.42;
}

.workspace-guide {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: 1fr;
  gap: .75rem;
  border: 0;
  background: transparent;
  padding: 0;
}

.guide-card {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: auto minmax(0, 1fr);
  gap: .65rem;
  border: 1px solid var(--ras-border);
  border-radius: 8px;
  background: color-mix(in srgb, var(--ras-panel) 68%, transparent);
  padding: .85rem;
}

.mount-form {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: 1fr;
  align-items: end;
  gap: .75rem;
  margin-top: .85rem;
}

.mount-form label {
  display: grid;
  gap: .32rem;
  color: var(--ras-muted);
  font-size: .84rem;
}

.mount-form input {
  min-height: 38px;
  border: 1px solid var(--ras-border);
  border-radius: 8px;
  background: var(--ras-panel);
  color: var(--ras-text);
  padding: 0 .65rem;
}

.switch-line {
  grid-template-columns: auto minmax(0, 1fr);
  align-items: center;
  color: var(--ras-text) !important;
}

.workspace-mount-panel summary {
  display: grid;
  gap: .12rem;
  cursor: pointer;
}

.workspace-mount-panel summary span {
  color: var(--ras-accent);
  font-weight: 850;
}

.workspace-mount-panel summary small {
  color: var(--ras-muted);
  font-size: .8rem;
}

.mount-access-choice {
  display: grid !important;
  grid-template-columns: auto minmax(0, 1fr);
  gap: .6rem !important;
  align-items: start;
  border: 1px solid color-mix(in srgb, var(--ras-safe) 28%, var(--ras-border));
  border-radius: 8px;
  background: color-mix(in srgb, var(--ras-safe) 6%, var(--ras-panel));
  color: var(--ras-text) !important;
  padding: .65rem;
  cursor: pointer;
}

.mount-access-choice input {
  width: 24px !important;
  height: 24px !important;
  min-height: 24px !important;
  margin-top: .1rem;
  accent-color: var(--ras-accent);
  padding: 0 !important;
  cursor: pointer;
}

.mount-access-choice span {
  display: grid;
  gap: .12rem;
}

.mount-access-choice strong {
  color: var(--ras-text);
}

.mount-access-choice small {
  color: var(--ras-muted);
  line-height: 1.35;
}

.mount-plan {
  margin-top: .8rem;
}

.mount-plan-card {
  display: grid;
  gap: .75rem;
  border: 1px solid color-mix(in srgb, var(--ras-accent) 42%, var(--ras-border));
  border-radius: 8px;
  background: color-mix(in srgb, var(--ras-accent) 8%, var(--ras-panel));
  padding: .75rem;
}

.mount-plan-grid {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: minmax(92px, auto) minmax(0, 1fr);
  gap: .38rem .75rem;
  margin: 0;
  font-size: .84rem;
}

.mount-plan-grid dt {
  color: var(--ras-muted);
  font-weight: 850;
}

.mount-plan-grid dd {
  min-width: 0;
  margin: 0;
  overflow-wrap: anywhere;
}

.mount-plan-actions {
  display: flex;
  flex-wrap: wrap;
  gap: .5rem;
}

.workspace-preview-panel {
  align-content: start;
}

.preview-section {
  display: grid;
  gap: .75rem;
}

.workspace-file-preview {
  max-height: min(460px, 46vh);
  overflow: auto;
  border: 1px solid color-mix(in srgb, var(--ras-border) 82%, transparent);
  border-radius: 8px;
  background: #0d1117;
  color: #e8edf4;
  padding: .85rem;
  font-size: .82rem;
  line-height: 1.5;
  white-space: pre-wrap;
}

.run-summary-grid {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: repeat(4, minmax(0, 1fr));
  gap: .75rem;
  max-width: 1180px;
}

.activity-view {
  min-height: 0;
  display: none;
  grid-template-rows: auto minmax(0, 1fr);
}

.activity-view.active {
  display: grid;
}

.activity-header {
  flex: 0 0 auto;
}

.activity-view .task-dashboard {
  min-height: 0;
  display: grid;
  grid-template-rows: auto minmax(0, 1fr);
  gap: .95rem;
  overflow: hidden;
  padding-top: .95rem;
}

.active-run-panel,
.pipeline-panel,
.approval-card,
.empty-panel {
  max-width: 1180px;
  margin-top: .9rem;
  padding: .9rem;
}

.run-lanes {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(260px, 1fr));
  gap: .75rem;
  margin-top: .85rem;
}

.stat-card {
  display: grid;
  gap: .12rem;
  padding: .85rem;
}

.stat-card strong {
  font-size: 1.45rem;
  line-height: 1;
}

.stat-card span {
  color: var(--ras-muted);
}

.task-card {
  display: grid;
  gap: .85rem;
  max-width: 1180px;
  padding: .9rem;
}

.task-card.is-active {
  border-color: color-mix(in srgb, var(--ras-blue) 48%, var(--ras-border));
}

.task-card-head {
  display: flex;
  align-items: flex-start;
  justify-content: space-between;
  gap: .8rem;
}

.task-card-title {
  min-width: 0;
  display: grid;
  gap: .3rem;
}

.task-card h2 {
  margin: 0;
  font-size: 1rem;
  overflow-wrap: anywhere;
}

.task-run-info {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: minmax(0, 1fr) auto;
  gap: .75rem;
  align-items: start;
  border: 1px solid color-mix(in srgb, var(--ras-border) 78%, transparent);
  border-radius: 8px;
  background: color-mix(in srgb, var(--ras-panel-2) 24%, transparent);
  padding: .65rem;
}

.task-run-info dl {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: repeat(4, minmax(0, 1fr));
  gap: .5rem;
  margin: 0;
}

.task-run-info div {
  min-width: 0;
}

.task-run-info dt {
  color: var(--ras-muted);
  font-size: .72rem;
  font-weight: 850;
  text-transform: uppercase;
}

.task-run-info dd {
  min-width: 0;
  margin: .12rem 0 0;
  overflow: hidden;
  text-overflow: ellipsis;
  white-space: nowrap;
  color: var(--ras-text);
  font-size: .86rem;
  font-weight: 800;
}

.task-card .meta-row span {
  border: 1px solid var(--ras-border);
  border-radius: 999px;
  background: color-mix(in srgb, var(--ras-panel-2) 44%, transparent);
  color: var(--ras-muted);
  padding: .12rem .48rem;
  font-size: .78rem;
}

.task-message-block {
  display: grid;
  gap: .45rem;
  border-top: 1px solid var(--ras-border);
  padding-top: .85rem;
}

.task-message-block > span {
  color: var(--ras-muted);
  font-size: .76rem;
  font-weight: 850;
  text-transform: uppercase;
}

.task-message-block .message-result {
  max-height: 260px;
  margin: 0;
  overflow: auto;
  border: 1px solid color-mix(in srgb, var(--ras-border) 80%, transparent);
  border-radius: 8px;
  background: color-mix(in srgb, var(--ras-panel-2) 30%, transparent);
  padding: .75rem;
}

.helper-list {
  display: grid;
  gap: .45rem;
  border-top: 1px solid var(--ras-border);
  padding-top: .65rem;
}

.helper-row {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: auto minmax(0, 1fr) auto;
  align-items: center;
