  gap: .5rem;
  color: var(--ras-muted);
  font-size: .86rem;
}

.pipeline-panel {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: auto minmax(0, 1fr);
  gap: .75rem;
}

.pipeline-step {
  border: 1px solid var(--ras-border);
  border-radius: 999px;
  background: color-mix(in srgb, var(--ras-panel-2) 42%, transparent);
  color: var(--ras-muted);
  padding: .24rem .55rem;
  font-size: .8rem;
  font-weight: 800;
}

.activity-tabs {
  display: flex;
  flex-wrap: wrap;
  gap: .45rem;
  min-width: 0;
}

.activity-tab-shell {
  display: grid;
  gap: .45rem;
  border: 1px solid var(--ras-border);
  border-radius: 8px;
  background: color-mix(in srgb, var(--ras-panel) 82%, transparent);
  padding: .65rem;
}

.activity-tab {
  min-height: 38px;
  border: 1px solid var(--ras-border);
  border-radius: 8px;
  background: var(--ras-panel);
  color: var(--ras-muted);
  padding: 0 .8rem;
  cursor: pointer;
}

.activity-tab.is-active {
  border-color: color-mix(in srgb, var(--ras-accent) 55%, var(--ras-border));
  color: var(--ras-accent);
  background: color-mix(in srgb, var(--ras-accent) 8%, var(--ras-panel));
}

.activity-tab-context {
  margin: 0;
  color: var(--ras-muted);
  font-size: .84rem;
}

.activity-panel {
  min-height: 0;
  overflow: auto;
  padding-right: .25rem;
}

.activity-list {
  display: grid;
  gap: .85rem;
  max-width: 1180px;
}

.activity-row {
  width: 100%;
  display: grid;
  gap: .2rem;
  border: 1px solid var(--ras-border);
  border-radius: 8px;
  background: var(--ras-panel);
  color: var(--ras-text);
  padding: .85rem;
  text-align: left;
}

.activity-row span {
  color: var(--ras-muted);
  font-size: .86rem;
}

.tool-relay-panel {
  display: grid;
  gap: 1rem;
}

.tool-relay-panel > .section-row {
  border: 1px solid var(--ras-border);
  border-radius: 8px;
  background: color-mix(in srgb, var(--ras-panel) 82%, transparent);
  padding: .85rem;
}

.tool-relay-group {
  display: grid;
  gap: .65rem;
}

.tool-relay-group h3 {
  margin: 0;
  color: var(--ras-text);
  font-size: .92rem;
}

.tool-relay-grid {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(280px, 1fr));
  gap: .75rem;
}

.tool-relay-card {
  display: grid;
  gap: .65rem;
  min-width: 0;
  border: 1px solid var(--ras-border);
  border-radius: 8px;
  background: var(--ras-panel);
  padding: .85rem;
}

.tool-relay-card.is-blocked {
  border-color: color-mix(in srgb, var(--ras-danger, #b42318) 34%, var(--ras-border));
}

.tool-relay-card-head {
  display: flex;
  align-items: flex-start;
  justify-content: space-between;
  gap: .75rem;
}

.tool-relay-card h4 {
  margin: .35rem 0 0;
  font-size: .98rem;
}

.tool-relay-card p,
.tool-relay-reason {
  margin: 0;
  color: var(--ras-muted);
  font-size: .84rem;
}

.tool-relay-reason {
  color: var(--ras-danger, #b42318);
}

.mcp-server-list {
  display: grid;
  gap: .85rem;
}

.mcp-fixture-panel {
  display: flex;
  align-items: flex-start;
  justify-content: space-between;
  gap: .85rem;
  padding: .85rem;
  border: 1px solid var(--ras-border);
  border-radius: .55rem;
  background: color-mix(in srgb, var(--ras-panel) 86%, transparent);
}

.mcp-fixture-panel > div {
  min-width: 0;
}

.mcp-fixture-panel p {
  font-size: .84rem;
}

.mcp-server-card {
  display: grid;
  gap: .75rem;
  padding: .95rem;
  border: 1px solid var(--ras-border);
  border-radius: var(--ras-radius);
  background: var(--ras-surface-soft);
}

.mcp-command {
  display: block;
  overflow-wrap: anywhere;
  padding: .55rem .65rem;
  border: 1px solid var(--ras-border);
  border-radius: .45rem;
  background: var(--ras-code-bg, rgba(0, 0, 0, .08));
  color: var(--ras-text);
}

.mcp-health-grid,
.mcp-capability-grid {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(140px, 1fr));
  gap: .55rem;
}

.mcp-health-grid {
  margin: 0;
}

.mcp-health-grid > div,
.mcp-capability-card {
  min-width: 0;
  padding: .6rem;
  border: 1px solid var(--ras-border);
  border-radius: .5rem;
  background: color-mix(in srgb, var(--ras-panel) 82%, transparent);
}

.mcp-health-grid dt {
  color: var(--ras-muted);
  font-size: .72rem;
  text-transform: uppercase;
}

.mcp-health-grid dd {
  margin: 0;
  color: var(--ras-text);
  overflow-wrap: anywhere;
}

.mcp-capability-card {
  display: grid;
  gap: .35rem;
}

.mcp-capability-card strong,
.mcp-capability-card small {
  overflow-wrap: anywhere;
}

.mcp-capability-card small {
  color: var(--ras-muted);
}

.risk-safe {
  color: var(--ras-success, #287d3c);
}

.risk-guarded {
  color: var(--ras-warn, #b26a00);
}

.risk-approval_required {
  color: var(--ras-accent);
}

.archive-layout,
.trials-layout {
  display: grid;
  align-items: start;
  gap: 1rem;
  padding: 1rem;
}

.archive-layout {
  grid-template-columns: minmax(220px, 280px) minmax(0, 1fr) minmax(260px, 360px);
}

.trials-layout {
  grid-template-columns: minmax(280px, 380px) minmax(0, 1fr);
}

.archive-sidebar,
.archive-editor,
.archive-preview,
.archive-support,
.trials-compose,
.trial-run-card {
  min-width: 0;
  border: 1px solid color-mix(in srgb, var(--ras-border) 78%, transparent);
  border-radius: 8px;
  background:
    linear-gradient(180deg, color-mix(in srgb, var(--ras-panel) 94%, var(--ras-accent) 6%), var(--ras-panel));
  padding: .9rem;
}

.archive-sidebar,
.archive-editor,
.archive-preview,
.archive-support,
.trials-compose,
.trial-run-list {
  display: grid;
  align-content: start;
  gap: .85rem;
}

.archive-session-list,
.trial-run-list {
  min-height: 0;
  max-height: calc(100dvh - 220px);
  overflow: auto;
  padding-right: .15rem;
}

.archive-session {
  display: grid;
  gap: .22rem;
  width: 100%;
  border: 1px solid color-mix(in srgb, var(--ras-border) 78%, transparent);
  border-radius: 8px;
  background: color-mix(in srgb, var(--ras-panel-2) 40%, transparent);
  color: var(--ras-text);
  padding: .7rem;
  text-align: left;
}

.archive-session:hover,
.archive-session:focus-visible,
.archive-session.is-active {
  border-color: color-mix(in srgb, var(--ras-accent) 52%, var(--ras-border));
  background: color-mix(in srgb, var(--ras-accent) 9%, var(--ras-panel));
}

.archive-session span {
  color: var(--ras-muted);
  font-size: .78rem;
  font-weight: 750;
}

.archive-editor label,
.trials-compose label {
  display: grid;
  gap: .35rem;
  min-width: 0;
}

.archive-editor label > span,
.trials-compose label > span,
.trials-compose legend {
  color: var(--ras-muted);
  font-size: .78rem;
  font-weight: 900;
  text-transform: uppercase;
}

.archive-editor input,
.archive-editor textarea,
.trials-compose textarea {
  width: 100%;
  min-width: 0;
  border: 1px solid var(--ras-border);
  border-radius: 8px;
  background: var(--ras-input-bg);
  color: var(--ras-text);
  padding: .7rem .78rem;
}

.archive-editor textarea {
  min-height: min(54dvh, 620px);
  resize: vertical;
}

.trials-compose textarea {
  min-height: 180px;
  resize: vertical;
}

.archive-actions {
  display: flex;
  flex-wrap: wrap;
  align-items: center;
  gap: .6rem;
}

.archive-actions [role="status"],
.trials-compose [role="status"] {
  margin: 0;
  color: var(--ras-muted);
  font-size: .84rem;
  font-weight: 750;
}

.archive-editor-header,
.archive-stats,
.archive-search-row,
.archive-source-card > div {
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: .65rem;
  min-width: 0;
}

.archive-editor-header {
  flex-wrap: wrap;
  justify-content: space-between;
  padding-bottom: .75rem;
  border-bottom: 1px solid color-mix(in srgb, var(--ras-border) 78%, transparent);
}

.archive-editor-header h2 {
  margin: .1rem 0 0;
  font-size: clamp(1.05rem, 1.7vw, 1.35rem);
  overflow-wrap: anywhere;
}

.archive-stats {
  flex-wrap: wrap;
  justify-content: flex-end;
  margin: 0;
}

.archive-stats div {
  min-width: 84px;
  border: 1px solid color-mix(in srgb, var(--ras-border) 78%, transparent);
  border-radius: 8px;
  background: color-mix(in srgb, var(--ras-panel-2) 46%, transparent);
  padding: .45rem .55rem;
}

.archive-stats dt {
  color: var(--ras-muted);
  font-size: .68rem;
  font-weight: 900;
  text-transform: uppercase;
}

.archive-stats dd {
  margin: 0;
  color: var(--ras-text);
  font-weight: 850;
}

.archive-tabs {
  display: flex;
  flex-wrap: wrap;
  gap: .45rem;
  padding: .3rem;
  border: 1px solid color-mix(in srgb, var(--ras-border) 72%, transparent);
  border-radius: 10px;
  background: color-mix(in srgb, var(--ras-panel-2) 40%, transparent);
}

.archive-tabs button {
  border: 1px solid transparent;
  border-radius: 8px;
  background: transparent;
  color: var(--ras-muted);
  font-size: .82rem;
  font-weight: 850;
  padding: .5rem .75rem;
}

.archive-tabs button:hover,
.archive-tabs button:focus-visible,
.archive-tabs button.is-active,
.archive-tabs button[aria-selected="true"] {
  border-color: color-mix(in srgb, var(--ras-accent) 50%, var(--ras-border));
  background: color-mix(in srgb, var(--ras-accent) 11%, var(--ras-panel));
  color: var(--ras-text);
}

.archive-tab-panel,
.archive-draft-panel,
.archive-citations,
.archive-export-panel {
  min-width: 0;
}

.archive-draft-panel,
.archive-citations,
.archive-export-panel {
  display: grid;
  gap: .85rem;
}

.archive-search-row {
  align-items: stretch;
}

.archive-search-row input {
  flex: 1 1 260px;
}

.archive-help {
  margin: 0;
  color: var(--ras-muted);
  font-size: .88rem;
}

.archive-source-list {
  display: grid;
  gap: .65rem;
  max-height: min(52dvh, 560px);
  overflow: auto;
  padding-right: .15rem;
}

.archive-source-card {
  display: grid;
  gap: .45rem;
  min-width: 0;
  border: 1px solid color-mix(in srgb, var(--ras-border) 76%, transparent);
  border-radius: 8px;
  background: color-mix(in srgb, var(--ras-panel-2) 44%, transparent);
  padding: .75rem;
}

.archive-source-card > div {
  flex-wrap: wrap;
  justify-content: space-between;
}

.archive-source-card strong {
  overflow-wrap: anywhere;
}

.archive-source-card span {
  color: var(--ras-muted);
  font-size: .78rem;
  font-weight: 850;
  text-align: right;
}

.archive-source-card p,
.archive-export-panel p,
.archive-support p {
  margin: 0;
  color: var(--ras-muted);
  overflow-wrap: anywhere;
}

.archive-support section {
  display: grid;
  gap: .35rem;
  border: 1px solid color-mix(in srgb, var(--ras-border) 72%, transparent);
  border-radius: 8px;
  background: color-mix(in srgb, var(--ras-panel-2) 36%, transparent);
  padding: .75rem;
}

.archive-workbench .archive-preview {
  min-height: min(52dvh, 600px);
  max-height: min(58dvh, 680px);
  overflow: auto;
}

.archive-preview pre,
.trial-output p {
  margin: 0;
  white-space: pre-wrap;
  overflow-wrap: anywhere;
}

.archive-preview pre {
  max-height: min(58dvh, 680px);
  overflow: auto;
  border: 1px solid color-mix(in srgb, var(--ras-border) 74%, transparent);
  border-radius: 8px;
  background: color-mix(in srgb, var(--ras-panel-2) 42%, transparent);
  color: var(--ras-text);
  padding: .85rem;
}

.trials-compose fieldset {
  display: grid;
  gap: .45rem;
  min-width: 0;
  margin: 0;
  border: 1px solid color-mix(in srgb, var(--ras-border) 74%, transparent);
  border-radius: 8px;
  padding: .75rem;
}

.trial-model-option {
  grid-template-columns: auto minmax(0, 1fr);
  align-items: center;
  border: 1px solid color-mix(in srgb, var(--ras-border) 70%, transparent);
  border-radius: 8px;
  background: color-mix(in srgb, var(--ras-panel-2) 34%, transparent);
  color: var(--ras-text);
  padding: .55rem .65rem;
}

.trial-model-option input {
  width: 24px;
  height: 24px;
  flex: 0 0 auto;
  cursor: pointer;
}

.trial-run-card {
  display: grid;
  gap: .9rem;
}

.trial-run-card h2 {
  margin: .15rem 0 0;
  font-size: 1rem;
  letter-spacing: 0;
}

.trial-output-grid {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(220px, 1fr));
  gap: .7rem;
}

.trial-output {
  display: grid;
  gap: .45rem;
  min-width: 0;
  border: 1px solid color-mix(in srgb, var(--ras-border) 74%, transparent);
  border-radius: 8px;
  background: color-mix(in srgb, var(--ras-panel-2) 38%, transparent);
  padding: .75rem;
}

.trial-output span {
  color: var(--ras-muted);
  font-size: .78rem;
  font-weight: 800;
}

.trial-route-form {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: minmax(0, 1fr) auto;
  gap: .45rem;
  align-items: end;
  border-top: 1px solid color-mix(in srgb, var(--ras-border) 72%, transparent);
  padding-top: .55rem;
}

.trial-route-form label {
  display: grid;
  gap: .25rem;
  min-width: 0;
  margin: 0;
}

.trial-route-form label span,
.trial-route-form small {
  color: var(--ras-muted);
  font-size: .74rem;
  font-weight: 850;
}

.trial-route-form select {
  min-width: 0;
  width: 100%;
  border: 1px solid var(--ras-border);
  border-radius: 8px;
  background: var(--ras-input-bg, var(--ras-panel));
  color: var(--ras-text);
  padding: .45rem .5rem;
}

.trial-route-form small {
  grid-column: 1 / -1;
}

.trial-routing-summary {
  display: flex;
  flex-wrap: wrap;
  gap: .45rem;
  border-top: 1px solid color-mix(in srgb, var(--ras-border) 72%, transparent);
  padding-top: .75rem;
}

.trial-routing-summary span {
  border: 1px solid color-mix(in srgb, var(--ras-accent) 36%, var(--ras-border));
  border-radius: 999px;
  background: color-mix(in srgb, var(--ras-accent) 10%, transparent);
  color: var(--ras-text);
  font-size: .76rem;
  font-weight: 850;
  padding: .28rem .55rem;
}

.settings-card,
.stat-card,
.task-card {
  border-color: var(--ras-border);
  border-radius: 8px;
  background: var(--ras-panel);
  box-shadow: none !important;
}

.warsat-panel,
.warsat-plan-card {
  border-color: color-mix(in srgb, var(--ras-accent) 26%, var(--ras-border));
}

.warsat-dashboard {
  display: grid;
  align-content: start;
  grid-template-columns: 1fr;
  gap: 1rem;
}

.warsat-dashboard.has-plan {
  grid-template-columns: minmax(0, 1.08fr) minmax(360px, .92fr);
}

.warsat-summary-strip {
  display: grid;
  grid-column: 1 / -1;
  grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(180px, 1fr));
  gap: .75rem;
}

.warsat-workflow-steps {
  display: grid;
  grid-column: 1 / -1;
  grid-template-columns: repeat(5, minmax(0, 1fr));
  gap: .45rem;
  margin: 0;
  padding: 0;
  list-style: none;
}

.warsat-workflow-steps li {
  min-width: 0;
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: .45rem;
  border: 1px solid color-mix(in srgb, var(--ras-border) 70%, transparent);
  border-radius: 8px;
  background: color-mix(in srgb, var(--ras-panel-2) 32%, transparent);
  color: var(--ras-muted);
  padding: .52rem .62rem;
}

.warsat-workflow-steps span {
  width: 22px;
  height: 22px;
  flex: 0 0 auto;
  display: inline-grid;
  place-items: center;
  border-radius: 999px;
  background: color-mix(in srgb, currentColor 12%, transparent);
  font-size: .76rem;
  font-weight: 900;
}

.warsat-workflow-steps strong {
  min-width: 0;
  overflow: hidden;
  text-overflow: ellipsis;
  white-space: nowrap;
  font-size: .84rem;
}

.warsat-workflow-steps li.is-current,
.warsat-workflow-steps li.is-complete {
  border-color: color-mix(in srgb, var(--ras-accent) 44%, var(--ras-border));
  color: var(--ras-text);
}

.warsat-workflow-steps li.is-complete span {
  background: color-mix(in srgb, var(--ras-safe) 22%, transparent);
  color: var(--ras-safe);
}

.warsat-summary-strip .border {
  border-color: var(--ras-border) !important;
  background: color-mix(in srgb, var(--ras-panel-2) 42%, var(--ras-panel)) !important;
}

.warsat-panel,
.warsat-library-panel {
  grid-column: 1;
}

.warsat-model-finder {
  grid-column: 1 / -1;
}

.warsat-hardware-panel {
  grid-column: 1 / -1;
}

.warsat-readiness-actions {
  display: flex;
  flex-wrap: wrap;
  justify-content: flex-end;
  gap: .5rem;
}

.warsat-readiness-pill {
  display: inline-flex;
  min-height: 31px;
  align-items: center;
  border: 1px solid var(--ras-border);
  border-radius: 999px;
  background: color-mix(in srgb, var(--ras-panel-2) 58%, transparent);
  color: var(--ras-muted);
  padding: .25rem .7rem;
  font-size: .78rem;
  font-weight: 900;
  text-transform: uppercase;
}

.warsat-readiness-pill.is-ready,
.warsat-hardware-check.is-pass span {
  border-color: color-mix(in srgb, #3fbf7f 48%, var(--ras-border));
  color: #63d99a;
}

.warsat-readiness-pill.is-warning,
.warsat-hardware-check.is-warn span {
  border-color: color-mix(in srgb, var(--ras-warn, #d99a32) 52%, var(--ras-border));
  color: var(--ras-warn, #d99a32);
}

.warsat-readiness-pill.is-blocked,
.warsat-hardware-check.is-block span {
  border-color: color-mix(in srgb, var(--ras-danger) 52%, var(--ras-border));
  color: var(--ras-danger);
}

.warsat-hardware-grid {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(220px, 1fr));
  gap: .65rem;
}

.warsat-hardware-check {
  display: grid;
  align-content: start;
  gap: .35rem;
  min-width: 0;
  border: 1px solid color-mix(in srgb, var(--ras-border) 76%, transparent);
  border-radius: 8px;
  background: color-mix(in srgb, var(--ras-panel-2) 40%, transparent);
  padding: .75rem;
}

.warsat-hardware-check span {
  width: fit-content;
  border: 1px solid var(--ras-border);
  border-radius: 999px;
  padding: .12rem .5rem;
  font-size: .68rem;
  font-weight: 950;
  text-transform: uppercase;
}

.warsat-hardware-check strong,
.warsat-hardware-check p,
.warsat-hardware-check small {
  min-width: 0;
  overflow-wrap: anywhere;
}

.warsat-hardware-check p {
  margin: 0;
  color: var(--ras-text);
  font-size: .86rem;
}

.warsat-hardware-check small {
  color: var(--ras-muted);
}

.warsat-hardware-details {
  border: 1px solid color-mix(in srgb, var(--ras-border) 76%, transparent);
  border-radius: 8px;
  background: color-mix(in srgb, var(--ras-panel-2) 30%, transparent);
  padding: .75rem;
}

.warsat-model-finder-actions {
  flex-wrap: wrap;
  justify-content: flex-end;
}

.warsat-model-finder-meta {
  display: flex;
  flex-wrap: wrap;
  gap: .45rem;
  margin-top: .85rem;
}

.warsat-model-finder-meta span,
.warsat-model-finder-meta strong {
  display: inline-flex;
  min-height: 28px;
  align-items: center;
  border: 1px solid color-mix(in srgb, var(--ras-border) 75%, transparent);
  border-radius: 999px;
  background: color-mix(in srgb, var(--ras-panel-2) 50%, transparent);
  color: var(--ras-muted);
  padding: .2rem .6rem;
  font-size: .78rem;
  font-weight: 850;
}

.warsat-model-finder-meta strong {
  border-color: color-mix(in srgb, var(--ras-danger) 40%, var(--ras-border));
  color: var(--ras-danger);
}

.warsat-model-finder-grid {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: minmax(170px, 210px) minmax(0, 1fr) minmax(250px, 310px);
  gap: .75rem;
  margin-top: .85rem;
}

.warsat-model-filters,
.warsat-model-selected {
  display: grid;
  align-content: start;
  gap: .65rem;
  min-width: 0;
  border: 1px solid color-mix(in srgb, var(--ras-border) 75%, transparent);
  border-radius: 8px;
  background: color-mix(in srgb, var(--ras-panel-2) 42%, transparent);
  padding: .75rem;
}

.warsat-model-filters label {
  display: grid;
  gap: .28rem;
  color: var(--ras-muted);
  font-size: .76rem;
  font-weight: 900;
  text-transform: uppercase;
}

.warsat-model-filters input,
.warsat-model-filters select {
  min-height: 38px;
  border: 1px solid var(--ras-border);
  border-radius: 8px;
  background: var(--ras-input-bg);
  color: var(--ras-text);
  padding: .4rem .6rem;
  text-transform: none;
}

.warsat-model-result-list {
  display: grid;
  align-content: start;
  gap: .45rem;
  min-width: 0;
  max-height: min(42vh, 420px);
  overflow: auto;
  padding-right: .15rem;
}

.warsat-model-result {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: minmax(0, 1fr) auto;
  gap: .65rem;
  align-items: center;
  min-height: 62px;
  border: 1px solid color-mix(in srgb, var(--ras-border) 74%, transparent);
  border-radius: 8px;
  background: color-mix(in srgb, var(--ras-panel-2) 34%, transparent);
  color: var(--ras-text);
  padding: .65rem;
  text-align: left;
}

.warsat-model-result:hover,
.warsat-model-result:focus-visible,
.warsat-model-result.is-selected {
  border-color: color-mix(in srgb, var(--ras-accent) 54%, var(--ras-border));
  background: color-mix(in srgb, var(--ras-accent) 10%, var(--ras-panel));
}

.warsat-model-result span:first-child,
.warsat-model-selected dd {
  min-width: 0;
  overflow-wrap: anywhere;
}

.warsat-model-result strong,
.warsat-model-result small {
  display: block;
}

.warsat-model-result small,
.warsat-model-result-tags em {
  color: var(--ras-muted);
  font-size: .78rem;
  font-style: normal;
}

.warsat-model-result-tags {
  display: flex;
  flex-wrap: wrap;
  justify-content: flex-end;
  gap: .3rem;
}

.warsat-model-result-tags em {
  border: 1px solid color-mix(in srgb, var(--ras-blue) 30%, var(--ras-border));
  border-radius: 999px;
  background: color-mix(in srgb, var(--ras-blue) 8%, transparent);
  padding: .14rem .42rem;
}

.warsat-model-selected h3 {
  margin: 0;
  font-size: 1.05rem;
  overflow-wrap: anywhere;
}

.warsat-model-selected p {
  margin: 0;
  color: var(--ras-muted);
}

.warsat-plan-card {
  grid-column: 2;
  grid-row: 2 / span 5;
  position: sticky;
  top: 1rem;
  align-self: start;
  max-height: calc(100dvh - 8rem);
  overflow: auto;
}

.warsat-section-title {
  display: grid;
  gap: .15rem;
  margin-top: .25rem;
}

.warsat-section-title h2 {
  margin: 0;
  font-size: 1.1rem;
}

.warsat-section-title p {
  margin: 0;
  color: var(--ras-muted);
}

.warsat-approval-pill,
.warsat-risk-pill {
  display: inline-flex;
  min-height: 32px;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: center;
  border: 1px solid color-mix(in srgb, var(--ras-warn) 52%, var(--ras-border));
  border-radius: 999px;
  background: color-mix(in srgb, var(--ras-warn) 18%, var(--ras-panel));
  color: var(--ras-text);
  font-size: .78rem;
  font-weight: 900;
  letter-spacing: .03em;
  padding: .28rem .72rem;
  text-transform: uppercase;
}

.warsat-risk-pill {
  color: var(--ras-warn);
}

.warsat-plan-form .form-label {
  color: var(--ras-text);
  font-weight: 800;
}

.warsat-plan-form .form-text {
  min-height: 2.3em;
  color: var(--ras-muted);
}

.warsat-action-col {
  align-self: end;
}

.warsat-form-section,
.warsat-tuning-panel {
  border: 1px solid color-mix(in srgb, var(--ras-border) 78%, transparent);
  border-radius: 8px;
  background: color-mix(in srgb, var(--ras-panel-2) 42%, transparent);
  padding: .85rem;
}

.warsat-form-section + .warsat-tuning-panel,
.warsat-tuning-panel + .warsat-tuning-panel {
  margin-top: .85rem;
}

.warsat-form-title {
  display: grid;
  gap: .12rem;
  margin-bottom: .75rem;
}

.warsat-form-title strong {
  font-size: 1rem;
}

.warsat-form-title span {
  color: var(--ras-muted);
}

.warsat-runtime-message {
  border: 1px solid color-mix(in srgb, var(--ras-blue) 28%, var(--ras-border));
  border-radius: 8px;
  background: color-mix(in srgb, var(--ras-blue) 8%, var(--ras-panel));
  color: var(--ras-text);
  font-size: .92rem;
  padding: .7rem .85rem;
}

.warsat-runtime-list {
  display: grid;
  gap: .75rem;
}

.warsat-runtime-card {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: minmax(170px, .55fr) minmax(0, 1fr) auto;
  gap: .85rem;
  align-items: start;
  border: 1px solid var(--ras-border);
  border-radius: 8px;
  background: color-mix(in srgb, var(--ras-panel-2) 28%, transparent);
  padding: .85rem;
}

.warsat-runtime-card > div:first-child {
  display: grid;
  gap: .15rem;
}

.warsat-runtime-card span,
.warsat-runtime-card dd {
  min-width: 0;
  overflow-wrap: anywhere;
}

.warsat-runtime-card span {
  color: var(--ras-muted);
  font-size: .86rem;
}

.warsat-runtime-actions {
  display: flex;
  flex-wrap: wrap;
  justify-content: flex-end;
  gap: .4rem;
}

.warsat-tuning-panel summary {
  color: var(--ras-accent);
  cursor: pointer;
  font-weight: 900;
}

.warsat-library-panel {
  border: 1px solid var(--ras-border);
  border-radius: 8px;
  background: color-mix(in srgb, var(--ras-panel-2) 36%, transparent);
  padding: .82rem .9rem;
}

.warsat-library-panel + .warsat-library-panel {
  margin-top: -.25rem;
}

.warsat-library-panel summary {
  display: grid;
  gap: .12rem;
  color: var(--ras-text);
  cursor: pointer;
  font-weight: 900;
}

.warsat-library-panel summary small {
  color: var(--ras-muted);
  font-size: .86rem;
  font-weight: 650;
}

.warsat-profile-strip {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(178px, 1fr));
  gap: .75rem;
  margin: 1rem 0 .25rem;
}

.warsat-profile-card {
  display: grid;
  gap: .2rem;
  border: 1px solid var(--ras-border);
  border-radius: 8px;
  background: var(--ras-panel);
  color: var(--ras-text);
  padding: .78rem;
  text-align: left;
}

.warsat-profile-card span,
.warsat-profile-card small {
  color: var(--ras-muted);
}

.warsat-profile-card.is-selected,
.warsat-profile-card:hover,
.warsat-profile-card:focus-visible {
  border-color: color-mix(in srgb, var(--ras-accent) 50%, var(--ras-border));
  background: color-mix(in srgb, var(--ras-accent) 10%, var(--ras-panel));
}

.warsat-protocol-card {
  position: relative;
  overflow: hidden;
}

.warsat-protocol-card::before,
.warsat-plan-card::before {
  content: "";
  position: absolute;
  inset: 0 0 auto;
  height: 2px;
  background: linear-gradient(90deg, var(--ras-accent), transparent 72%);
  opacity: .78;
}

.warsat-note-list {
  display: grid;
  gap: .35rem;
  padding-left: 1.1rem;
  color: var(--ras-muted);
  font-size: .92rem;
}

.warsat-best-for {
  display: flex;
  gap: .4rem;
  flex-wrap: wrap;
}

.warsat-best-for span {
  border: 1px solid color-mix(in srgb, var(--ras-blue) 28%, var(--ras-border));
  border-radius: 999px;
  background: color-mix(in srgb, var(--ras-blue) 8%, var(--ras-panel));
  color: var(--ras-blue);
  font-size: .75rem;
  font-weight: 850;
  padding: .16rem .5rem;
}

.warsat-warning-list {
  border: 1px solid color-mix(in srgb, var(--ras-warn) 38%, var(--ras-border));
  border-radius: 8px;
  background: color-mix(in srgb, var(--ras-warn) 16%, var(--ras-panel));
  padding: .75rem .85rem;
  color: var(--ras-text);
}

.warsat-warning-list p {
  color: var(--ras-text);
  font-weight: 750;
}

.warsat-deploy-strip,
.warsat-deployment-result {
  display: grid;
  gap: .85rem;
  border: 1px solid color-mix(in srgb, var(--ras-accent) 30%, var(--ras-border));
  border-radius: 8px;
  background: color-mix(in srgb, var(--ras-accent) 9%, var(--ras-panel));
  padding: .85rem;
}

.warsat-deploy-strip {
  grid-template-columns: minmax(0, 1fr) auto;
  align-items: center;
}

.warsat-deploy-actions {
  display: flex;
  flex-wrap: wrap;
  justify-content: flex-end;
  gap: .45rem;
}

.warsat-deploy-strip > div,
.warsat-deployment-result > div {
  display: grid;
  gap: .15rem;
}

.warsat-deploy-strip span,
.warsat-deployment-result span {
  color: var(--ras-muted);
  font-size: .92rem;
}

.warsat-plan-summary {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: repeat(2, minmax(0, 1fr));
  gap: .55rem;
  margin-top: .85rem;
}

.warsat-plan-summary div {
  display: grid;
  gap: .12rem;
  min-width: 0;
  border: 1px solid var(--ras-border);
  border-radius: 8px;
  background: color-mix(in srgb, var(--ras-panel-2) 38%, transparent);
  padding: .62rem .68rem;
}

.warsat-plan-summary span {
  color: var(--ras-muted);
  font-size: .72rem;
  font-weight: 850;
  letter-spacing: .03em;
  text-transform: uppercase;
}

.warsat-plan-summary strong {
  min-width: 0;
  overflow-wrap: anywhere;
  color: var(--ras-text);
  font-size: .92rem;
}

.warsat-lifecycle {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: repeat(3, minmax(0, 1fr));
  gap: .55rem;
  margin: 1rem 0;
  padding: 0;
  list-style: none;
}

.warsat-lifecycle-step {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: auto minmax(0, 1fr);
  gap: .55rem;
  min-width: 0;
  border: 1px solid var(--ras-border);
  border-radius: 8px;
  background: color-mix(in srgb, var(--ras-panel) 86%, transparent);
  padding: .7rem;
}

.warsat-lifecycle-step > span {
  width: .72rem;
  height: .72rem;
  margin-top: .2rem;
  border: 1px solid var(--ras-border);
  border-radius: 999px;
  background: var(--ras-panel-2);
}

.warsat-lifecycle-step.is-done > span {
  border-color: color-mix(in srgb, var(--ras-success, #287d3c) 70%, var(--ras-border));
  background: var(--ras-success, #287d3c);
}

.warsat-lifecycle-step.is-active > span {
  border-color: var(--ras-accent);
  background: var(--ras-accent);
  box-shadow: 0 0 0 4px color-mix(in srgb, var(--ras-accent) 16%, transparent);
}

.warsat-lifecycle-step.is-error {
  border-color: color-mix(in srgb, var(--ras-danger, #b42318) 50%, var(--ras-border));
}

.warsat-lifecycle-step.is-error > span {
  border-color: var(--ras-danger, #b42318);
  background: var(--ras-danger, #b42318);
}

.warsat-lifecycle-step strong,
.warsat-lifecycle-step small,
.warsat-lifecycle-step p {
  min-width: 0;
  overflow-wrap: anywhere;
}

.warsat-lifecycle-step strong {
  display: block;
  color: var(--ras-text);
  font-size: .9rem;
}

.warsat-lifecycle-step small {
  display: block;
  color: var(--ras-muted);
  font-size: .72rem;
  font-weight: 850;
  text-transform: uppercase;
}

.warsat-lifecycle-step p {
  margin: .25rem 0 0;
  color: var(--ras-muted);
  font-size: .78rem;
}

.warsat-deployment-log-list {
  display: grid;
  gap: .65rem;
}

.warsat-deployment-log {
  display: grid;
  gap: .45rem;
  border: 1px solid var(--ras-border);
  border-radius: 8px;
  background: color-mix(in srgb, var(--ras-panel-2) 32%, transparent);
  padding: .7rem;
}

.warsat-deployment-log p {
  margin: 0;
  color: var(--ras-muted);
}

.warsat-deployment-log code {
  min-width: 0;
  overflow-wrap: anywhere;
  color: var(--ras-text);
}

.warsat-safety-grid {
  grid-template-columns: repeat(4, auto minmax(0, 1fr));
}

.warsat-file-list {
  display: flex;
  gap: .45rem;
  flex-wrap: wrap;
}

.warsat-file-list span {
  border: 1px solid color-mix(in srgb, var(--ras-blue) 38%, var(--ras-border));
  border-radius: 999px;
  background: color-mix(in srgb, var(--ras-blue) 10%, var(--ras-panel));
  color: var(--ras-blue);
  padding: .18rem .55rem;
  font-size: .78rem;
  font-weight: 800;
}

.warsat-plan-card .log-box {
  max-height: min(42vh, 360px);
}

.settings-layout {
  flex: 1;
  min-height: 0;
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: 248px minmax(0, 1fr);
}

.settings-nav {
  align-content: start;
  gap: .55rem;
  overflow: auto;
  border-right: 1px solid var(--ras-border);
  background:
    linear-gradient(180deg, color-mix(in srgb, var(--ras-panel-2) 76%, transparent), color-mix(in srgb, var(--ras-panel) 90%, transparent)) !important;
  padding: 1rem .9rem;
}

.settings-tab {
  min-height: 58px;
  border-radius: 8px;
  border: 1px solid color-mix(in srgb, var(--ras-border) 88%, transparent) !important;
  background: color-mix(in srgb, var(--ras-panel) 80%, transparent) !important;
  color: var(--ras-text) !important;
  box-shadow: none !important;
  padding: .72rem .8rem;
}

.settings-tab small {
  display: block;
  margin-top: .12rem;
  color: var(--ras-muted);
  font-size: .76rem;
  text-transform: uppercase;
}

.settings-tab:hover,
.settings-tab:focus-visible {
  border-color: color-mix(in srgb, var(--ras-accent) 40%, var(--ras-border)) !important;
  background: color-mix(in srgb, var(--ras-accent) 8%, var(--ras-panel)) !important;
}

.settings-tab.btn-primary {
  border-color: color-mix(in srgb, var(--ras-accent) 54%, var(--ras-border)) !important;
  background:
    linear-gradient(90deg, color-mix(in srgb, var(--ras-accent) 14%, var(--ras-panel)), var(--ras-panel)) !important;
  color: var(--ras-text) !important;
}

.settings-tab.btn-primary::before {
  content: "";
  display: inline-block;
  width: .46rem;
  height: .46rem;
  border-radius: 999px;
  background: var(--ras-accent);
  box-shadow: 0 0 0 4px color-mix(in srgb, var(--ras-accent) 13%, transparent);
  margin-right: .45rem;
  vertical-align: .08rem;
}

.settings-pane {
  width: 100%;
  display: grid;
  gap: .875rem;
  max-width: 1180px;
}

.pane-title h2,
.section-row h3 {
  margin-bottom: .25rem;
}

.section-row {
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: space-between;
  gap: .75rem;
  flex-wrap: wrap;
}

.workspace-root-list,
.workspace-browser-list,
.model-list {
  display: grid;
  gap: .625rem;
}

.workspace-root-card {
  display: grid;
  gap: .25rem;
  border-radius: 8px;
}

.workspace-root-card small {
  opacity: .8;
}

.ras-button {
  display: inline-flex;
  min-height: 40px;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: center;
  gap: .45rem;
  border: 1px solid color-mix(in srgb, var(--ras-border-strong) 62%, var(--ras-border));
  border-radius: 8px;
  background: color-mix(in srgb, var(--ras-panel-2) 56%, transparent);
  color: var(--ras-text);
  font-weight: 850;
  line-height: 1;
  padding: .55rem .78rem;
}

.ras-button:hover,
.ras-button:focus-visible {
  border-color: color-mix(in srgb, var(--ras-accent) 52%, var(--ras-border));
  background: color-mix(in srgb, var(--ras-accent) 11%, var(--ras-panel));
}

.ras-button.primary {
  border-color: color-mix(in srgb, var(--ras-accent) 56%, var(--ras-border));
  background: color-mix(in srgb, var(--ras-accent) 17%, var(--ras-panel));
}

.ras-button.ghost {
  background: transparent;
}

.ras-button.small-button {
  min-height: 34px;
  padding: .43rem .62rem;
  font-size: .82rem;
}

.ras-button:disabled {
  cursor: not-allowed;
  opacity: .58;
}

.models-view {
  background:
    radial-gradient(circle at 82% 12%, color-mix(in srgb, var(--ras-accent) 13%, transparent), transparent 28rem),
    linear-gradient(180deg, color-mix(in srgb, var(--ras-bg) 92%, var(--ras-panel) 8%), var(--ras-bg));
}

.models-header {
  align-items: flex-start;
}

.models-header-actions,
.model-action-row {
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: flex-end;
  gap: .55rem;
  flex-wrap: wrap;
}

.models-content {
  flex: 1;
  min-height: 0;
  overflow: auto;
  padding: 1.25rem;
}

.models-grid {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: minmax(0, 1.7fr) minmax(280px, .8fr);
  gap: 1rem;
  max-width: 1260px;
}

.model-command-card,
.model-health-card,
.model-readiness-panel,
.model-builder-panel,
.model-catalog-panel,
.advanced-model-registry {
  border: 1px solid var(--ras-border);
  border-radius: 8px;
  background: color-mix(in srgb, var(--ras-panel) 94%, transparent);
  box-shadow: var(--ras-shadow);
}

.model-command-card,
.model-health-card,
.model-readiness-panel,
.model-builder-panel,
.model-catalog-panel {
  padding: 1rem;
}

.model-readiness-panel {
  display: grid;
  gap: .85rem;
  max-width: 1260px;
  margin-bottom: 1rem;
  background:
    linear-gradient(135deg, color-mix(in srgb, var(--ras-accent) 8%, transparent), transparent 48%),
    color-mix(in srgb, var(--ras-panel) 94%, transparent);
}

.model-readiness-head,
.model-readiness-summary {
  display: flex;
  align-items: flex-start;
  justify-content: space-between;
  gap: .85rem;
}

.model-readiness-head h2 {
  margin: 0;
  letter-spacing: 0;
}

.model-readiness-head p,
.model-readiness-step p {
  margin: .25rem 0 0;
  color: var(--ras-muted);
}

.model-readiness-summary {
  align-items: flex-end;
  flex-direction: column;
  flex: 0 0 auto;
}

.model-readiness-summary strong {
  color: var(--ras-muted);
  font-size: .78rem;
  font-weight: 850;
}

.model-readiness-grid {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: repeat(5, minmax(0, 1fr));
  gap: .65rem;
}

.model-readiness-step {
  display: grid;
  align-content: space-between;
  gap: .65rem;
  min-width: 0;
  min-height: 156px;
  border: 1px solid color-mix(in srgb, var(--ras-border) 78%, transparent);
  border-left-width: 3px;
  border-radius: 8px;
  background: color-mix(in srgb, var(--ras-panel-2) 42%, transparent);
  padding: .75rem;
}

.model-readiness-step.is-ready {
  border-left-color: var(--ras-safe);
}

.model-readiness-step.is-warning {
  border-left-color: var(--ras-warn);
}

.model-readiness-step.is-blocked {
  border-left-color: var(--ras-danger, #b42318);
}

.model-readiness-step span {
  display: block;
  color: var(--ras-muted);
  font-size: .7rem;
  font-weight: 900;
  text-transform: uppercase;
}

.model-readiness-step strong {
  display: block;
  margin-top: .18rem;
  min-width: 0;
  overflow-wrap: anywhere;
}

.model-readiness-step p {
  display: -webkit-box;
  overflow: hidden;
  -webkit-box-orient: vertical;
  -webkit-line-clamp: 3;
  font-size: .8rem;
  line-height: 1.4;
}

.model-readiness-step .ras-button {
  justify-self: start;
}

.model-section-card,
.model-side-summary {
  display: grid;
  gap: .65rem;
  border: 1px solid color-mix(in srgb, var(--ras-border) 74%, transparent);
  border-radius: 8px;
  background:
    linear-gradient(135deg, color-mix(in srgb, var(--ras-accent) 8%, transparent), transparent 60%),
    color-mix(in srgb, var(--ras-panel-2) 44%, transparent);
  padding: .85rem;
}

.model-section-card h2,
.model-side-summary h2 {
  margin: 0;
  font-size: 1.05rem;
  letter-spacing: 0;
}

.model-section-card p,
.model-side-summary p {
  margin: 0;
  color: var(--ras-muted);
  font-size: .88rem;
  line-height: 1.45;
}

.model-section-status {
  display: grid;
  gap: .32rem;
  min-width: 0;
}

.model-section-status strong {
  min-width: 0;
  overflow-wrap: anywhere;
}

.model-section-status small {
  color: var(--ras-muted);
}

.model-section-tabs,
.model-side-actions {
  display: grid;
  gap: .45rem;
}

.model-section-tab {
  display: grid;
  gap: .14rem;
  width: 100%;
  min-height: 54px;
  border: 1px solid color-mix(in srgb, var(--ras-border) 74%, transparent);
  border-radius: 8px;
  background: color-mix(in srgb, var(--ras-panel-2) 34%, transparent);
  color: var(--ras-text);
  padding: .62rem .7rem;
  text-align: left;
}

.model-section-tab span {
  font-weight: 900;
}

.model-section-tab small {
  color: var(--ras-muted);
  font-size: .78rem;
}

.model-section-tab:hover,
.model-section-tab:focus-visible,
.model-section-tab.is-active {
  border-color: color-mix(in srgb, var(--ras-accent) 52%, var(--ras-border));
  background:
    linear-gradient(90deg, color-mix(in srgb, var(--ras-accent) 12%, transparent), transparent 72%),
    color-mix(in srgb, var(--ras-panel) 96%, transparent);
}

.model-section-tab.is-active {
  box-shadow: inset 3px 0 0 var(--ras-accent);
}

.model-plan-details {
  margin-top: .85rem;
}

.model-plan-details summary {
  min-height: 38px;
  display: inline-flex;
  align-items: center;
  border: 1px solid color-mix(in srgb, var(--ras-border) 78%, transparent);
  border-radius: 8px;
  background: color-mix(in srgb, var(--ras-panel-2) 48%, transparent);
  color: var(--ras-accent);
  cursor: pointer;
  font-weight: 900;
  padding: .42rem .65rem;
}

.model-command-top {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: auto minmax(0, 1fr) auto;
  align-items: start;
  gap: .8rem;
}

.model-command-top h2,
.model-health-card h2,
.model-builder-panel h2 {
  margin: 0;
  letter-spacing: 0;
}

.model-command-top p,
.model-health-card p,
.model-builder-panel p,
.runtime-option p {
  margin: .25rem 0 0;
  color: var(--ras-muted);
}

.model-glyph {
  display: inline-flex;
  width: 42px;
  height: 42px;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: center;
  border: 1px solid color-mix(in srgb, var(--ras-accent) 38%, var(--ras-border));
  border-radius: 8px;
  background: color-mix(in srgb, var(--ras-accent) 12%, var(--ras-panel));
  color: var(--ras-accent);
}

.model-health-pill {
  border: 1px solid var(--ras-border);
  border-radius: 999px;
  color: var(--ras-muted);
  font-size: .78rem;
  font-weight: 900;
  padding: .3rem .62rem;
  white-space: nowrap;
}

.model-health-pill.is-healthy {
  border-color: color-mix(in srgb, var(--ras-safe) 44%, var(--ras-border));
  color: var(--ras-safe);
}

.model-health-pill.is-unhealthy {
  border-color: color-mix(in srgb, var(--ras-warn) 44%, var(--ras-border));
  color: var(--ras-warn);
}

.model-truth-grid {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: repeat(2, minmax(0, 1fr));
  gap: .7rem;
  margin-top: 1rem;
}

.model-truth-grid > div,
.runtime-option,
.hardware-profile {
  border: 1px solid color-mix(in srgb, var(--ras-border) 76%, transparent);
  border-radius: 8px;
  background: color-mix(in srgb, var(--ras-panel-2) 52%, transparent);
  padding: .75rem;
}

.model-truth-grid span,
.model-discovery-list > span,
.hardware-profile span {
  display: block;
  color: var(--ras-muted);
  font-size: .76rem;
  font-weight: 850;
  text-transform: uppercase;
}

.model-truth-grid strong {
  display: block;
  margin-top: .15rem;
  min-width: 0;
  overflow-wrap: anywhere;
}

.model-warning {
  display: flex;
  align-items: flex-start;
  gap: .5rem;
  border: 1px solid color-mix(in srgb, var(--ras-warn) 44%, var(--ras-border));
  border-radius: 8px;
  background: color-mix(in srgb, var(--ras-warn) 10%, var(--ras-panel));
  color: var(--ras-text);
  margin-top: .85rem;
  padding: .7rem;
}

.model-discovery-list {
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: .45rem;
  flex-wrap: wrap;
  margin-top: .85rem;
}

.model-discovery-list code {
  border: 1px solid color-mix(in srgb, var(--ras-blue) 36%, var(--ras-border));
  border-radius: 999px;
  background: color-mix(in srgb, var(--ras-blue) 10%, var(--ras-panel));
  color: var(--ras-blue);
  padding: .18rem .46rem;
}

.model-action-row {
  justify-content: flex-start;
  margin-top: 1rem;
}

.model-health-card {
  display: grid;
  align-content: start;
  gap: .85rem;
}

.safety-stack {
  display: grid;
  gap: .45rem;
}

.safety-stack span {
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: .45rem;
  color: var(--ras-muted);
  font-weight: 700;
}

.model-builder-panel,
.model-catalog-panel,
.advanced-model-registry {
  max-width: 1260px;
  margin-top: 1rem;
}

.model-catalog-panel {
  background:
    linear-gradient(135deg, color-mix(in srgb, var(--ras-panel) 92%, var(--ras-accent) 8%), var(--ras-panel));
}

.model-catalog-head,
.model-catalog-actions,
.model-catalog-meta {
  display: flex;
  gap: .75rem;
  align-items: flex-start;
  justify-content: space-between;
}

.model-catalog-head h2,
.model-catalog-detail h3 {
  margin: 0;
  letter-spacing: 0;
}

.model-catalog-head p,
.model-catalog-detail p,
.model-catalog-note {
  margin: .25rem 0 0;
  color: var(--ras-muted);
}

.model-catalog-note-list {
  display: grid;
  gap: .35rem;
  margin: .15rem 0 0;
  padding-left: 1.1rem;
  color: var(--ras-muted);
  font-size: .84rem;
}

.model-catalog-note-list li::marker {
  color: var(--ras-accent);
}

.model-catalog-actions,
.model-catalog-meta {
  flex-wrap: wrap;
  justify-content: flex-end;
}

.model-catalog-meta {
  margin-top: .85rem;
  justify-content: flex-start;
}

.model-catalog-meta span,
.model-catalog-meta strong {
  display: inline-flex;
  min-height: 28px;
  align-items: center;
  border: 1px solid color-mix(in srgb, var(--ras-border) 75%, transparent);
  border-radius: 999px;
  padding: .24rem .65rem;
  background: color-mix(in srgb, var(--ras-panel-2) 54%, transparent);
  color: var(--ras-muted);
  font-size: .78rem;
  font-weight: 850;
}

.model-catalog-meta strong {
  border-color: color-mix(in srgb, var(--ras-danger) 40%, var(--ras-border));
  color: var(--ras-danger);
}

.model-catalog-layout {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: minmax(190px, 230px) minmax(0, 1fr) minmax(260px, 320px);
  gap: .85rem;
  margin-top: 1rem;
}

.model-catalog-filters,
.model-catalog-detail {
  display: grid;
  align-content: start;
  gap: .75rem;
  min-width: 0;
  border: 1px solid color-mix(in srgb, var(--ras-border) 74%, transparent);
  border-radius: 8px;
  background: color-mix(in srgb, var(--ras-panel-2) 48%, transparent);
  padding: .85rem;
}

.model-catalog-filters label {
  display: grid;
  gap: .3rem;
  color: var(--ras-muted);
  font-size: .78rem;
  font-weight: 850;
  text-transform: uppercase;
}

.model-catalog-filters input,
.model-catalog-filters select {
  min-height: 40px;
  border: 1px solid var(--ras-border);
  border-radius: 8px;
  background: var(--ras-input-bg);
  color: var(--ras-text);
  padding: .45rem .65rem;
  text-transform: none;
}

.model-catalog-list {
  display: grid;
  align-content: start;
  gap: .55rem;
  min-width: 0;
  max-height: min(58vh, 620px);
  overflow: auto;
  padding-right: .15rem;
}

.model-catalog-row {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: minmax(0, 1fr) auto;
  gap: .75rem;
  align-items: center;
  width: 100%;
  min-height: 72px;
  border: 1px solid color-mix(in srgb, var(--ras-border) 72%, transparent);
  border-radius: 8px;
  background: color-mix(in srgb, var(--ras-panel-2) 36%, transparent);
  color: var(--ras-text);
  padding: .75rem;
  text-align: left;
}

.model-catalog-row:hover,
.model-catalog-row:focus-visible,
.model-catalog-row.is-selected {
  border-color: color-mix(in srgb, var(--ras-accent) 50%, var(--ras-border));
  background: color-mix(in srgb, var(--ras-accent) 10%, var(--ras-panel));
}

.model-catalog-row span:first-child,
.model-catalog-detail-grid dd {
  min-width: 0;
  overflow-wrap: anywhere;
}

.model-catalog-row strong,
.model-catalog-row small {
  display: block;
}

.model-catalog-row small,
.model-catalog-row-meta em {
  color: var(--ras-muted);
  font-size: .78rem;
  font-style: normal;
}

.model-catalog-row-meta {
  display: flex;
  flex-wrap: wrap;
  justify-content: flex-end;
  gap: .35rem;
}

.model-catalog-row-meta em,
.model-catalog-capabilities span {
  border: 1px solid color-mix(in srgb, var(--ras-blue) 30%, var(--ras-border));
  border-radius: 999px;
  background: color-mix(in srgb, var(--ras-blue) 8%, transparent);
  padding: .16rem .45rem;
}

.model-catalog-detail-grid {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: auto minmax(0, 1fr);
  gap: .45rem .75rem;
  margin: 0;
}

.model-catalog-detail-grid dt {
  color: var(--ras-muted);
  font-size: .75rem;
  font-weight: 900;
  text-transform: uppercase;
}

.model-catalog-detail-grid dd {
  margin: 0;
  color: var(--ras-text);
  font-weight: 750;
}

.model-catalog-capabilities {
  display: flex;
  flex-wrap: wrap;
  gap: .35rem;
}

.model-catalog-capabilities span {
  color: var(--ras-muted);
  font-size: .78rem;
  font-weight: 800;
}

.model-catalog-empty {
  border: 1px dashed var(--ras-border);
  border-radius: 8px;
  color: var(--ras-muted);
  padding: 1rem;
}

.local-model-form {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: repeat(4, minmax(0, 1fr));
  gap: .85rem;
  margin-top: 1rem;
}

.local-model-form label {
  min-width: 0;
  display: grid;
  gap: .28rem;
}

.local-model-form label span {
  color: var(--ras-muted);
  font-size: .78rem;
  font-weight: 850;
  text-transform: uppercase;
}

.local-model-form input,
.local-model-form select {
  min-width: 0;
  min-height: 40px;
  border: 1px solid var(--ras-border);
  border-radius: 8px;
  background: var(--ras-panel);
  color: var(--ras-text);
  padding: 0 .7rem;
}

.local-model-notes {
  grid-column: span 2;
}

.local-model-actions {
  grid-column: 1 / -1;
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  flex-wrap: wrap;
  gap: .75rem;
}

.local-model-actions small {
  color: var(--ras-muted);
}

.api-provider-grid {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(190px, 1fr));
  gap: .75rem;
  margin-top: 1rem;
}

.deployment-layout {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: minmax(0, 1fr) minmax(280px, .85fr);
  gap: .9rem;
  margin-top: 1rem;
}

.deployment-column h3 {
  margin: 0 0 .55rem;
}

.runtime-option-grid,
.hardware-profile-grid,
.registry-grid {
  display: grid;
  gap: .65rem;
}

.hardware-profile-grid {
  grid-template-columns: repeat(2, minmax(0, 1fr));
}

.runtime-option strong,
.hardware-profile strong {
  display: block;
}

.runtime-option small,
.hardware-profile small {
  color: var(--ras-muted);
}

.deployment-steps {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: repeat(5, minmax(0, 1fr));
  gap: .6rem;
  list-style: none;
  margin: 1rem 0 0;
  padding: 0;
}

.deployment-steps li {
  position: relative;
  border: 1px solid color-mix(in srgb, var(--ras-accent) 24%, var(--ras-border));
  border-radius: 8px;
  background: color-mix(in srgb, var(--ras-accent) 7%, var(--ras-panel));
  padding: .75rem;
}

.deployment-steps span {
  display: block;
  color: var(--ras-accent);
  font-weight: 900;
}

.deployment-steps p {
  margin: .3rem 0 0;
  color: var(--ras-muted);
  font-size: .9rem;
}

.advanced-model-registry {
  padding: .85rem;
}

.advanced-model-registry summary {
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: .45rem;
  color: var(--ras-accent);
  cursor: pointer;
  font-weight: 900;
}

.advanced-model-body {
  display: grid;
  gap: .85rem;
  margin-top: .85rem;
}

.testing-mode-control {
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: space-between;
  gap: .65rem;
  border: 1px solid var(--ras-border);
  border-radius: 8px;
  background: color-mix(in srgb, var(--ras-panel-2) 50%, transparent);
  padding: .75rem;
}

.testing-mode-label {
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: .65rem;
  margin: 0;
}

.testing-mode-control input {
  flex: 0 0 auto;
  width: 1.2rem;
  height: 1.2rem;
  accent-color: var(--ras-accent);
}

.testing-mode-control small {
  display: block;
  color: var(--ras-muted);
}

.registry-row {
  border: 1px solid var(--ras-border);
  border-radius: 8px;
  background: color-mix(in srgb, var(--ras-panel-2) 44%, transparent);
  padding: .78rem;
}

.workspace-entry {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: minmax(0, 1fr) auto;
  align-items: center;
  gap: .625rem;
  background: var(--ras-panel);
  color: var(--ras-text);
}

.entry-name {
  min-width: 0;
  padding: 0;
  overflow-wrap: anywhere;
  text-decoration: none;
}

.breadcrumb-line {
  margin: .75rem 0;
  color: var(--ras-muted);
  font-size: .875rem;
}

.inline-form {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: minmax(0, 1fr) auto;
  gap: .625rem;
}

.theme-card {
  width: 100%;
  min-height: 72px;
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: center;
  gap: .625rem;
  border-radius: 8px;
  font-weight: 800;
}

.theme-card span {
  min-width: 0;
  display: grid;
  gap: .1rem;
  text-align: left;
}

.theme-card strong,
.theme-card small {
  min-width: 0;
  overflow-wrap: anywhere;
}

.theme-card small {
  color: currentColor;
  opacity: .74;
  font-size: .78rem;
  font-weight: 650;
}

.settings-save-strip,
.safety-state-note,
.output-folder-row,
.chat-folder-create div,
.session-folder-control {
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: .65rem;
}

.settings-save-strip {
  justify-content: space-between;
  border: 1px solid var(--ras-border);
  border-radius: 8px;
  background: color-mix(in srgb, var(--ras-panel) 78%, transparent);
  margin-bottom: 1rem;
  padding: .85rem;
}

.settings-save-strip.is-dirty {
  border-color: color-mix(in srgb, var(--ras-warn) 48%, var(--ras-border));
  background: color-mix(in srgb, var(--ras-warn) 9%, var(--ras-panel));
}

.settings-save-strip strong,
.settings-save-strip span {
  display: block;
}

.settings-save-strip span,
.safety-card p,
.settings-inline-status {
  color: var(--ras-muted);
}

.safety-switch-list {
  display: grid;
  gap: .55rem;
}

.safety-switch {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: minmax(0, 1fr) auto auto;
  align-items: center;
  gap: .7rem;
  border: 1px solid var(--ras-border);
  border-radius: 8px;
  background: color-mix(in srgb, var(--ras-panel-2) 42%, transparent);
  padding: .7rem;
}

.safety-switch.is-on {
  border-color: color-mix(in srgb, var(--ras-safe) 36%, var(--ras-border));
}

.safety-switch span {
  display: grid;
  gap: .12rem;
  min-width: 0;
}

.safety-switch strong {
  line-height: 1.15;
}

.safety-switch small {
  color: var(--ras-muted);
  line-height: 1.3;
}

.safety-switch input {
  width: 2.75rem;
  height: 1.5rem;
  accent-color: var(--ras-accent);
  cursor: pointer;
}

.safety-switch em {
  min-width: 28px;
  color: var(--ras-muted);
  font-size: .78rem;
  font-style: normal;
  font-weight: 900;
  text-align: right;
}

.safety-state-note {
  min-height: 40px;
  border: 1px solid var(--ras-border);
  border-radius: 8px;
  background: color-mix(in srgb, var(--ras-panel-2) 38%, transparent);
  padding: .55rem .65rem;
}

.output-folder-row {
  align-items: stretch;
}

.output-folder-row .form-control {
  min-width: 0;
}

.output-folder-row .btn {
  display: inline-flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: .4rem;
  white-space: nowrap;
}

.chat-folder-create {
  display: grid;
  gap: .4rem;
  margin: 1rem 0;
}

.chat-folder-create div {
  align-items: stretch;
}

.chat-folder-list {
  display: grid;
  gap: .45rem;
}

.chat-folder-list button {
  min-height: 40px;
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: space-between;
  gap: .6rem;
  border: 1px solid var(--ras-border);
  border-radius: 8px;
  background: color-mix(in srgb, var(--ras-panel-2) 38%, transparent);
  color: var(--ras-text);
  cursor: pointer;
  padding: 0 .7rem;
  text-align: left;
}

.chat-folder-list button:hover,
.chat-folder-list button.is-active {
  border-color: color-mix(in srgb, var(--ras-accent) 46%, var(--ras-border));
  background: color-mix(in srgb, var(--ras-accent) 9%, var(--ras-panel));
}

.chat-folder-list small {
  color: var(--ras-muted);
  font-weight: 900;
}

.session-list-item {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: minmax(0, 1fr) minmax(120px, 170px);
  gap: .6rem;
  align-items: center;
}

.session-open-button {
  min-width: 0;
  display: grid;
  gap: .1rem;
  border: 0;
  background: transparent;
  color: var(--ras-text);
  cursor: pointer;
  padding: 0;
  text-align: left;
}

.session-open-button strong,
.session-open-button small {
  min-width: 0;
  overflow: hidden;
  text-overflow: ellipsis;
  white-space: nowrap;
}

.session-open-button small {
  color: var(--ras-muted);
}

.session-folder-control {
  max-width: 360px;
}

.session-folder-control label {
  margin: 0;
  color: var(--ras-muted);
  font-weight: 800;
}

.advanced-block {
  padding: 1rem;
}

.advanced-block summary {
  cursor: pointer;
  color: var(--ras-accent);
  font-weight: 800;
}

.log-box {
  width: 100%;
  min-height: 160px;
  margin: 0;
  overflow: auto;
  border: 1px solid var(--ras-border);
  border-radius: 8px;
  background: #101620;
  color: #e8eef6;
  padding: .875rem;
}

.audit-log {
  flex: 1;
  margin: 1.125rem;
}

.message-result {
  white-space: pre-wrap;
}

.workspace-breadcrumb {
  display: inline-flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: .3rem;
  flex-wrap: wrap;
  margin-top: .2rem;
  color: var(--ras-muted);
  font-size: .86rem;
}

.workspace-breadcrumb button {
  border: 0;
  background: transparent;
  color: var(--ras-accent);
  cursor: pointer;
  min-height: 32px;
  border-radius: 7px;
  padding: .25rem .38rem;
  font-weight: 800;
}

.workspace-search {
  display: block;
  margin-bottom: .75rem;
}

.workspace-search input {
  width: 100%;
  min-height: 38px;
  border: 1px solid var(--ras-border);
  border-radius: 8px;
  background: color-mix(in srgb, var(--ras-panel-2) 28%, transparent);
  color: var(--ras-text);
  padding: 0 .7rem;
}

.task-drawer-layer {
  position: fixed;
  inset: 0;
  z-index: 1090;
  pointer-events: none;
}

.task-drawer-backdrop {
  position: absolute;
  inset: 0;
  border: 0;
  background: rgba(0, 0, 0, .36);
  pointer-events: auto;
}

.task-details-drawer {
  position: absolute;
  inset: 0 0 0 auto;
  width: min(720px, calc(100vw - 1.5rem));
  display: grid;
  grid-template-rows: auto auto minmax(0, 1fr);
  border-left: 1px solid color-mix(in srgb, var(--ras-accent) 36%, var(--ras-border));
  background:
    linear-gradient(180deg, color-mix(in srgb, var(--ras-accent) 8%, transparent), transparent 240px),
    var(--ras-canvas);
  color: var(--ras-text);
  box-shadow: -18px 0 42px rgba(0, 0, 0, .26);
  pointer-events: auto;
}

.task-details-header {
  display: flex;
  align-items: flex-start;
  justify-content: space-between;
  gap: 1rem;
  border-bottom: 1px solid var(--ras-border);
  padding: 1rem;
}

.task-details-header h1 {
  max-width: 560px;
  margin: 0;
  font-size: clamp(1.2rem, 2.4vw, 1.65rem);
  line-height: 1.15;
  overflow-wrap: anywhere;
}

.task-details-header p {
  margin: .35rem 0 0;
  color: var(--ras-muted);
  overflow-wrap: anywhere;
}

.task-details-actions {
  display: flex;
  gap: .45rem;
}

.drawer-error,
.drawer-loading {
  margin: .75rem 1rem 0;
  border: 1px solid var(--ras-border);
  border-radius: 8px;
  background: var(--ras-panel);
  padding: .65rem .75rem;
}

.drawer-error {
  color: var(--ras-danger);
}

.task-details-tabs {
  display: flex;
  gap: .45rem;
  overflow-x: auto;
  border-bottom: 1px solid var(--ras-border);
  padding: .75rem 1rem;
}

.task-detail-tab {
  flex: 0 0 auto;
  min-height: 34px;
  border: 1px solid var(--ras-border);
  border-radius: 8px;
  background: color-mix(in srgb, var(--ras-panel) 74%, transparent);
  color: var(--ras-muted);
  cursor: pointer;
  padding: 0 .72rem;
  font-size: .84rem;
  font-weight: 800;
}

.task-detail-tab.is-active {
  border-color: color-mix(in srgb, var(--ras-accent) 56%, var(--ras-border));
  background: color-mix(in srgb, var(--ras-accent) 10%, var(--ras-panel));
  color: var(--ras-accent);
}

.task-details-body {
  min-height: 0;
  overflow: auto;
  padding: 1rem;
}

.task-detail-grid {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: repeat(2, minmax(0, 1fr));
  gap: .65rem;
}

.task-detail-metric,
.context-block,
.output-card,
.subagent-card,
.tool-call-card,
.detail-approval-card,
.drawer-result-block {
  border: 1px solid var(--ras-border);
  border-radius: 8px;
  background: color-mix(in srgb, var(--ras-panel) 78%, transparent);
  padding: .8rem;
}

.task-detail-metric {
  display: grid;
  gap: .25rem;
}

.task-detail-metric span,
.empty-inline,
.trace-timeline span,
.subagent-card small {
  color: var(--ras-muted);
  font-size: .82rem;
}

.task-detail-metric strong {
  min-width: 0;
  overflow-wrap: anywhere;
}

.drawer-control-row,
.output-stack,
.context-stack,
.subagent-stack,
.approval-tool-stack {
  display: grid;
  gap: .75rem;
  margin-top: .85rem;
}

.drawer-control-row {
  display: flex;
  flex-wrap: wrap;
}

.drawer-result-block {
  margin-top: .85rem;
}

.drawer-result-block h2,
.context-block h2,
.output-card h2,
.tool-call-card h2,
.detail-approval-card h2 {
  margin: 0 0 .45rem;
  font-size: 1rem;
}

.context-block ul {
  display: grid;
  gap: .5rem;
  list-style: none;
  margin: 0;
  padding: 0;
}

.context-block li {
  display: grid;
  gap: .15rem;
  border-top: 1px solid var(--ras-border);
  padding-top: .45rem;
}

.context-block li:first-child {
  border-top: 0;
  padding-top: 0;
}

.context-budget-card .section-row {
  align-items: flex-start;
  gap: .75rem;
}

.context-budget-card .section-row p {
  margin: .15rem 0 0;
  color: var(--ras-muted);
  font-size: .82rem;
}

.context-budget-sections {
  margin-top: .75rem !important;
}

.context-budget-sections span {
  color: var(--ras-muted);
  font-size: .8rem;
}

.trace-timeline {
  display: grid;
  gap: .7rem;
  margin: 0;
  padding: 0;
  list-style: none;
}

.trace-timeline li {
  position: relative;
  display: grid;
  gap: .2rem;
  border-left: 2px solid color-mix(in srgb, var(--ras-accent) 42%, var(--ras-border));
  border-radius: 0 8px 8px 0;
  background: color-mix(in srgb, var(--ras-panel) 72%, transparent);
  padding: .65rem .8rem;
}

.trace-timeline p,
.detail-approval-card p {
  margin: 0;
  color: var(--ras-muted);
  overflow-wrap: anywhere;
}

.output-card .markdown-body {
  margin-top: .75rem;
}

.subagent-card {
  width: 100%;
  display: grid;
  gap: .35rem;
  color: var(--ras-text);
  cursor: pointer;
  text-align: left;
}

.subagent-card:hover {
  border-color: color-mix(in srgb, var(--ras-accent) 52%, var(--ras-border));
}

button.helper-row {
  width: 100%;
  border: 0;
  border-radius: 8px;
  background: transparent;
  cursor: pointer;
  text-align: left;
  padding: .35rem;
}

button.helper-row:hover {
  background: color-mix(in srgb, var(--ras-accent) 8%, transparent);
}

.approval-detail-grid dd {
  overflow-wrap: anywhere;
}

.approval-raw-detail {
  margin-top: .75rem;
  padding: .75rem;
}

.runtime-steps {
  display: flex;
  gap: .45rem;
  flex-wrap: wrap;
}

.mini-stats {
  max-width: 1180px;
}

.form-control,
.form-select {
  border-color: var(--ras-border);
  border-radius: 8px;
  background-color: var(--ras-panel);
  color: var(--ras-text);
}

.btn {
  border-radius: 8px;
}

.btn-primary {
  --bs-btn-bg: var(--ras-accent);
  --bs-btn-border-color: var(--ras-accent);
  --bs-btn-hover-bg: color-mix(in srgb, var(--ras-accent) 86%, #000);
  --bs-btn-hover-border-color: color-mix(in srgb, var(--ras-accent) 86%, #000);
}

.preview-loading,
.preview-disabled {
  min-height: 100dvh;
  display: grid;
  place-items: center;
  background:
    radial-gradient(circle at 20% 10%, color-mix(in srgb, var(--ras-accent) 14%, transparent), transparent 34%),
    var(--ras-bg);
  color: var(--ras-text);
  padding: 2rem;
}

.preview-disabled {
  align-content: center;
  gap: .75rem;
  text-align: center;
}

.preview-body {
  overflow: auto;
}

.preview-root {
  min-height: 100dvh;
  display: grid;
  grid-template-rows: auto 1fr auto;
  gap: 1rem;
  background:
    linear-gradient(180deg, color-mix(in srgb, var(--ras-bg) 82%, #000 18%), var(--ras-bg)),
    var(--ras-bg);
  color: var(--ras-text);
  padding: clamp(.75rem, 2vw, 1.25rem);
}

.preview-root button,
.preview-root select,
.preview-root textarea {
  font: inherit;
}

.preview-root button:focus-visible,
.preview-root select:focus-visible,
.preview-root textarea:focus-visible {
  outline: 3px solid var(--ras-focus);
  outline-offset: 2px;
}

.preview-controller {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: minmax(240px, 1fr) repeat(4, minmax(132px, 180px)) auto;
  gap: .75rem;
  align-items: end;
  border: 1px solid var(--ras-border);
  border-radius: 14px;
  background: color-mix(in srgb, var(--ras-panel) 92%, transparent);
  box-shadow: var(--ras-shadow);
  padding: .9rem;
}

.preview-controller h1,
.preview-controller p {
  margin: 0;
}

.preview-controller h1 {
  font-family: var(--ras-heading-font);
  font-size: clamp(1.45rem, 2.6vw, 2.1rem);
  line-height: 1;
}

.preview-controller p {
  max-width: 68ch;
  color: var(--ras-muted);
  font-size: .9rem;
}

.preview-kicker {
  color: var(--ras-accent-2);
  font-family: var(--ras-heading-font);
  font-size: .78rem;
  font-weight: 800;
  letter-spacing: .08em;
  text-transform: uppercase;
}

.preview-controller label {
  display: grid;
  gap: .3rem;
  color: var(--ras-muted);
  font-size: .74rem;
  font-weight: 800;
  text-transform: uppercase;
}

.preview-controller select,
.preview-toggle {
  min-height: 40px;
  border: 1px solid var(--ras-border);
  border-radius: 10px;
  background: var(--ras-panel-2);
  color: var(--ras-text);
  padding: 0 .7rem;
}

.preview-toggle {
  cursor: pointer;
  font-weight: 800;
}

.preview-toggle:hover,
.preview-controller select:hover {
  border-color: color-mix(in srgb, var(--ras-accent) 44%, var(--ras-border));
}

.preview-stage-shell {
  width: 100%;
  overflow: auto;
  border: 1px solid var(--ras-border);
  border-radius: 16px;
  background:
    linear-gradient(90deg, color-mix(in srgb, var(--ras-accent) 7%, transparent) 1px, transparent 1px),
    linear-gradient(0deg, color-mix(in srgb, var(--ras-blue) 5%, transparent) 1px, transparent 1px),
    color-mix(in srgb, var(--ras-canvas) 96%, transparent);
  background-size: 40px 40px;
  box-shadow: var(--ras-shadow);
  padding: 1rem;
}

.preview-stage {
  width: min(100%, var(--preview-width));
  min-height: min(740px, calc(100dvh - 220px));
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: minmax(220px, 260px) minmax(0, 1fr);
  margin: 0 auto;
  overflow: hidden;
  border: 1px solid var(--ras-border);
  border-radius: 14px;
  background: var(--ras-canvas);
}

.preview-sidebar {
  min-width: 0;
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  gap: .75rem;
  overflow: hidden;
  border-right: 1px solid color-mix(in srgb, var(--ras-sidebar-text) 10%, transparent);
  background:
    linear-gradient(180deg, color-mix(in srgb, var(--ras-sidebar-active-border) 10%, transparent), transparent 34%),
    var(--ras-sidebar-bg);
  color: var(--ras-sidebar-text);
  padding: .8rem;
}

.preview-brand {
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: .65rem;
}

.preview-brand > span {
  width: 38px;
  height: 38px;
  display: grid;
  place-items: center;
  border: 1px solid color-mix(in srgb, var(--ras-sidebar-active-border) 48%, transparent);
  border-radius: 10px;
  background: var(--ras-sidebar-active-bg);
  color: var(--ras-sidebar-text);
  font-family: var(--ras-heading-font);
  font-size: 1.25rem;
  font-weight: 900;
}

.preview-brand strong,
.preview-brand small {
  display: block;
}

.preview-brand small {
  color: var(--ras-sidebar-muted);
  font-size: .74rem;
}

.preview-new-chat,
.preview-sidebar nav button,
.preview-chat-list article,
.preview-sidebar footer {
  border: 1px solid color-mix(in srgb, var(--ras-sidebar-text) 10%, transparent);
  border-radius: 10px;
  background: color-mix(in srgb, var(--ras-sidebar-bg-soft) 78%, transparent);
  color: var(--ras-sidebar-text);
}

.preview-new-chat {
  min-height: 42px;
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: center;
  gap: .5rem;
  cursor: pointer;
  font-weight: 850;
}

.preview-sidebar nav {
  display: grid;
  gap: .3rem;
}

.preview-sidebar nav button {
  min-height: 38px;
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: .55rem;
  cursor: pointer;
  padding: 0 .65rem;
  text-align: left;
}

.preview-sidebar nav button:hover,
.preview-sidebar nav button.is-active {
  border-color: color-mix(in srgb, var(--ras-sidebar-active-border) 44%, transparent);
  background: var(--ras-sidebar-active-bg);
}

.preview-chat-list {
  min-height: 0;
  display: grid;
  align-content: start;
  gap: .45rem;
  overflow: auto;
}

.preview-chat-list header {
  display: flex;
  justify-content: space-between;
  color: var(--ras-sidebar-muted);
  font-size: .75rem;
  font-weight: 850;
  letter-spacing: .05em;
  text-transform: uppercase;
}

.preview-chat-list article {
  display: grid;
  gap: .12rem;
  padding: .55rem;
}

.preview-chat-list span,
.preview-chat-list small {
  overflow: hidden;
  color: var(--ras-sidebar-muted);
  font-size: .75rem;
  text-overflow: ellipsis;
  white-space: nowrap;
}

.preview-sidebar footer {
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: .45rem;
  margin-top: auto;
  color: var(--ras-sidebar-muted);
  padding: .55rem;
}

.preview-canvas {
  min-width: 0;
  display: grid;
  grid-template-rows: auto 1fr;
  overflow: hidden;
  background: var(--ras-canvas);
}

.preview-header {
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: space-between;
  gap: 1rem;
  border-bottom: 1px solid var(--ras-border);
  background: color-mix(in srgb, var(--ras-panel) 88%, transparent);
  padding: .9rem 1rem;
}

.preview-header h2 {
  margin: 0;
  font-family: var(--ras-heading-font);
  font-size: 1.55rem;
  line-height: 1;
}

.preview-status-row {
  display: flex;
  flex-wrap: wrap;
  gap: .45rem;
  justify-content: flex-end;
}

.preview-status-row span,
.preview-runbar button,
.preview-state,
.preview-form-grid span,
.preview-theme-grid span {
  display: inline-flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: .35rem;
  border: 1px solid var(--ras-border);
  border-radius: 999px;
  background: color-mix(in srgb, var(--ras-panel-2) 84%, transparent);
  color: var(--ras-text);
  padding: .32rem .55rem;
  font-size: .78rem;
  font-weight: 800;
}

.preview-home {
  min-height: 0;
  display: grid;
  grid-template-rows: 1fr auto;
  gap: 1rem;
  padding: 1rem;
}

.preview-thread {
  display: grid;
  align-content: center;
  gap: .7rem;
  max-width: 820px;
  width: 100%;
  margin: 0 auto;
}

.preview-message {
  max-width: 76%;
  border: 1px solid var(--ras-border);
  border-radius: 14px;
  background: var(--ras-panel);
  padding: .85rem 1rem;
}

.preview-message.user {
  justify-self: end;
  background: color-mix(in srgb, var(--ras-accent) 12%, var(--ras-panel));
}

.preview-message.assistant p {
  margin: .35rem 0 0;
  color: var(--ras-muted);
}

.preview-composer {
  display: grid;
  gap: .6rem;
  max-width: 900px;
  width: 100%;
  margin: 0 auto;
  border: 1px solid var(--ras-border);
  border-radius: 16px;
  background: color-mix(in srgb, var(--ras-panel) 94%, transparent);
  padding: .75rem;
}

.preview-composer textarea {
  width: 100%;
  min-height: 86px;
  resize: vertical;
  border: 0;
  outline: 0;
  background: transparent;
  color: var(--ras-text);
}

.preview-runbar {
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: .5rem;
  flex-wrap: wrap;
}

.preview-runbar button {
  cursor: pointer;
  border-radius: 10px;
}

.preview-runbar .preview-send {
  margin-left: auto;
  border-color: color-mix(in srgb, var(--ras-accent) 58%, var(--ras-border));
  background: var(--ras-accent);
  color: #fff;
}

.preview-run-config {
  flex: 1 1 280px;
  justify-content: space-between;
}

.preview-workspace,
.preview-activity,
.preview-models,
.preview-warsat,
.preview-settings,
.preview-panels {
  min-height: 0;
  overflow: auto;
  padding: 1rem;
}

.preview-workspace {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: minmax(170px, .8fr) minmax(300px, 1.5fr) minmax(220px, 1fr);
  gap: .75rem;
}

.preview-pane,
.preview-activity article,
.preview-models article,
.preview-warsat section,
.preview-settings section,
.preview-panels section {
  min-width: 0;
  border: 1px solid var(--ras-border);
  border-radius: 14px;
  background: color-mix(in srgb, var(--ras-panel) 92%, transparent);
  padding: .9rem;
}

.preview-pane h3,
.preview-warsat h3,
.preview-settings h3,
.preview-panels h3 {
  margin: 0 0 .7rem;
  font-family: var(--ras-heading-font);
}

.preview-pane.roots {
  display: grid;
  align-content: start;
  gap: .45rem;
}

.preview-pane.roots button,
.preview-panels button,
.preview-settings nav button,
.preview-warsat button {
  min-height: 40px;
  border: 1px solid var(--ras-border);
  border-radius: 10px;
  background: var(--ras-panel-2);
  color: var(--ras-text);
  cursor: pointer;
  padding: .45rem .65rem;
  text-align: left;
}

.preview-pane.roots button {
  display: flex;
  justify-content: space-between;
}

.preview-search,
.preview-pane.files article,
.preview-models article,
.preview-panels button,
.preview-panels article {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: auto minmax(0, 1fr) auto auto;
  align-items: center;
  gap: .55rem;
  border-bottom: 1px solid var(--ras-border);
  padding: .62rem 0;
}

.preview-search {
  border: 1px solid var(--ras-border);
  border-radius: 10px;
  background: var(--ras-panel-2);
  padding: .55rem .65rem;
}

.preview-pane.files article:last-child,
.preview-models article:last-child {
  border-bottom: 0;
}

.preview-pane.preview p,
.preview-warsat p,
.preview-settings p {
  margin: 0;
  color: var(--ras-muted);
}

.preview-activity,
.preview-models,
.preview-warsat,
.preview-panels {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: repeat(3, minmax(0, 1fr));
  align-content: start;
  gap: .8rem;
}

.preview-activity article {
  display: grid;
  gap: .55rem;
}

.preview-activity article p {
  margin: 0;
  color: var(--ras-muted);
}

.preview-activity article div {
  height: 8px;
  overflow: hidden;
  border-radius: 999px;
  background: var(--ras-panel-2);
}

.preview-activity article div span {
  display: block;
  height: 100%;
  border-radius: inherit;
  background: linear-gradient(90deg, var(--ras-accent), var(--ras-accent-2));
}

.preview-activity article button {
  border: 1px solid var(--ras-border);
  border-radius: 10px;
  background: var(--ras-panel-2);
  color: var(--ras-text);
  cursor: pointer;
  padding: .45rem .65rem;
}

.state-running {
  color: var(--ras-safe);
}

.state-paused {
  color: var(--ras-warn);
}

.state-done {
  color: var(--ras-blue);
}

.preview-models article {
  grid-template-columns: auto minmax(0, 1fr) auto;
  border-bottom: 0;
}

.preview-models strong,
.preview-models span {
  display: block;
  overflow: hidden;
  text-overflow: ellipsis;
  white-space: nowrap;
}

.preview-models span {
  color: var(--ras-muted);
}

.preview-warsat {
  grid-template-columns: minmax(0, 1fr) minmax(0, 1fr);
}

.preview-form-grid {
  display: flex;
  gap: .45rem;
  flex-wrap: wrap;
}

.preview-settings {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: minmax(180px, 240px) minmax(0, 1fr);
  gap: .8rem;
}

.preview-settings nav {
  display: grid;
  align-content: start;
  gap: .35rem;
}

.preview-settings nav button.is-active {
  border-color: color-mix(in srgb, var(--ras-accent) 54%, var(--ras-border));
  background: color-mix(in srgb, var(--ras-accent) 12%, var(--ras-panel));
}

.preview-theme-grid {
  display: flex;
  gap: .45rem;
  flex-wrap: wrap;
  margin-top: .8rem;
}

.preview-panels section {
  display: grid;
  align-content: start;
  gap: .45rem;
}

.preview-panels button,
.preview-panels article {
  grid-template-columns: minmax(0, 1fr) auto;
  border: 1px solid var(--ras-border);
  border-radius: 10px;
  background: var(--ras-panel-2);
  padding: .55rem .65rem;
}

.preview-a11y {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: minmax(220px, .8fr) repeat(5, minmax(180px, 1fr));
  gap: .6rem;
  border: 1px solid var(--ras-border);
  border-radius: 14px;
  background: color-mix(in srgb, var(--ras-panel) 92%, transparent);
  padding: .8rem;
}

.preview-a11y p {
  display: flex;
  align-items: flex-start;
  gap: .4rem;
  margin: 0;
  color: var(--ras-muted);
  font-size: .82rem;
}

.preview-warmind-console .preview-stage {
  border-color: color-mix(in srgb, var(--ras-accent) 42%, var(--ras-border));
}

.preview-warmind-console .preview-canvas {
  background:
    linear-gradient(135deg, color-mix(in srgb, var(--ras-accent) 7%, transparent), transparent 45%),
    var(--ras-canvas);
}

.preview-operator-desk .preview-stage {
  border-radius: 10px;
}

.preview-operator-desk .preview-sidebar,
.preview-operator-desk .preview-pane,
.preview-operator-desk .preview-composer,
.preview-operator-desk .preview-activity article,
.preview-operator-desk .preview-models article,
.preview-operator-desk .preview-warsat section,
.preview-operator-desk .preview-settings section,
.preview-operator-desk .preview-panels section {
  border-radius: 9px;
}

.preview-archive-studio .preview-thread {
  align-content: start;
  padding-top: 2rem;
}

.preview-archive-studio .preview-message {
  max-width: 88%;
  line-height: 1.55;
}

.preview-layout {
  min-height: min(780px, calc(100dvh - 220px));
  color: var(--ras-text);
}

.preview-layout h2,
.preview-layout h3,
.preview-layout p {
  margin: 0;
}

.preview-layout h2,
.preview-layout h3 {
  font-family: var(--ras-heading-font);
}

.preview-layout button {
  cursor: pointer;
}

.preview-section-header,
.preview-command-header {
  min-width: 0;
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: space-between;
  gap: 1rem;
  border-bottom: 1px solid var(--ras-border);
  background: color-mix(in srgb, var(--ras-panel) 88%, transparent);
  padding: .85rem 1rem;
}

.preview-section-header h2,
.preview-command-header h2 {
  font-size: 1.55rem;
  line-height: 1;
}

.preview-layout-warmind {
  grid-template-columns: 70px minmax(0, 1fr) minmax(220px, 270px);
  background:
    radial-gradient(circle at 50% 8%, color-mix(in srgb, var(--ras-accent) 14%, transparent), transparent 32%),
    var(--ras-canvas);
}

.preview-layout-warmind.preview-layout-no-telemetry {
  grid-template-columns: 70px minmax(0, 1fr);
}

.preview-layout-candidate-workspaces {
  grid-template-columns: 70px minmax(0, 1fr);
  background:
    radial-gradient(circle at 50% 8%, color-mix(in srgb, var(--ras-accent) 12%, transparent), transparent 34%),
    var(--ras-canvas);
}

.preview-command-rail {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-rows: auto 1fr auto;
  justify-items: center;
  gap: .7rem;
  border-right: 1px solid color-mix(in srgb, var(--ras-sidebar-text) 10%, transparent);
  background: var(--ras-sidebar-bg);
  padding: .75rem .55rem;
}

.preview-command-rail nav {
  display: grid;
  align-content: start;
  gap: .45rem;
}

.preview-command-rail button,
.preview-rail-brand {
  width: 42px;
  height: 42px;
  display: grid;
  place-items: center;
  border: 1px solid color-mix(in srgb, var(--ras-sidebar-text) 12%, transparent);
  border-radius: 12px;
  background: color-mix(in srgb, var(--ras-sidebar-bg-soft) 86%, transparent);
  color: var(--ras-sidebar-text);
}

.preview-command-rail button.is-active {
  border-color: color-mix(in srgb, var(--ras-sidebar-active-border) 58%, transparent);
  background: var(--ras-sidebar-active-bg);
}

.preview-rail-brand {
  border-color: color-mix(in srgb, var(--ras-sidebar-active-border) 52%, transparent);
  background: var(--ras-sidebar-active-bg);
  font-family: var(--ras-heading-font);
  font-size: 1.35rem;
  font-weight: 900;
}

.preview-command-main {
  min-width: 0;
  display: grid;
  grid-template-rows: auto 1fr;
  overflow: hidden;
}

.preview-command-content {
  min-height: 0;
  overflow: auto;
  padding: 1rem;
}

.preview-candidate-workspaces-main {
  min-width: 0;
  min-height: 0;
  display: grid;
  grid-template-rows: auto minmax(0, 1fr);
  overflow: hidden;
}

.preview-workspace-candidate-grid {
  min-height: 0;
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: minmax(230px, .72fr) minmax(0, 1.45fr) minmax(230px, .78fr);
  gap: .85rem;
  overflow: auto;
  padding: 1rem;
}

.preview-workspace-root-panel,
.preview-workspace-explorer-panel,
.preview-workspace-detail-panel {
  min-width: 0;
  border: 1px solid var(--ras-border);
  border-radius: 12px;
  background: color-mix(in srgb, var(--ras-panel) 92%, transparent);
  padding: .9rem;
}

.preview-workspace-root-panel,
.preview-workspace-detail-panel {
  display: grid;
  align-content: start;
  gap: .75rem;
}

.preview-workspace-explorer-panel {
  display: grid;
  align-content: start;
  gap: .55rem;
}

.preview-workspace-root-panel h3,
.preview-workspace-detail-panel h3,
.preview-workspace-pathbar span {
  margin: 0;
  font-family: var(--ras-heading-font);
}

.preview-workspace-mount-action,
.preview-workspace-actions button,
.preview-workspace-pathbar button {
  min-height: 38px;
  display: inline-flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: center;
  gap: .4rem;
  border: 1px solid var(--ras-border);
  border-radius: 10px;
  background: var(--ras-panel-2);
  color: var(--ras-text);
  padding: .45rem .65rem;
}

.preview-workspace-pathbar {
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: space-between;
  gap: .7rem;
  border-bottom: 1px solid var(--ras-border);
  padding-bottom: .7rem;
}

.preview-workspace-pathbar span {
  min-width: 0;
  overflow: hidden;
  font-size: 1.45rem;
  text-overflow: ellipsis;
  white-space: nowrap;
}

.preview-workspace-detail-panel dl {
  display: grid;
  gap: .55rem;
  margin: 0;
}

.preview-workspace-detail-panel dl div {
  border: 1px solid var(--ras-border);
  border-radius: 10px;
  background: var(--ras-panel-2);
  padding: .55rem;
}

.preview-workspace-detail-panel dt {
  color: var(--ras-muted);
  font-size: .73rem;
  font-weight: 850;
  text-transform: uppercase;
}

.preview-workspace-detail-panel dd {
  margin: .15rem 0 0;
}

.preview-workspace-actions {
  display: grid;
  gap: .45rem;
}

.preview-telemetry {
  min-width: 0;
  display: grid;
  align-content: start;
  gap: .7rem;
  overflow: auto;
  border-left: 1px solid var(--ras-border);
  background: color-mix(in srgb, var(--ras-panel) 72%, transparent);
  padding: .9rem;
}

.preview-telemetry section,
.preview-console-card,
.preview-pane {
  border: 1px solid var(--ras-border);
  border-radius: 12px;
  background: color-mix(in srgb, var(--ras-panel) 90%, transparent);
}

.preview-telemetry section,
.preview-console-card {
  display: grid;
  gap: .55rem;
  padding: .8rem;
}

.preview-telemetry p,
.preview-console-card p,
.preview-pane p {
  color: var(--ras-muted);
}

.preview-warmind-home,
.preview-layout-grid,
.preview-lane-board,
.preview-model-matrix,
.preview-launch-grid,
.preview-setting-matrix,
.preview-overlay-stack {
  display: grid;
  gap: .8rem;
}

.preview-warmind-home {
  grid-template-columns: minmax(0, 1.5fr) minmax(220px, .8fr);
  grid-template-rows: minmax(260px, 1fr) auto;
}

.preview-command-terminal {
  align-content: center;
}

.preview-command-input textarea {
  min-height: 82px;
  border: 1px solid var(--ras-border);
