  border-radius: 10px;
  background: var(--ras-panel-2);
  color: var(--ras-text);
  padding: .7rem;
}

.preview-warmind-files,
.preview-model-matrix,
.preview-launch-grid {
  grid-template-columns: minmax(190px, .75fr) minmax(0, 1.45fr);
}

.preview-file-matrix {
  grid-row: span 2;
}

.preview-lane-board,
.preview-setting-matrix,
.preview-overlay-stack {
  grid-template-columns: repeat(3, minmax(0, 1fr));
}

.preview-model-matrix > article,
.preview-file-matrix article,
.preview-workspace-explorer-panel article,
.preview-model-dashboard article,
.preview-card-catalog article,
.preview-activity-split article,
.preview-journal-list article,
.preview-pane.files article {
  min-width: 0;
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: auto minmax(0, 1fr) auto auto;
  align-items: center;
  gap: .55rem;
  border-bottom: 1px solid var(--ras-border);
  padding: .62rem 0;
}

.preview-model-matrix > article:last-child,
.preview-file-matrix article:last-child,
.preview-workspace-explorer-panel article:last-child,
.preview-card-catalog article:last-child,
.preview-pane.files article:last-child {
  border-bottom: 0;
}

.preview-model-matrix > article div,
.preview-model-dashboard article div {
  min-width: 0;
}

.preview-model-matrix > article strong,
.preview-model-matrix > article span,
.preview-model-dashboard article strong,
.preview-model-dashboard article span,
.preview-card-catalog article strong,
.preview-card-catalog article span {
  display: block;
  overflow: hidden;
  text-overflow: ellipsis;
  white-space: nowrap;
}

.preview-layout-candidate-models {
  grid-template-columns: minmax(210px, 260px) minmax(0, 1fr) minmax(240px, 300px);
  grid-template-rows: auto minmax(0, 1fr);
  background:
    linear-gradient(135deg, color-mix(in srgb, var(--ras-accent) 8%, transparent), transparent 42%),
    var(--ras-canvas);
}

.preview-candidate-models-topbar {
  grid-column: 1 / -1;
  min-width: 0;
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: .8rem;
  border-bottom: 1px solid var(--ras-border);
  background: color-mix(in srgb, var(--ras-panel) 92%, transparent);
  padding: .75rem .9rem;
}

.preview-candidate-models-topbar nav {
  min-width: 0;
  display: flex;
  gap: .35rem;
  flex: 1;
  overflow: auto;
}

.preview-candidate-models-topbar nav button,
.preview-model-source-rail button,
.preview-model-action-row button,
.preview-model-ops-panel button {
  min-height: 38px;
  border: 1px solid var(--ras-border);
  border-radius: 10px;
  background: var(--ras-panel-2);
  color: var(--ras-text);
  padding: .42rem .65rem;
}

.preview-candidate-models-topbar nav button.is-active,
.preview-model-source-rail button.is-active {
  border-color: color-mix(in srgb, var(--ras-accent) 52%, var(--ras-border));
  background: color-mix(in srgb, var(--ras-accent) 13%, var(--ras-panel));
}

.preview-model-source-rail,
.preview-model-ops-panel {
  min-width: 0;
  display: grid;
  align-content: start;
  gap: .65rem;
  overflow: auto;
  background: color-mix(in srgb, var(--ras-panel) 82%, transparent);
  padding: .85rem;
}

.preview-model-source-rail {
  border-right: 1px solid var(--ras-border);
}

.preview-model-ops-panel {
  border-left: 1px solid var(--ras-border);
}

.preview-model-source-rail h3,
.preview-model-ops-panel h3,
.preview-model-control-board h3 {
  margin: 0;
  font-family: var(--ras-heading-font);
}

.preview-model-source-rail button {
  display: grid;
  gap: .15rem;
  text-align: left;
}

.preview-model-source-rail button span,
.preview-model-source-rail button small,
.preview-model-ops-panel p,
.preview-active-model-board p,
.preview-model-health-strip span,
.preview-model-role-panel article span {
  color: var(--ras-muted);
}

.preview-model-source-rail button small {
  font-weight: 850;
}

.preview-candidate-models-main {
  min-width: 0;
  min-height: 0;
  display: grid;
  grid-template-rows: auto minmax(0, 1fr);
  overflow: hidden;
}

.preview-model-control-board,
.preview-model-catalog-board {
  min-height: 0;
  display: grid;
  grid-template-rows: minmax(0, auto) minmax(0, 1fr);
  gap: .9rem;
  overflow: auto;
  padding: 1rem;
}

.preview-model-catalog-toolbar {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: minmax(220px, 1fr) minmax(140px, .45fr) minmax(140px, .45fr);
  gap: .65rem;
}

.preview-model-catalog-toolbar label {
  display: grid;
  gap: .28rem;
  color: var(--ras-muted);
  font-size: .72rem;
  font-weight: 850;
  text-transform: uppercase;
}

.preview-model-catalog-toolbar input,
.preview-model-catalog-toolbar select {
  min-height: 38px;
  border: 1px solid var(--ras-border);
  border-radius: 10px;
  background: var(--ras-panel-2);
  color: var(--ras-text);
  padding: 0 .65rem;
}

.preview-model-option-list {
  display: grid;
  align-content: start;
  gap: .65rem;
}

.preview-model-option-list article {
  min-width: 0;
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: minmax(0, 1fr) auto auto;
  align-items: center;
  gap: .8rem;
  border: 1px solid var(--ras-border);
  border-radius: 12px;
  background: color-mix(in srgb, var(--ras-panel) 92%, transparent);
  padding: .85rem;
}

.preview-model-option-list article.is-selected {
  border-color: color-mix(in srgb, var(--ras-accent) 54%, var(--ras-border));
  background: color-mix(in srgb, var(--ras-accent) 9%, var(--ras-panel));
}

.preview-model-option-list h3 {
  margin: 0;
  font-family: var(--ras-heading-font);
}

.preview-model-option-list p {
  margin: .2rem 0 0;
  color: var(--ras-muted);
}

.preview-model-catalog-meta {
  display: flex;
  flex-wrap: wrap;
  justify-content: flex-end;
  gap: .35rem;
}

.preview-model-catalog-meta span {
  display: inline-flex;
  min-height: 28px;
  align-items: center;
  border: 1px solid var(--ras-border);
  border-radius: 999px;
  background: var(--ras-panel-2);
  color: var(--ras-text);
  padding: .22rem .52rem;
  font-size: .74rem;
  font-weight: 850;
}

.preview-model-option-list button {
  min-height: 38px;
  display: inline-flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: center;
  gap: .4rem;
  border: 1px solid color-mix(in srgb, var(--ras-accent) 50%, var(--ras-border));
  border-radius: 10px;
  background: var(--ras-accent);
  color: #fff;
  padding: .42rem .65rem;
  white-space: nowrap;
}

.preview-active-model-board,
.preview-model-role-panel,
.preview-model-ops-panel section {
  min-width: 0;
  border: 1px solid var(--ras-border);
  border-radius: 12px;
  background: color-mix(in srgb, var(--ras-panel) 92%, transparent);
  padding: .95rem;
}

.preview-model-board-head {
  display: flex;
  align-items: flex-start;
  justify-content: space-between;
  gap: .8rem;
}

.preview-model-health {
  display: inline-flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: .35rem;
  border: 1px solid color-mix(in srgb, var(--ras-safe) 42%, var(--ras-border));
  border-radius: 999px;
  background: color-mix(in srgb, var(--ras-safe) 14%, var(--ras-panel));
  color: var(--ras-safe);
  padding: .28rem .55rem;
  font-size: .78rem;
  font-weight: 850;
  white-space: nowrap;
}

.preview-model-health-strip,
.preview-model-action-row {
  display: flex;
  flex-wrap: wrap;
  gap: .45rem;
  margin-top: .8rem;
}

.preview-model-health-strip span {
  display: inline-flex;
  min-height: 30px;
  align-items: center;
  border: 1px solid var(--ras-border);
  border-radius: 999px;
  background: var(--ras-panel-2);
  padding: .25rem .58rem;
  font-size: .78rem;
  font-weight: 800;
}

.preview-model-action-row button,
.preview-model-ops-panel button {
  display: inline-flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: center;
  gap: .4rem;
}

.preview-model-action-row .preview-send {
  border-color: color-mix(in srgb, var(--ras-accent) 58%, var(--ras-border));
  background: var(--ras-accent);
  color: #fff;
}

.preview-model-role-panel {
  display: grid;
  align-content: start;
  gap: .6rem;
}

.preview-model-role-panel article {
  min-width: 0;
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: minmax(80px, .5fr) minmax(0, 1fr) auto;
  align-items: center;
  gap: .6rem;
  border: 1px solid var(--ras-border);
  border-radius: 10px;
  background: var(--ras-panel-2);
  padding: .65rem;
}

.preview-model-role-panel article span {
  overflow: hidden;
  text-overflow: ellipsis;
  white-space: nowrap;
}

.preview-model-role-panel article small {
  color: var(--ras-text);
  font-weight: 850;
}

.preview-model-ops-panel section {
  display: grid;
  gap: .55rem;
}

.preview-advanced-summary .preview-chip-list {
  margin-top: .2rem;
}

.preview-layout-operator {
  grid-template-columns: minmax(190px, 240px) minmax(0, 1fr) minmax(210px, 260px);
  grid-template-rows: auto minmax(0, 1fr);
  background: var(--ras-canvas);
}

.preview-operator-topbar {
  grid-column: 1 / -1;
  min-width: 0;
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: .8rem;
  border-bottom: 1px solid var(--ras-border);
  background: color-mix(in srgb, var(--ras-panel) 92%, transparent);
  padding: .75rem .9rem;
}

.preview-brand-inline {
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: .65rem;
  min-width: 190px;
}

.preview-brand-inline > span {
  width: 38px;
  height: 38px;
  display: grid;
  place-items: center;
  border: 1px solid color-mix(in srgb, var(--ras-accent) 48%, transparent);
  border-radius: 10px;
  background: color-mix(in srgb, var(--ras-accent) 15%, var(--ras-panel));
  font-family: var(--ras-heading-font);
  font-weight: 900;
}

.preview-brand-inline strong,
.preview-brand-inline small {
  display: block;
}

.preview-brand-inline small {
  color: var(--ras-muted);
  font-size: .74rem;
}

.preview-operator-topbar nav {
  min-width: 0;
  display: flex;
  gap: .35rem;
  flex: 1;
  overflow: auto;
}

.preview-operator-topbar nav button,
.preview-operator-context button,
.preview-archive-library nav button,
.preview-archive-library section button,
.preview-pane.roots button,
.preview-wizard nav button,
.preview-settings-workbench nav button,
.preview-recipe-library button {
  min-height: 36px;
  border: 1px solid var(--ras-border);
  border-radius: 10px;
  background: var(--ras-panel-2);
  color: var(--ras-text);
  padding: .42rem .65rem;
}

.preview-operator-topbar nav button.is-active,
.preview-archive-library nav button.is-active {
  border-color: color-mix(in srgb, var(--ras-accent) 52%, var(--ras-border));
  background: color-mix(in srgb, var(--ras-accent) 13%, var(--ras-panel));
}

.preview-operator-context,
.preview-operator-inspector,
.preview-archive-library,
.preview-archive-inspector {
  min-width: 0;
  display: grid;
  align-content: start;
  gap: .65rem;
  overflow: auto;
  background: color-mix(in srgb, var(--ras-panel) 80%, transparent);
  padding: .85rem;
}

.preview-operator-context {
  border-right: 1px solid var(--ras-border);
}

.preview-operator-inspector,
.preview-archive-inspector {
  border-left: 1px solid var(--ras-border);
}

.preview-operator-context article {
  display: grid;
  gap: .12rem;
  border: 1px solid var(--ras-border);
  border-radius: 10px;
  background: var(--ras-panel-2);
  padding: .55rem;
}

.preview-operator-context article span {
  color: var(--ras-muted);
  font-size: .78rem;
}

.preview-operator-workspace,
.preview-archive-canvas {
  min-width: 0;
  min-height: 0;
  display: grid;
  grid-template-rows: auto minmax(0, 1fr);
  overflow: hidden;
}

.preview-operator-home,
.preview-archive-home {
  min-height: 0;
  display: grid;
  grid-template-rows: 1fr auto;
  gap: .9rem;
  overflow: auto;
  padding: 1rem;
}

.preview-chat-column,
.preview-reading-thread {
  display: grid;
  align-content: center;
  gap: .75rem;
  max-width: 860px;
  width: 100%;
  margin: 0 auto;
}

.preview-operator-composer,
.preview-archive-composer {
  max-width: 920px;
}

.preview-file-explorer,
.preview-archive-workspaces,
.preview-activity-split,
.preview-model-dashboard,
.preview-card-catalog,
.preview-wizard,
.preview-recipe-library,
.preview-settings-workbench,
.preview-preference-notebook,
.preview-panel-layout,
.preview-citation-panels {
  min-height: 0;
  display: grid;
  gap: .8rem;
  overflow: auto;
  padding: 1rem;
}

.preview-file-explorer {
  grid-template-columns: minmax(170px, .75fr) minmax(280px, 1.35fr) minmax(220px, .9fr);
}

.preview-activity-split,
.preview-model-dashboard,
.preview-wizard,
.preview-recipe-library,
.preview-settings-workbench,
.preview-preference-notebook,
.preview-panel-layout,
.preview-citation-panels {
  grid-template-columns: minmax(220px, .8fr) minmax(0, 1.2fr);
}

.preview-journal-list {
  display: grid;
  align-content: start;
  gap: .7rem;
  overflow: auto;
  padding: 1.65rem 1rem 1rem;
}

.preview-journal-list article,
.preview-card-catalog article {
  border: 1px solid var(--ras-border);
  border-radius: 12px;
  background: color-mix(in srgb, var(--ras-panel) 92%, transparent);
  padding: .85rem;
}

.preview-card-catalog {
  grid-template-columns: repeat(2, minmax(0, 1fr));
}

.preview-layout-archive {
  grid-template-columns: minmax(210px, 260px) minmax(0, 1fr) minmax(220px, 290px);
  background:
    linear-gradient(90deg, color-mix(in srgb, var(--ras-panel) 68%, transparent), transparent 36%),
    var(--ras-canvas);
}

.preview-archive-library {
  border-right: 1px solid var(--ras-border);
}

.preview-library-search {
  min-height: 38px;
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: .45rem;
  border: 1px solid var(--ras-border);
  border-radius: 10px;
  background: var(--ras-panel-2);
  color: var(--ras-muted);
  padding: 0 .65rem;
}

.preview-archive-library nav,
.preview-archive-library section,
.preview-settings-workbench nav,
.preview-wizard nav {
  display: grid;
  align-content: start;
  gap: .4rem;
}

.preview-archive-library section button,
.preview-pane.roots button {
  display: flex;
  justify-content: space-between;
}

.preview-archive-canvas {
  background: color-mix(in srgb, var(--ras-canvas) 92%, var(--ras-panel));
}

.preview-reading-thread {
  align-content: start;
  padding-top: 2rem;
}

.preview-reading-thread .preview-message {
  max-width: 88%;
  line-height: 1.55;
}

.preview-document,
.preview-document p {
  line-height: 1.55;
}

.preview-chip-list {
  display: flex;
  flex-wrap: wrap;
  gap: .4rem;
}

.preview-chip-list span {
  display: inline-flex;
  min-height: 28px;
  align-items: center;
  border: 1px solid var(--ras-border);
  border-radius: 999px;
  background: var(--ras-panel-2);
  color: var(--ras-text);
  padding: .24rem .55rem;
  font-size: .76rem;
  font-weight: 800;
}

.preview-root-button-list {
  display: grid;
  gap: .45rem;
}

.preview-root-button-list button {
  min-width: 0;
  min-height: 40px;
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: space-between;
  gap: .7rem;
  border: 1px solid var(--ras-border);
  border-radius: 10px;
  background: var(--ras-panel-2);
  color: var(--ras-text);
  padding: .45rem .65rem;
  text-align: left;
}

.preview-root-button-list button span {
  min-width: 0;
  overflow: hidden;
  text-overflow: ellipsis;
  white-space: nowrap;
}

.preview-root-button-list button small {
  flex: 0 0 auto;
  color: var(--ras-muted);
  font-size: .72rem;
  font-weight: 850;
}

.preview-pane button,
.preview-console-card button,
.preview-wizard button,
.preview-settings-workbench button {
  border: 1px solid var(--ras-border);
  border-radius: 10px;
  background: var(--ras-panel-2);
  color: var(--ras-text);
  padding: .45rem .65rem;
}

.preview-active-model button,
.active-model button {
  width: fit-content;
}

.preview-activity-split section:first-child,
.preview-model-dashboard > section,
.preview-wizard > section,
.preview-recipe-library > section,
.preview-settings-workbench > section,
.preview-preference-notebook > section,
.preview-panel-layout > section,
.preview-citation-panels > section {
  min-width: 0;
}

.preview-activity-split section:first-child,
.preview-model-dashboard,
.preview-wizard,
.preview-recipe-library,
.preview-settings-workbench,
.preview-preference-notebook,
.preview-panel-layout,
.preview-citation-panels {
  align-content: start;
}

.preview-activity-split article,
.preview-lane-board article,
.preview-console-card article {
  display: grid;
  gap: .25rem;
  border: 1px solid var(--ras-border);
  border-radius: 10px;
  background: var(--ras-panel-2);
  padding: .65rem;
}

.preview-activity-split article p {
  color: var(--ras-muted);
}

.preview-overlay-stack {
  align-items: start;
}

.preview-stage[data-viewport="tablet"] {
  grid-template-columns: minmax(190px, 220px) minmax(0, 1fr);
}

.preview-stage[data-viewport="tablet"] .preview-workspace,
.preview-stage[data-viewport="split"] .preview-workspace {
  grid-template-columns: minmax(160px, .8fr) minmax(260px, 1.3fr);
}

.preview-stage[data-viewport="tablet"] .preview-pane.preview,
.preview-stage[data-viewport="split"] .preview-pane.preview {
  grid-column: 1 / -1;
}

.preview-stage[data-viewport="mobile"] {
  grid-template-columns: 1fr;
  min-height: 760px;
}

.preview-stage[data-viewport="mobile"] .preview-sidebar {
  border-right: 0;
  border-bottom: 1px solid color-mix(in srgb, var(--ras-sidebar-text) 10%, transparent);
  max-height: 220px;
}

.preview-stage-original[data-viewport="mobile"] .preview-sidebar {
  max-height: none;
}

.preview-stage-original[data-viewport="mobile"] .preview-sidebar nav {
  display: flex;
  gap: .35rem;
  overflow-x: auto;
}

.preview-stage-original[data-viewport="mobile"] .preview-sidebar nav button {
  flex: 0 0 auto;
}

.preview-stage-original[data-viewport="mobile"] .preview-sidebar footer {
  display: none;
}

.preview-stage[data-viewport="mobile"] .preview-chat-list {
  display: none;
}

.preview-stage[data-viewport="mobile"] .preview-header,
.preview-stage[data-viewport="mobile"] .preview-status-row,
.preview-stage[data-viewport="mobile"] .preview-runbar {
  align-items: flex-start;
  flex-direction: column;
}

.preview-stage[data-viewport="mobile"] .preview-workspace,
.preview-stage[data-viewport="mobile"] .preview-activity,
.preview-stage[data-viewport="mobile"] .preview-models,
.preview-stage[data-viewport="mobile"] .preview-warsat,
.preview-stage[data-viewport="mobile"] .preview-settings,
.preview-stage[data-viewport="mobile"] .preview-panels {
  grid-template-columns: 1fr;
}

.preview-stage[data-viewport="mobile"] .preview-message {
  max-width: 100%;
}

.preview-stage[data-viewport="mobile"] .preview-runbar .preview-send {
  margin-left: 0;
}

.preview-layout-warmind[data-viewport="desktop"],
.preview-layout-warmind[data-viewport="tablet"] {
  grid-template-columns: 70px minmax(0, 1fr) minmax(220px, 270px);
}

.preview-layout-warmind.preview-layout-no-telemetry[data-viewport="desktop"],
.preview-layout-warmind.preview-layout-no-telemetry[data-viewport="tablet"],
.preview-layout-warmind.preview-layout-no-telemetry[data-viewport="split"] {
  grid-template-columns: 70px minmax(0, 1fr);
}

.preview-layout-warmind[data-viewport="split"] {
  grid-template-columns: 70px minmax(0, 1fr);
}

.preview-layout-warmind[data-viewport="split"] .preview-telemetry {
  display: none;
}

.preview-layout-operator[data-viewport="desktop"],
.preview-layout-operator[data-viewport="tablet"] {
  grid-template-columns: minmax(190px, 240px) minmax(0, 1fr) minmax(210px, 260px);
}

.preview-layout-operator[data-viewport="split"] {
  grid-template-columns: minmax(190px, 230px) minmax(0, 1fr);
}

.preview-layout-operator[data-viewport="split"] .preview-operator-inspector {
  display: none;
}

.preview-layout-archive[data-viewport="desktop"],
.preview-layout-archive[data-viewport="tablet"] {
  grid-template-columns: minmax(210px, 260px) minmax(0, 1fr) minmax(220px, 290px);
}

.preview-layout-archive[data-viewport="split"] {
  grid-template-columns: minmax(200px, 240px) minmax(0, 1fr);
}

.preview-layout-archive[data-viewport="split"] .preview-archive-inspector {
  display: none;
}

.preview-layout-candidate-models[data-viewport="desktop"],
.preview-layout-candidate-models[data-viewport="tablet"] {
  grid-template-columns: minmax(210px, 260px) minmax(0, 1fr) minmax(240px, 300px);
}

.preview-layout-candidate-workspaces[data-viewport="desktop"],
.preview-layout-candidate-workspaces[data-viewport="tablet"],
.preview-layout-candidate-workspaces[data-viewport="split"] {
  grid-template-columns: 70px minmax(0, 1fr);
}

.preview-layout-candidate-workspaces[data-viewport="split"] .preview-workspace-candidate-grid,
.preview-layout-candidate-workspaces[data-viewport="tablet"] .preview-workspace-candidate-grid {
  grid-template-columns: minmax(210px, .82fr) minmax(0, 1.2fr);
}

.preview-layout-candidate-workspaces[data-viewport="split"] .preview-workspace-detail-panel,
.preview-layout-candidate-workspaces[data-viewport="tablet"] .preview-workspace-detail-panel {
  grid-column: 1 / -1;
}

.preview-layout-candidate-models[data-viewport="split"] {
  grid-template-columns: minmax(190px, 230px) minmax(0, 1fr);
}

.preview-layout-candidate-models[data-viewport="split"] .preview-model-ops-panel {
  display: none;
}

.preview-layout[data-viewport="mobile"] {
  grid-template-columns: 1fr;
  grid-template-rows: auto;
  min-height: 820px;
}

.preview-layout-warmind[data-viewport="mobile"] .preview-command-rail {
  grid-template-columns: auto 1fr auto;
  grid-template-rows: auto;
  align-items: center;
  justify-items: stretch;
  border-right: 0;
  border-bottom: 1px solid color-mix(in srgb, var(--ras-sidebar-text) 10%, transparent);
}

.preview-layout-candidate-workspaces[data-viewport="mobile"] .preview-command-rail {
  grid-template-columns: auto 1fr auto;
  grid-template-rows: auto;
  align-items: center;
  justify-items: stretch;
  border-right: 0;
  border-bottom: 1px solid color-mix(in srgb, var(--ras-sidebar-text) 10%, transparent);
}

.preview-layout-warmind[data-viewport="mobile"] .preview-command-rail nav {
  grid-template-columns: repeat(7, minmax(0, 1fr));
  overflow: auto;
}

.preview-layout-candidate-workspaces[data-viewport="mobile"] .preview-command-rail nav {
  grid-template-columns: repeat(7, minmax(0, 1fr));
  overflow: auto;
}

.preview-layout-warmind[data-viewport="mobile"] .preview-command-main,
.preview-layout-warmind[data-viewport="mobile"] .preview-telemetry,
.preview-layout-operator[data-viewport="mobile"] .preview-operator-context,
.preview-layout-operator[data-viewport="mobile"] .preview-operator-workspace,
.preview-layout-operator[data-viewport="mobile"] .preview-operator-inspector,
.preview-layout-archive[data-viewport="mobile"] .preview-archive-library,
.preview-layout-archive[data-viewport="mobile"] .preview-archive-canvas,
.preview-layout-archive[data-viewport="mobile"] .preview-archive-inspector,
.preview-layout-candidate-workspaces[data-viewport="mobile"] .preview-candidate-workspaces-main,
.preview-layout-candidate-models[data-viewport="mobile"] .preview-model-source-rail,
.preview-layout-candidate-models[data-viewport="mobile"] .preview-candidate-models-main,
.preview-layout-candidate-models[data-viewport="mobile"] .preview-model-ops-panel {
  min-height: 0;
}

.preview-layout-operator[data-viewport="mobile"] .preview-operator-topbar,
.preview-layout-archive[data-viewport="mobile"] .preview-section-header,
.preview-layout-warmind[data-viewport="mobile"] .preview-command-header,
.preview-layout-candidate-workspaces[data-viewport="mobile"] .preview-command-header,
.preview-layout-candidate-workspaces[data-viewport="mobile"] .preview-workspace-pathbar,
.preview-layout-candidate-models[data-viewport="mobile"] .preview-candidate-models-topbar,
.preview-layout-candidate-models[data-viewport="mobile"] .preview-section-header,
.preview-layout-candidate-models[data-viewport="mobile"] .preview-model-board-head {
  align-items: flex-start;
  flex-direction: column;
}

.preview-layout-operator[data-viewport="mobile"] .preview-operator-topbar nav,
.preview-layout-archive[data-viewport="mobile"] .preview-archive-library nav,
.preview-layout-candidate-models[data-viewport="mobile"] .preview-candidate-models-topbar nav {
  width: 100%;
}

.preview-layout-operator[data-viewport="mobile"] .preview-operator-topbar,
.preview-layout-candidate-models[data-viewport="mobile"] .preview-candidate-models-topbar {
  grid-column: 1;
}

.preview-layout[data-viewport="mobile"] .preview-file-explorer,
.preview-layout[data-viewport="mobile"] .preview-archive-workspaces,
.preview-layout[data-viewport="mobile"] .preview-warmind-home,
.preview-layout[data-viewport="mobile"] .preview-layout-grid,
.preview-layout[data-viewport="mobile"] .preview-lane-board,
.preview-layout[data-viewport="mobile"] .preview-model-matrix,
.preview-layout[data-viewport="mobile"] .preview-launch-grid,
.preview-layout[data-viewport="mobile"] .preview-setting-matrix,
.preview-layout[data-viewport="mobile"] .preview-overlay-stack,
.preview-layout[data-viewport="mobile"] .preview-activity-split,
.preview-layout[data-viewport="mobile"] .preview-model-dashboard,
.preview-layout[data-viewport="mobile"] .preview-card-catalog,
.preview-layout[data-viewport="mobile"] .preview-wizard,
.preview-layout[data-viewport="mobile"] .preview-recipe-library,
.preview-layout[data-viewport="mobile"] .preview-settings-workbench,
.preview-layout[data-viewport="mobile"] .preview-preference-notebook,
.preview-layout[data-viewport="mobile"] .preview-panel-layout,
.preview-layout[data-viewport="mobile"] .preview-citation-panels,
.preview-layout[data-viewport="mobile"] .preview-workspace-candidate-grid,
.preview-layout[data-viewport="mobile"] .preview-model-catalog-toolbar,
.preview-layout[data-viewport="mobile"] .preview-model-option-list article,
.preview-layout[data-viewport="mobile"] .preview-model-role-panel article {
  grid-template-columns: 1fr;
}

.preview-layout[data-viewport="mobile"] .preview-model-catalog-meta {
  justify-content: flex-start;
}

.preview-layout[data-viewport="mobile"] .preview-model-option-list button {
  width: 100%;
}

.preview-layout[data-viewport="mobile"] .preview-file-matrix article,
.preview-layout[data-viewport="mobile"] .preview-workspace-explorer-panel article,
.preview-layout[data-viewport="mobile"] .preview-pane.files article {
  grid-template-columns: auto minmax(0, 1fr);
  align-items: start;
}

.preview-layout[data-viewport="mobile"] .preview-file-matrix article span,
.preview-layout[data-viewport="mobile"] .preview-file-matrix article small,
.preview-layout[data-viewport="mobile"] .preview-workspace-explorer-panel article span,
.preview-layout[data-viewport="mobile"] .preview-workspace-explorer-panel article small,
.preview-layout[data-viewport="mobile"] .preview-pane.files article span,
.preview-layout[data-viewport="mobile"] .preview-pane.files article small {
  grid-column: 2;
  justify-self: start;
}

.preview-layout-candidate-models[data-viewport="mobile"] .preview-candidate-models-topbar nav {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: repeat(3, minmax(0, 1fr));
}

@media (max-width: 1180px) {
  .preview-controller {
    grid-template-columns: repeat(2, minmax(0, 1fr));
  }

  .preview-controller > div:first-child {
    grid-column: 1 / -1;
  }

  .preview-a11y {
    grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr;
  }
}

@media (max-width: 720px) {
  .preview-root {
    padding: .6rem;
  }

  .preview-controller,
  .preview-a11y {
    grid-template-columns: 1fr;
  }

  .preview-stage-shell {
    padding: .5rem;
  }
}

@media (max-height: 900px) and (min-width: 761px) {
  .sidebar-title small {
    display: none;
  }

  .sidebar-nav {
    grid-template-columns: repeat(3, minmax(0, 1fr));
    gap: .22rem;
  }

  .sidebar-nav .nav-item {
    justify-content: center;
    min-height: 36px;
    padding: 0;
  }

  .sidebar-nav .nav-label,
  .sidebar-nav .nav-count {
    display: none;
  }

  .sidebar-nav .nav-item.is-active::before {
    left: 50%;
    bottom: 3px;
    width: 24px;
    height: 2px;
    border-radius: 999px;
    transform: translateX(-50%);
  }

  .sidebar-library-controls label > span {
    display: none;
  }

  .sidebar-session-actions {
    grid-template-columns: minmax(0, 1fr);
  }

  .sidebar-session-folder-badge {
    display: none;
  }

  .sidebar-context {
    grid-template-columns: repeat(2, minmax(0, 1fr));
  }

  .sidebar-context .context-line {
    grid-column: 1 / -1;
  }
}

@media (max-height: 700px) and (min-width: 761px) {
  .sidebar-context .context-line,
  .sidebar-folder-create-shell {
    display: none;
  }

  .sidebar-context {
    grid-template-columns: minmax(0, 1fr);
  }
}

@media (max-width: 1400px) and (min-width: 981px) {
  .compact-workspace-hero {
    min-height: 84px;
    align-items: flex-start;
    padding: 1rem 1.1rem;
  }

  .workspace-hero h1 {
    font-size: clamp(1.7rem, 3vw, 2.45rem);
  }

  .workspace-hero p {
    max-width: 680px;
    line-height: 1.35;
  }

  .workspace-layout {
    grid-template-columns: minmax(320px, 380px) minmax(0, 1fr);
    grid-template-areas:
      "workspace-side workspace-main"
      "workspace-preview workspace-preview";
    align-items: start;
    overflow: auto;
    padding: .85rem;
  }

  .workspace-side,
  .workspace-main {
    height: min(640px, calc(100dvh - 132px));
    min-height: min(520px, calc(100dvh - 132px));
    overflow: auto;
  }

  .workspace-preview-panel {
    overflow: visible;
  }

  .workspace-preview-panel {
    grid-template-columns: minmax(0, 1fr) minmax(0, 1fr);
    align-items: start;
  }

  .workspace-mount-panel,
  .workspace-guide {
    grid-column: 1 / -1;
  }

  .workspace-guide {
    grid-template-columns: repeat(2, minmax(0, 1fr));
  }

  .models-grid,
  .deployment-layout {
    grid-template-columns: 1fr;
  }

  .deployment-steps {
    grid-template-columns: repeat(3, minmax(0, 1fr));
  }

  .models-content,
  .activity-view .task-dashboard,
  .settings-panels {
    padding: 1rem;
  }

  .model-command-top,
  .task-card-head,
  .browser-head,
  .warsat-runtime-card {
    align-items: flex-start;
  }

  .model-action-row,
  .models-header-actions,
  .drawer-control-row,
  .mount-plan-actions {
    flex-wrap: wrap;
  }

  .settings-layout {
    grid-template-columns: minmax(210px, 230px) minmax(0, 1fr);
  }

  .safety-form .row > .col-lg-4 {
    width: 100%;
  }

  .task-run-info {
    grid-template-columns: 1fr;
  }

  .task-run-info dl {
    grid-template-columns: repeat(2, minmax(0, 1fr));
  }

  .run-summary-grid {
    grid-template-columns: repeat(2, minmax(0, 1fr));
  }

  .warsat-safety-grid {
    grid-template-columns: repeat(2, auto minmax(0, 1fr));
  }
}

@media (max-width: 1240px) {
  .warsat-dashboard {
    grid-template-columns: 1fr;
  }

  .warsat-summary-strip,
  .warsat-panel,
  .warsat-library-panel,
  .warsat-plan-card {
    grid-column: 1;
  }

  .warsat-plan-card {
    grid-row: auto;
    position: relative;
    top: auto;
    max-height: none;
    overflow: visible;
  }

  .warsat-deploy-strip {
    grid-template-columns: 1fr;
  }

  .warsat-deploy-actions {
    justify-content: flex-start;
  }

  .warsat-model-finder-grid {
    grid-template-columns: minmax(170px, 210px) minmax(0, 1fr);
  }

  .warsat-model-selected {
    grid-column: 1 / -1;
  }

  .model-catalog-layout {
    grid-template-columns: minmax(180px, 220px) minmax(0, 1fr);
  }

  .model-catalog-detail {
    grid-column: 1 / -1;
  }

  .model-readiness-grid {
    grid-template-columns: repeat(3, minmax(0, 1fr));
  }

  .archive-layout {
    grid-template-columns: minmax(210px, 260px) minmax(0, 1fr);
  }

  .archive-support {
    grid-column: 1 / -1;
  }

  .archive-preview {
    grid-column: 1 / -1;
  }
}

@media (max-width: 980px) {
  .home-commandbar {
    align-items: flex-start;
    flex-wrap: wrap;
  }

  .home-title {
    flex: 1 1 260px;
  }

  .home-runtime-strip {
    flex: 1 1 360px;
    justify-content: flex-end;
    max-width: 100%;
  }

  .runtime-chip {
    max-width: 42vw;
  }

  .prompt-strip {
    grid-template-columns: repeat(2, minmax(0, 1fr));
  }

  .composer-runbar {
    grid-template-columns: 1fr;
  }

  .mode-segment {
    grid-template-columns: auto repeat(3, minmax(0, 1fr));
  }

  .settings-layout {
    grid-template-columns: 1fr;
  }

  .workspace-layout {
    grid-template-columns: 1fr;
    grid-template-areas:
      "workspace-side"
      "workspace-main"
      "workspace-preview";
    overflow: auto;
  }

  .workspace-side,
  .workspace-main,
  .workspace-preview-panel {
    overflow: visible;
  }

  .workspace-preview-panel,
  .workspace-guide {
    grid-template-columns: 1fr;
  }

  .knowledge-flow-list li {
    grid-template-columns: 1fr;
  }

  .workspace-root-card,
  .warsat-model-finder-grid,
  .warsat-model-result {
    grid-template-columns: 1fr;
  }

  .workspace-root-actions,
  .warsat-model-result-tags {
    justify-content: flex-start;
    max-width: none;
  }

  .warsat-model-result-list {
    max-height: none;
    overflow: visible;
  }

  .mount-form {
    grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr;
  }

  .run-summary-grid {
    grid-template-columns: repeat(2, minmax(0, 1fr));
  }

  .warsat-safety-grid {
    grid-template-columns: repeat(2, auto minmax(0, 1fr));
  }

  .task-run-info {
    grid-template-columns: 1fr;
  }

  .task-run-info dl {
    grid-template-columns: repeat(2, minmax(0, 1fr));
  }

  .settings-nav {
    border-right: 0;
    border-bottom: 1px solid var(--ras-border);
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(138px, 1fr));
    max-height: 34dvh;
  }

  .models-grid,
  .model-readiness-grid,
  .deployment-layout,
  .archive-layout,
  .trials-layout,
  .local-model-form {
    grid-template-columns: 1fr;
  }

  .archive-session-list,
  .trial-run-list {
    max-height: none;
    overflow: visible;
  }

  .deployment-steps {
    grid-template-columns: repeat(2, minmax(0, 1fr));
  }

  .test-checklist-grid {
    grid-template-columns: 1fr;
  }

  .model-readiness-head,
  .model-readiness-summary {
    align-items: flex-start;
    flex-direction: column;
  }
}

@media (max-width: 760px) {
  body {
    overflow: hidden;
  }

  .app-frame,
  body.sidebar-collapsed .app-frame {
    grid-template-columns: 1fr;
  }

  .app-sidebar {
    position: fixed;
    inset: 0 auto 0 0;
    z-index: 1060;
    width: min(318px, calc(100vw - 46px));
    transform: translateX(-105%);
    visibility: hidden;
    pointer-events: none;
    transition: transform .22s ease;
    box-shadow: 16px 0 36px rgba(0, 0, 0, .28);
  }

  body.mobile-sidebar-open .app-sidebar {
    transform: translateX(0);
    visibility: visible;
    pointer-events: auto;
  }

  body.mobile-sidebar-open::before {
    content: "";
    position: fixed;
    inset: 0;
    z-index: 1050;
    background: rgba(0, 0, 0, .38);
  }

  body.sidebar-collapsed .app-sidebar {
    padding: .8rem;
  }

  body.sidebar-collapsed .brand-button,
  body.sidebar-collapsed .sidebar-title,
  body.sidebar-collapsed .nav-label,
  body.sidebar-collapsed .nav-count,
  body.sidebar-collapsed .sidebar-context {
    display: flex !important;
  }

  body.sidebar-collapsed .sidebar-section {
    display: block !important;
  }

  body.sidebar-collapsed .sidebar-recent-section[open],
  .sidebar-recent-section[open] {
    display: grid !important;
    grid-template-rows: auto minmax(0, 1fr);
    min-height: 0;
  }

  body.sidebar-collapsed .nav-item,
  body.sidebar-collapsed .new-task-btn {
    width: 100%;
    justify-content: flex-start;
    padding-inline: .72rem;
  }

  .mobile-close {
    display: inline-grid;
    position: absolute;
    right: .75rem;
    bottom: .75rem;
  }

  .home-menu-button {
    display: none;
  }

  .mobile-shell-toggle {
    position: fixed;
    top: .6rem;
    left: .65rem;
    z-index: 1040;
    color: var(--ras-text);
    background: color-mix(in srgb, var(--ras-panel) 86%, transparent);
    box-shadow: 0 8px 20px rgba(0, 0, 0, .12);
  }

  .mobile-shell-toggle.icon-button {
    display: inline-grid;
  }

  .home-commandbar {
    min-height: 58px;
    padding: .6rem .7rem .6rem 3.35rem;
  }

  .app-view > .page-header {
    padding: .7rem .75rem .7rem 3.35rem;
  }

  .app-view > .page-header > div,
  .app-view > .page-header > button,
  .app-view > .page-header > .btn,
  .app-view > .page-header > .ras-button {
    width: 100%;
  }

  .home-title {
    display: none;
  }

  .home-runtime-strip {
    flex: 1;
    justify-content: flex-start;
    flex-wrap: nowrap;
    overflow-x: auto;
    padding-bottom: .12rem;
  }

  .home-runtime-strip .runtime-chip {
    flex: 0 0 auto;
    max-width: 72vw;
  }

  .thread-scroll {
    padding: 1rem .75rem .7rem;
  }

  .welcome-panel {
    padding-block: 1.25rem .75rem;
  }

  .welcome-panel h1 {
    font-size: 2rem;
  }

  .welcome-panel p {
    font-size: .92rem;
  }

  .prompt-strip {
    grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr;
  }

  .prompt-chip {
    min-height: 46px;
    padding: .55rem;
  }

  .chat-composer {
    width: calc(100% - 1rem);
    margin-bottom: .55rem;
  }

  .composer-chip-row,
  .composer-meta {
    align-items: stretch;
  }

  .composer-context-actions,
  .model-health {
    width: 100%;
  }

  .agent-lane-current dl {
    grid-template-columns: repeat(2, minmax(0, 1fr));
  }

  .secondary-action {
    flex: 1 1 130px;
  }

  .model-select-chip {
    width: 100%;
    max-width: none;
  }

  .model-select-chip select {
    flex: 1;
    min-width: 0;
  }

  .model-trigger,
  .mode-trigger {
    min-height: 48px;
  }

  .run-trigger-copy {
    grid-template-columns: auto minmax(0, 1fr);
  }

  .run-trigger-copy em {
    grid-column: 2;
  }

  .composer-actions {
    width: 100%;
    justify-content: flex-end;
  }

  .task-dashboard,
  .settings-panels,
  .models-content {
    padding: .75rem;
  }

  .workspace-hero {
    min-height: auto;
    align-items: stretch;
    flex-direction: column;
    padding: 1rem .85rem;
  }

  .workspace-layout {
    padding: .75rem;
  }

  .workspace-guide,
  .mount-form,
  .run-summary-grid,
  .warsat-model-finder-grid,
  .warsat-model-result,
  .warsat-deploy-strip,
  .warsat-profile-strip,
  .warsat-lifecycle,
  .warsat-plan-summary {
    grid-template-columns: 1fr;
  }

  .warsat-safety-grid {
    grid-template-columns: auto minmax(0, 1fr);
  }

  .browser-head,
  .task-card-head {
    align-items: stretch;
    flex-direction: column;
  }

  .activity-view .task-dashboard {
    padding: .75rem;
  }

  .activity-tabs {
    flex-wrap: nowrap;
    overflow-x: auto;
    padding-bottom: .15rem;
  }

  .activity-tab {
    flex: 0 0 auto;
  }

  .activity-panel {
    padding-right: 0;
  }

  .task-run-info dl {
    grid-template-columns: 1fr;
  }

  .task-run-info dd {
    white-space: normal;
  }

  .model-inline-select,
  .parallel-agent-options {
    width: 100%;
  }

  .mode-side-panel {
    top: 64px;
    left: .5rem;
    right: .5rem;
    bottom: .5rem;
    width: auto;
  }

  .model-side-panel {
    top: 64px;
    left: .5rem;
    right: .5rem;
    bottom: .5rem;
    width: auto;
  }

  .mode-segment {
    grid-template-columns: repeat(2, minmax(0, 1fr));
  }

  .mode-segment-label {
    grid-column: 1 / -1;
  }

  .page-header,
  .section-row {
    align-items: stretch;
    flex-direction: column;
    flex-wrap: nowrap;
  }

  .page-header {
    justify-content: flex-start;
    min-height: auto;
  }

  .settings-save-strip,
  .output-folder-row,
  .chat-folder-create div,
  .session-folder-control {
    align-items: stretch;
    flex-direction: column;
  }

  .setup-step,
  .test-checklist-item {
    grid-template-columns: 1fr;
  }

  .settings-save-strip .hstack,
  .output-folder-row .btn {
    width: 100%;
  }

  .settings-save-strip .hstack {
    flex-wrap: wrap;
  }

  .session-list-item {
    grid-template-columns: 1fr;
  }

  .models-header-actions,
  .model-action-row {
    justify-content: stretch;
  }

  .models-header-actions .ras-button,
  .model-action-row .ras-button {
    width: 100%;
  }

  .model-command-top,
  .model-truth-grid,
  .model-catalog-layout,
  .model-catalog-row,
  .hardware-profile-grid,
  .deployment-steps,
  .warsat-runtime-card {
    grid-template-columns: 1fr;
  }

  .model-catalog-head,
  .model-catalog-actions,
  .model-catalog-meta,
  .model-catalog-row-meta {
    justify-content: flex-start;
  }

  .model-catalog-list {
    max-height: none;
    overflow: visible;
  }

  .local-model-form,
  .local-model-notes {
    grid-template-columns: 1fr;
    grid-column: auto;
  }

  .warsat-runtime-actions {
    justify-content: stretch;
  }

  .warsat-runtime-actions .btn {
    flex: 1 1 120px;
  }

  .detail-grid,
  .model-meta-grid,
  .mount-plan-grid {
    grid-template-columns: 1fr;
  }

  .workspace-entry-row,
  .workspace-entry {
    grid-template-columns: 1fr;
    align-items: stretch;
  }

  .workspace-entry-meta {
    display: block;
    text-align: left;
  }

  .warsat-plan-form .form-text {
    min-height: auto;
  }

  .model-health-pill {
    justify-self: start;
  }

  .task-details-drawer {
    width: 100vw;
    border-left: 0;
  }

  .task-details-header {
    padding: .85rem;
  }

  .task-details-tabs {
    padding: .65rem .85rem;
  }

  .task-details-body {
    padding: .85rem;
  }

  .task-detail-grid {
    grid-template-columns: 1fr;
  }
}

@media (max-width: 460px) {
  .app-view > .page-header,
  .home-commandbar {
    padding-right: .55rem;
  }

  .home-runtime-strip .runtime-chip:not(#workspacePill) {
    display: none;
  }

  .home-runtime-strip .runtime-chip {
    max-width: calc(100vw - 4.25rem);
  }

  .composer-actions .secondary-action {
    width: 100%;
  }

  .prompt-strip {
    grid-template-columns: 1fr;
  }

  .warmind-sigil {
    width: 64px;
    height: 64px;
  }
}

.task-dashboard,
.settings-panels,
.models-content,
.warsat-dashboard {
  gap: clamp(.72rem, 1.3vw, 1rem);
}

.workspace-section,
.workspace-browser,
.workspace-preview-panel,
.activity-panel,
.settings-card,
.model-command-card,
.model-health-card,
.model-readiness-panel,
.model-builder-panel,
.model-catalog-panel,
.warsat-panel,
.warsat-plan-card {
  box-shadow: none !important;
}

.workspace-section,
.workspace-browser,
.activity-panel,
.settings-card,
.model-command-card,
.model-health-card,
.model-readiness-panel,
.model-builder-panel,
.model-catalog-panel,
.warsat-panel,
.warsat-plan-card {
  border-color: color-mix(in srgb, var(--ras-border) 72%, transparent);
  background:
    linear-gradient(180deg, color-mix(in srgb, var(--ras-panel-2) 34%, transparent), transparent 160px),
    color-mix(in srgb, var(--ras-panel) 90%, transparent);
}

.section-row {
  gap: .7rem;
}

.section-row p,
.page-header p,
.workspace-hero p,
.model-readiness-head p,
.model-catalog-head p,
.model-health-card p,
.model-builder-panel p,
.warsat-dashboard .text-body-secondary,
.workspace-help-text,
.test-checklist-item p,
.setup-step-body p {
  max-width: 72ch;
}

.models-view .model-builder-panel p,
.models-view .model-health-card p,
.warsat-dashboard .text-body-secondary,
.workspaces-view .workspace-help-text,
.settings-view .text-body-secondary {
  display: -webkit-box;
  overflow: hidden;
  -webkit-box-orient: vertical;
  -webkit-line-clamp: 2;
}

.model-readiness-grid,
.knowledge-stat-grid,
.run-summary-grid,
.warsat-summary-strip,
.model-catalog-meta,
.warsat-model-finder-meta {
  gap: .45rem;
}

.model-readiness-step,
.stat-card,
.knowledge-stat-grid > *,
.warsat-summary-strip > *,
.model-catalog-meta span,
.model-catalog-meta strong,
.warsat-model-finder-meta span,
.warsat-model-finder-meta strong {
  min-height: auto;
  padding: .58rem .65rem;
}

.model-readiness-step p,
.model-catalog-row small,
.warsat-model-result small,
.workspace-root-main small,
.workspace-entry-name small,
.task-run-info dd,
.task-card .meta-row span {
  overflow: hidden;
  text-overflow: ellipsis;
  white-space: nowrap;
}

.model-readiness-step strong,
.model-readiness-step p,
.model-readiness-step .ras-button {
  white-space: normal;
  overflow-wrap: anywhere;
}

.models-content,
.settings-pane {
  overflow-x: hidden;
}

.model-catalog-row-meta,
.warsat-model-result-tags,
.workspace-root-actions,
.model-action-row,
.warsat-model-finder-actions,
.models-header-actions {
  gap: .4rem;
}

.model-catalog-row-meta em,
.warsat-model-result-tags em,
.workspace-permission,
.status-pill,
.model-health-pill {
  padding-block: .12rem;
}

.model-catalog-list,
.warsat-model-result-list,
.workspace-entry-list,
.activity-list {
  scrollbar-gutter: stable;
}

.models-view .local-model-panel,
.models-view .api-model-panel {
  padding: 0;
}

.models-view .local-model-panel[open],
.models-view .api-model-panel[open] {
  padding: .85rem;
}

.models-view .local-model-panel > summary,
.models-view .api-model-panel > summary {
  min-height: 50px;
  padding: .72rem .85rem;
}

.workspace-guide[open] {
  display: grid;
  gap: .65rem;
}

.workspace-guide > summary {
  min-height: 48px;
}

.workspace-guide > .guide-card {
  margin-top: .65rem;
}

.activity-tabs {
  overflow-x: auto;
  scrollbar-gutter: stable;
}

.activity-tab {
  flex: 0 0 auto;
}

.tool-relay-card,
.task-card,
.approval-card,
.workspace-root-card,
.workspace-entry-row,
.model-catalog-row,
.warsat-model-result {
  border-color: color-mix(in srgb, var(--ras-border) 70%, transparent);
}

.tool-relay-card p,
.task-message-block,
.approval-card p,
.model-warning,
.knowledge-explainer {
  line-height: 1.45;
}

.knowledge-explainer p,
.mount-intro p,
.model-warning span {
  margin-bottom: 0;
}

.settings-view .setup-ordered-list,
.settings-view .test-checklist-grid {
  margin-top: .65rem;
}

@media (min-width: 1040px) {
  .model-readiness-grid {
    grid-template-columns: repeat(4, minmax(0, 1fr));
  }

  .warsat-summary-strip {
    grid-template-columns: repeat(4, minmax(0, 1fr));
  }
}

@media (min-width: 1401px) {
  .workspace-layout {
    grid-template-columns: minmax(260px, .82fr) minmax(420px, 1.28fr) minmax(320px, .9fr);
  }
}

@media (max-width: 1180px) {
  .workspace-layout,
  .model-catalog-layout,
  .warsat-model-finder-grid {
    gap: .75rem;
  }

  .workspace-side,
  .workspace-main,
  .workspace-preview-panel {
    padding: .75rem;
  }

  .warsat-dashboard.has-plan {
    grid-template-columns: 1fr;
  }
}

@media (max-width: 760px) {
  .warsat-summary-strip {
    grid-template-columns: 1fr;
  }

  .warsat-workflow-steps {
    display: flex;
    overflow-x: auto;
    padding-bottom: .2rem;
  }

  .warsat-workflow-steps li {
    flex: 0 0 160px;
  }
}

@media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce) {
  *,
  *::before,
  *::after {
    animation-duration: .01ms !important;
    animation-iteration-count: 1 !important;
    scroll-behavior: auto !important;
    transition-duration: .01ms !important;
  }
}

/* GUI mechanics alignment: operations workspace */
.activity-view .activity-workspace {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: minmax(210px, 250px) minmax(0, 1fr) minmax(240px, 300px);
  grid-template-areas: "activity-nav activity-main activity-inspector";
  align-items: stretch;
  gap: .85rem;
  min-height: 0;
  overflow: hidden;
  padding-top: .8rem;
}

.activity-nav-panel,
.activity-main-panel,
.activity-inspector-panel {
  min-height: 0;
  border: 1px solid color-mix(in srgb, var(--ras-border) 72%, transparent);
  border-radius: 8px;
  background:
    linear-gradient(180deg, color-mix(in srgb, var(--ras-panel-2) 30%, transparent), transparent 170px),
    color-mix(in srgb, var(--ras-panel) 92%, transparent);
  box-shadow: none;
}

.activity-nav-panel {
  grid-area: activity-nav;
  display: grid;
  grid-template-rows: auto minmax(0, 1fr);
  gap: .65rem;
  padding: .75rem;
  overflow: hidden;
}

.activity-main-panel {
  grid-area: activity-main;
  overflow: hidden;
  padding: .75rem;
}

.activity-inspector-panel {
  grid-area: activity-inspector;
  display: grid;
  align-content: start;
  gap: .75rem;
  overflow: auto;
  padding: .75rem;
}

.activity-status-card {
  display: grid;
  gap: .2rem;
  border: 1px solid color-mix(in srgb, var(--ras-accent) 22%, var(--ras-border));
  border-radius: 8px;
  background: color-mix(in srgb, var(--ras-accent) 8%, var(--ras-panel));
  padding: .75rem;
}

.activity-status-card strong {
  font-size: 1.35rem;
  line-height: 1;
}

.activity-status-card span:last-child {
  color: var(--ras-muted);
  font-size: .84rem;
}

.activity-nav-panel .activity-tab-shell {
  min-height: 0;
  border: 0;
  background: transparent;
  padding: 0;
}

.activity-nav-panel .activity-tabs {
  display: grid;
  align-content: start;
  gap: .35rem;
  overflow: auto;
  padding-right: .1rem;
}

.activity-nav-panel .activity-tab {
  width: 100%;
  min-height: 48px;
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: minmax(0, 1fr) auto;
  align-items: center;
  gap: .5rem;
  border-radius: 8px;
  text-align: left;
}

.activity-nav-panel .activity-tab span {
  min-width: 0;
  overflow: hidden;
  text-overflow: ellipsis;
}

.activity-nav-panel .activity-tab small {
  color: var(--ras-muted);
  font-size: .72rem;
  font-weight: 850;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  white-space: nowrap;
}

.activity-nav-panel .activity-tab.is-active small {
  color: color-mix(in srgb, var(--ras-accent) 78%, var(--ras-muted));
}

.activity-nav-panel .activity-tab-context {
  border-top: 1px solid color-mix(in srgb, var(--ras-border) 70%, transparent);
  padding-top: .65rem;
}

.activity-main-panel .activity-panel {
  height: 100%;
  padding: 0 .2rem 0 0;
}

.activity-main-panel .run-summary-grid,
.activity-main-panel .activity-list,
.activity-main-panel .active-run-panel,
.activity-main-panel .pipeline-panel,
.activity-main-panel .approval-card,
.activity-main-panel .empty-panel {
  max-width: none;
}

.activity-main-panel .active-run-panel,
.activity-main-panel .pipeline-panel,
.activity-main-panel .approval-card,
.activity-main-panel .empty-panel {
  margin-top: .75rem;
}

.activity-inspector-head {
  display: grid;
  gap: .2rem;
}

.activity-inspector-head h2,
.activity-current-run h3 {
  margin: 0;
  font-size: .96rem;
}

.activity-inspector-stats {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: repeat(2, minmax(0, 1fr));
  gap: .45rem;
  margin: 0;
}

.activity-inspector-stats div {
  min-width: 0;
  border: 1px solid color-mix(in srgb, var(--ras-border) 70%, transparent);
  border-radius: 8px;
  background: color-mix(in srgb, var(--ras-panel-2) 28%, transparent);
  padding: .58rem;
}

.activity-inspector-stats dt {
  color: var(--ras-muted);
  font-size: .7rem;
  font-weight: 850;
  text-transform: uppercase;
}

.activity-inspector-stats dd {
  margin: .1rem 0 0;
  font-size: 1.15rem;
  font-weight: 900;
}

.activity-inspector-actions {
  display: flex;
  flex-wrap: wrap;
  gap: .4rem;
}

.activity-current-run {
  display: grid;
  gap: .45rem;
  border-top: 1px solid color-mix(in srgb, var(--ras-border) 70%, transparent);
  padding-top: .7rem;
}

.activity-current-run p {
  margin: 0;
  color: var(--ras-muted);
  font-size: .86rem;
  line-height: 1.45;
}

.activity-current-run-card {
  width: 100%;
  display: grid;
  gap: .42rem;
  border: 1px solid color-mix(in srgb, var(--ras-border) 70%, transparent);
  border-radius: 8px;
  background: color-mix(in srgb, var(--ras-panel-2) 28%, transparent);
  color: var(--ras-text);
  padding: .68rem;
  text-align: left;
}

.activity-current-run-card strong,
.activity-current-run-card small {
  min-width: 0;
  overflow: hidden;
  text-overflow: ellipsis;
  white-space: nowrap;
}

.activity-current-run-card small {
  color: var(--ras-muted);
}

@media (max-width: 1240px) {
  .activity-view .activity-workspace {
    grid-template-columns: minmax(190px, 230px) minmax(0, 1fr);
    grid-template-areas:
      "activity-nav activity-main"
      "activity-inspector activity-inspector";
    grid-auto-rows: minmax(0, auto);
    align-items: start;
    overflow: auto;
  }

  .activity-inspector-panel {
    grid-template-columns: minmax(0, .75fr) minmax(0, 1fr) minmax(0, 1fr);
    align-items: start;
    min-height: 150px;
    overflow: visible;
  }

  .activity-inspector-head {
    align-self: stretch;
  }
}

@media (max-width: 820px) {
  .activity-view .activity-workspace {
    grid-template-columns: minmax(0, 1fr);
    grid-template-areas:
      "activity-nav"
      "activity-main"
      "activity-inspector";
    align-content: start;
    overflow: auto;
  }

  .activity-nav-panel {
    grid-template-rows: auto;
    overflow: visible;
  }

  .activity-nav-panel .activity-tabs {
    display: flex;
    overflow-x: auto;
    padding-bottom: .15rem;
  }

  .activity-nav-panel .activity-tab {
    flex: 0 0 152px;
  }

  .activity-inspector-panel {
    grid-template-columns: minmax(0, 1fr);
    min-height: 0;
  }

  .activity-inspector-stats {
    grid-template-columns: repeat(4, minmax(0, 1fr));
  }
}

@media (max-width: 560px) {
  .activity-inspector-stats,
  .run-summary-grid {
    grid-template-columns: repeat(2, minmax(0, 1fr));
  }
}

/* GUI mechanics alignment: shared view workspaces */
.gui-workspace {
  min-height: 0;
  overflow: hidden;
}

.models-gui-workspace,
.settings-gui-workspace,
.warsat-gui-workspace {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: minmax(220px, 260px) minmax(0, 1fr) minmax(240px, 310px);
  grid-template-areas: "gui-sidebar gui-main gui-inspector";
  align-items: stretch;
  gap: .85rem;
}

.models-gui-workspace {
  grid-template-columns: minmax(220px, 260px) minmax(0, 1fr);
  grid-template-areas: "gui-sidebar gui-main";
}

.gui-sidebar {
  grid-area: gui-sidebar;
  min-width: 0;
}

.gui-main {
  grid-area: gui-main;
  min-width: 0;
  min-height: 0;
  overflow: auto;
}

.gui-inspector {
  grid-area: gui-inspector;
  min-width: 0;
  min-height: 0;
  overflow: auto;
}

.models-gui-sidebar,
.models-gui-main,
.models-gui-inspector,
.settings-gui-workspace > .settings-nav,
.settings-gui-workspace > .settings-panels,
.settings-inspector-panel,
.warsat-gui-sidebar,
.warsat-gui-main,
.warsat-gui-inspector {
  min-height: 0;
  border: 1px solid color-mix(in srgb, var(--ras-border) 72%, transparent);
  border-radius: 8px;
  background:
    linear-gradient(180deg, color-mix(in srgb, var(--ras-panel-2) 30%, transparent), transparent 170px),
    color-mix(in srgb, var(--ras-panel) 92%, transparent);
  box-shadow: none;
}

.models-gui-sidebar,
.models-gui-main,
.models-gui-inspector,
.settings-gui-workspace > .settings-panels,
.settings-inspector-panel,
.warsat-gui-sidebar,
.warsat-gui-main,
.warsat-gui-inspector {
  display: grid;
  align-content: start;
  gap: .85rem;
  padding: .75rem;
}

.models-gui-sidebar .model-readiness-panel,
.models-gui-main .models-grid,
.models-gui-main .model-catalog-panel,
.models-gui-main .model-builder-panel,
.models-gui-inspector .model-builder-panel,
.models-gui-inspector .advanced-model-registry,
.warsat-gui-sidebar .warsat-summary-strip,
.warsat-gui-sidebar .warsat-workflow-steps,
.warsat-gui-sidebar .warsat-hardware-panel,
.warsat-gui-main .warsat-panel,
.warsat-gui-inspector .warsat-library-panel {
  max-width: none;
  margin: 0;
}

.models-gui-sidebar .model-readiness-panel,
.models-gui-inspector .model-builder-panel,
.models-gui-inspector .advanced-model-registry,
.warsat-gui-sidebar .warsat-hardware-panel,
.warsat-gui-inspector .warsat-library-panel {
  box-shadow: none !important;
}

.models-gui-sidebar .model-readiness-grid {
  grid-template-columns: minmax(0, 1fr);
}

.models-gui-sidebar .model-readiness-head,
.models-gui-sidebar .model-readiness-summary,
.models-gui-main .model-catalog-head,
.settings-inspector-panel {
  display: grid;
  gap: .55rem;
}

.models-gui-main .models-grid {
  grid-template-columns: minmax(0, 1fr);
}

.models-gui-main .model-readiness-grid {
  grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(180px, 1fr));
}

.models-gui-main .model-readiness-step {
  min-height: 128px;
}

.models-gui-main .model-catalog-layout,
.warsat-gui-main .warsat-model-finder-grid {
  grid-template-columns: minmax(180px, .45fr) minmax(0, 1fr);
}

.models-gui-main .model-catalog-detail,
.warsat-gui-main .warsat-model-selected {
  grid-column: 1 / -1;
}

.models-gui-inspector details,
.warsat-gui-inspector details {
  width: 100%;
}

.settings-gui-workspace {
  padding: .85rem;
}

.settings-gui-workspace > .settings-nav {
  border-right: 1px solid color-mix(in srgb, var(--ras-border) 72%, transparent);
  padding: .75rem;
}

.settings-gui-workspace > .settings-panels {
  overflow: auto;
}

.settings-gui-workspace .settings-pane {
  max-width: none;
}

.settings-inspector-panel h2 {
  margin: 0;
  font-size: 1rem;
}

.settings-inspector-panel p {
  margin: 0;
  color: var(--ras-muted);
  font-size: .88rem;
  line-height: 1.45;
}

.warsat-gui-sidebar .warsat-summary-strip {
  grid-template-columns: minmax(0, 1fr);
}

.warsat-gui-sidebar .warsat-workflow-steps {
  grid-template-columns: minmax(0, 1fr);
}

.warsat-gui-sidebar .warsat-hardware-grid {
  grid-template-columns: minmax(0, 1fr);
}

.warsat-gui-main .warsat-runtime-card {
  grid-template-columns: minmax(0, 1fr);
}

.warsat-gui-inspector .warsat-profile-strip {
  grid-template-columns: minmax(0, 1fr);
}

.warsat-gui-inspector .warsat-runtime-protocol-panel .row {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: minmax(0, 1fr);
}

.warsat-gui-inspector .warsat-runtime-protocol-panel [class*="col-"] {
  width: 100%;
}

.warsat-gui-workspace > .warsat-plan-card {
  grid-area: warsat-plan;
  grid-column: 1 / -1;
  grid-row: auto;
  max-width: none;
  margin: 0;
  position: relative;
  top: auto;
  z-index: 0;
  max-height: none;
  overflow: visible;
}

.warsat-gui-workspace {
  grid-template-areas:
    "gui-sidebar gui-main gui-inspector"
    "warsat-plan warsat-plan warsat-plan";
  grid-template-rows: minmax(0, auto) auto;
}

/* Low-scroll operation surfaces */
.activity-command-strip,
.models-command-strip,
.warsat-command-strip {
  flex: 0 0 auto;
  position: relative;
  z-index: 4;
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: minmax(0, 1fr) auto;
  align-items: center;
  gap: .65rem;
  margin: .65rem .75rem 0;
  padding: .55rem .65rem;
  border: 1px solid color-mix(in srgb, var(--ras-border) 74%, transparent);
  border-radius: 8px;
  background:
    linear-gradient(90deg, color-mix(in srgb, var(--ras-accent) 10%, transparent), transparent 58%),
    color-mix(in srgb, var(--ras-panel) 94%, transparent);
}

.activity-command-strip {
  grid-template-columns: minmax(0, 1fr) minmax(220px, .35fr);
}

.activity-tabs-compact {
  display: flex;
  flex-wrap: wrap;
  gap: .4rem;
}

.activity-tabs-compact .activity-tab {
  flex: 1 1 112px;
  min-height: 38px;
  padding: .4rem .55rem;
}

.activity-command-strip .activity-tab-context {
  margin: 0;
  color: var(--ras-muted);
  font-size: .84rem;
}

.models-command-status,
.warsat-command-status {
  min-width: 0;
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: .5rem;
  flex-wrap: wrap;
}

.models-command-status strong,
.warsat-command-status strong {
  min-width: 0;
  overflow: hidden;
  text-overflow: ellipsis;
  white-space: nowrap;
}

.models-command-status small,
.warsat-command-status small {
  color: var(--ras-muted);
}

.models-command-actions,
.warsat-command-actions {
  display: flex;
  justify-content: flex-end;
  align-items: center;
  gap: .45rem;
  flex-wrap: wrap;
}

.activity-view .activity-workspace,
.models-content.models-gui-workspace,
.warsat-dashboard.warsat-gui-workspace {
  flex: 1 1 auto;
  position: relative;
  z-index: 1;
  min-height: 0;
  overflow: hidden;
  padding: .75rem;
}

.activity-main-panel,
.models-gui-sidebar,
.models-gui-main,
.models-gui-inspector,
.warsat-gui-sidebar,
.warsat-gui-main,
.warsat-gui-inspector {
  overflow: auto;
}

.activity-nav-panel {
  grid-template-rows: auto;
}

.activity-nav-panel .activity-status-card {
  padding: .6rem;
}

.activity-nav-panel .activity-status-card strong {
  font-size: 1.12rem;
}

.activity-inspector-actions {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(108px, 1fr));
}

.models-gui-sidebar .model-readiness-panel {
  gap: .55rem;
  padding: .72rem;
}

.models-gui-sidebar .model-readiness-head p,
.models-gui-sidebar .model-readiness-step p {
  display: none;
}

.models-gui-sidebar .model-readiness-step {
  gap: .45rem;
  padding: .58rem;
}

.models-gui-sidebar .model-readiness-step .ras-button {
  min-height: 34px;
  padding: .36rem .55rem;
}

.models-nav-panel {
  align-content: start;
}

.models-gui-inspector .model-side-summary {
  box-shadow: none;
}

.models-gui-inspector .model-side-actions {
  grid-template-columns: minmax(0, 1fr);
}

.models-gui-main .model-catalog-list,
.warsat-gui-main .warsat-model-result-list {
  max-height: min(38dvh, 360px);
  overflow: auto;
}

.warsat-model-finder {
  order: 1;
}

.warsat-launch-recipe {
  order: 2;
}

.warsat-runtime-manager {
  order: 3;
}

.warsat-gui-sidebar .warsat-summary-strip {
  grid-template-columns: repeat(2, minmax(0, 1fr));
}

.warsat-gui-sidebar .warsat-workflow-steps {
  grid-template-columns: repeat(2, minmax(0, 1fr));
}

.warsat-gui-sidebar .warsat-workflow-steps li {
  min-height: 36px;
  padding: .42rem .5rem;
}

.warsat-gui-sidebar .warsat-hardware-panel .text-body-secondary {
  display: none;
}

.warsat-gui-sidebar .warsat-hardware-grid {
  max-height: 180px;
  overflow: auto;
}

.warsat-gui-main .warsat-panel > .card-body {
  padding: .85rem;
}

.warsat-form-section,
.warsat-tuning-panel {
  padding: .65rem;
}

.warsat-tuning-panel:not([open]) {
  padding: .52rem .65rem;
}

.warsat-tuning-panel summary {
  min-height: 36px;
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
}

.workspaces-gui-workspace,
.archive-gui-workspace,
.trials-gui-workspace {
  gap: .85rem;
}

.archive-gui-workspace .archive-sidebar,
.archive-gui-workspace .archive-editor,
.archive-gui-workspace .archive-support,
.trials-gui-workspace .trials-compose,
.trials-gui-workspace .trial-run-list {
  border-color: color-mix(in srgb, var(--ras-border) 72%, transparent);
  background:
    linear-gradient(180deg, color-mix(in srgb, var(--ras-panel-2) 30%, transparent), transparent 170px),
    color-mix(in srgb, var(--ras-panel) 92%, transparent);
  box-shadow: none;
}

@media (max-width: 1320px) {
  .models-gui-workspace,
  .settings-gui-workspace,
  .warsat-gui-workspace {
    grid-template-columns: minmax(210px, 250px) minmax(0, 1fr);
    grid-template-areas:
      "gui-sidebar gui-main"
      "gui-inspector gui-inspector";
    grid-auto-rows: minmax(0, auto);
    align-items: start;
    overflow: auto;
  }

  .warsat-gui-workspace {
    grid-template-areas:
      "gui-sidebar gui-main"
      "gui-inspector gui-inspector"
      "warsat-plan warsat-plan";
  }

  .models-gui-inspector,
  .settings-inspector-panel,
  .warsat-gui-inspector {
    grid-template-columns: repeat(2, minmax(0, 1fr));
    align-items: start;
    overflow: visible;
  }

  .settings-inspector-panel .activity-inspector-stats {
    grid-template-columns: repeat(2, minmax(0, 1fr));
  }
}

@media (max-width: 1320px) and (min-width: 1081px) {
  .models-gui-workspace {
    grid-template-columns: minmax(190px, 220px) minmax(0, 1fr);
    grid-template-areas: "gui-sidebar gui-main";
    grid-auto-rows: minmax(0, 1fr);
    align-items: stretch;
    overflow: hidden;
  }
}

@media (max-width: 1320px) and (max-height: 820px) {
  .settings-inspector-panel {
    display: none;
  }
}

@media (max-width: 920px) {
  .models-gui-workspace,
  .settings-gui-workspace,
  .warsat-gui-workspace {
    grid-template-columns: minmax(0, 1fr);
    grid-template-areas:
      "gui-sidebar"
      "gui-main"
      "gui-inspector";
    align-content: start;
  }

  .models-gui-workspace {
    grid-template-areas:
      "gui-sidebar"
      "gui-main";
    grid-template-rows: auto auto;
    align-items: start;
    overflow: auto;
  }

  .models-content.models-gui-workspace {
    overflow: auto;
  }

  .models-gui-main {
    overflow: visible;
  }

  .warsat-gui-workspace {
    grid-template-areas:
      "gui-sidebar"
      "gui-main"
      "gui-inspector"
      "warsat-plan";
  }

  .models-gui-sidebar,
  .settings-gui-workspace > .settings-nav,
  .warsat-gui-sidebar {
    overflow: visible;
  }

  .model-section-tabs {
    display: flex;
    overflow-x: auto;
    padding-bottom: .25rem;
  }

  .model-section-tab {
    flex: 0 0 168px;
  }

  .settings-gui-workspace > .settings-nav {
    display: flex;
    overflow-x: auto;
    padding-bottom: .85rem;
  }

  .settings-gui-workspace .settings-tab {
    flex: 0 0 154px;
  }

  .models-gui-inspector,
  .settings-inspector-panel,
  .warsat-gui-inspector {
    grid-template-columns: minmax(0, 1fr);
  }

  .models-gui-main .model-catalog-layout,
  .warsat-gui-main .warsat-model-finder-grid {
    grid-template-columns: minmax(0, 1fr);
  }
}

@media (max-width: 620px) {
  .models-gui-workspace,
  .settings-gui-workspace,
  .warsat-gui-workspace,
  .workspaces-gui-workspace,
  .archive-gui-workspace,
  .trials-gui-workspace {
    gap: .65rem;
  }

  .models-gui-sidebar,
  .models-gui-main,
  .models-gui-inspector,
  .settings-gui-workspace > .settings-nav,
  .settings-gui-workspace > .settings-panels,
  .settings-inspector-panel,
  .warsat-gui-sidebar,
  .warsat-gui-main,
  .warsat-gui-inspector {
    padding: .65rem;
  }
}


==================================================
FILE: .\models\.gitkeep
==================================================

  </head>
  <body>
    <div id='root'></div>
  </body>
</html>
<template id="playwrightReportBase64">data:application/zip;base64,</template>

==================================================
FILE: .\scripts\capture-gui-preview.mjs
==================================================

import { chromium } from "@playwright/test";
import { mkdirSync } from "node:fs";

const baseUrl = process.env.RASPUTIN_TEST_BASE_URL || "http://127.0.0.1:8899";
const outputRoot = "test-results/gui-preview";
const variants = ["warmind-console", "operator-desk", "archive-studio", "rasputin-candidate"];
const screens = ["home", "workspaces", "activity", "models", "warsat", "settings", "panels"];
const viewports = [
  ["desktop", { width: 1440, height: 1100 }],
  ["mobile", { width: 390, height: 900 }],
];

mkdirSync(outputRoot, { recursive: true });

const browser = await chromium.launch();
try {
  for (const [viewportName, viewport] of viewports) {
    const page = await browser.newPage({ viewport });
    for (const variant of variants) {
      const folder = `${outputRoot}/${variant}`;
      mkdirSync(folder, { recursive: true });
      for (const screen of screens) {
        await page.goto(`${baseUrl}/preview/${screen}`, { waitUntil: "networkidle" });
        await page.locator("[data-testid='gui-preview-variant-select']").selectOption(variant);
        await page.locator("[data-testid='gui-preview-theme-select']").selectOption("rasputin-dark");
        await page.locator("[data-testid='gui-preview-viewport-select']").selectOption(viewportName);
        await page.locator("[data-testid='gui-preview-view']").waitFor({ state: "visible" });
        await page.screenshot({ path: `${folder}/${viewportName}-${screen}.png`, fullPage: true });
      }
    }
    await page.close();
  }
} finally {
  await browser.close();
}

console.log(`Captured GUI preview screenshots in ${outputRoot}`);


==================================================
FILE: .\scripts\check-repo-safety.ps1
==================================================

param(
  [switch]$StagedOnly
)

$ErrorActionPreference = "Stop"

$blockedPathPatterns = @(
  "^data(/|$)",
  "^workspace/.*",
  "^models/.*",
  "^output(/|$)",
  "^testdata(/|$)",
  "^playwright-report(/|$)",
  "^test-results(/|$)",
  "^frontend(/|$)",
  "(^|/)auth\.json$",
  "(^|/)telegram\.json$",
  "(^|/)security\.json$",
  "(^|/)models\.json$",
  "(^|/)workspace\.json$",
  "(^|/)preferences\.json$",
  "(^|/)output\.json$",
  "(^|/)audit\.jsonl$",
  "(^|/)memory\.json$",
  "(^|/)memory\.json\.backup-.*$",
  "(^|/)rasputin\.db.*$",
  "(^|/)rag_index\.json$",
  "(^|/)graph\.json$",
  "\.(gguf|safetensors|pt|pth|onnx|ckpt)$"
)

$allowedTracked = @(
  "workspace/.gitkeep",
  "models/.gitkeep"
)

function Normalize-RepoPath {
  param([string]$Path)
  return ($Path -replace "\\", "/").Trim()
}

function Test-BlockedPath {
  param([string]$Path)
  $normalized = Normalize-RepoPath $Path
  if ($allowedTracked -contains $normalized) {
    return $false
  }
  foreach ($pattern in $blockedPathPatterns) {
    if ($normalized -match $pattern) {
      return $true
    }
  }
  return $false
}

function Get-GitLines {
  param([string[]]$Arguments)
  $lines = & git @Arguments
  if ($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0) {
    throw "git $($Arguments -join ' ') failed with exit code $LASTEXITCODE"
  }
  return @($lines | Where-Object { $_ })
}

$tracked = if ($StagedOnly) { @() } else { Get-GitLines @("ls-files") }
$staged = Get-GitLines @("diff", "--cached", "--name-only")

$blockedTracked = @($tracked | Where-Object { Test-BlockedPath $_ })
$blockedStaged = @($staged | Where-Object { Test-BlockedPath $_ })

if ($blockedTracked.Count -or $blockedStaged.Count) {
  Write-Host "Rasputin repo safety check failed." -ForegroundColor Red
  if ($blockedTracked.Count) {
    Write-Host ""
    Write-Host "Tracked private/local files:" -ForegroundColor Yellow
    $blockedTracked | Sort-Object | ForEach-Object { Write-Host "  $_" }
  }
  if ($blockedStaged.Count) {
    Write-Host ""
    Write-Host "Staged private/local files:" -ForegroundColor Yellow
    $blockedStaged | Sort-Object | ForEach-Object { Write-Host "  $_" }
  }
  exit 1
}

Write-Host "Rasputin repo safety check passed."

==================================================
FILE: .\scripts\test-gui-preview.ps1
==================================================

param(
  [int]$Port = 8899,
  [switch]$SkipBuild,
  [switch]$KeepRunning
)

$ErrorActionPreference = "Stop"
$env:RASPUTIN_GUI_TEST_PORT = "$Port"
$env:RASPUTIN_TEST_BASE_URL = "http://127.0.0.1:$Port"
$env:RASPUTIN_GUI_PREVIEW = "1"
$composeArgs = @("compose", "-f", "docker-compose.gui-test.yml")

function Invoke-NativeChecked {
  param(
    [string]$Command,
    [string[]]$Arguments
  )
  & $Command @Arguments
  if ($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0) {
    throw "$Command failed with exit code $LASTEXITCODE"
  }
}

try {
  Invoke-NativeChecked "powershell" @("-ExecutionPolicy", "Bypass", "-File", "./scripts/check-repo-safety.ps1")
  Invoke-NativeChecked "npm" @("run", "build")

  if ($SkipBuild) {
    Invoke-NativeChecked "docker" ($composeArgs + @("up", "-d"))
  } else {
    Invoke-NativeChecked "docker" ($composeArgs + @("up", "-d", "--build"))
  }

  $ready = $false
  for ($i = 0; $i -lt 45; $i++) {
    try {
      $health = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "$env:RASPUTIN_TEST_BASE_URL/api/health" -TimeoutSec 3
      if ($health.ok -eq $true) {
        $ready = $true
        break
      }
    } catch {
      Start-Sleep -Seconds 1
    }
  }

  if (-not $ready) {
    docker @composeArgs logs --tail 120 rasputin-gui-test
    throw "RasputinTest GUI preview did not become healthy at $env:RASPUTIN_TEST_BASE_URL"
  }

  Invoke-NativeChecked "npx" @("playwright", "test", "tests/ui/guiPreview.spec.mjs")
  Write-Host "RasputinTest GUI preview tests passed at $env:RASPUTIN_TEST_BASE_URL"
} finally {
  if (-not $KeepRunning) {
    docker @composeArgs down
  }
}


==================================================
FILE: .\scripts\test.ps1
==================================================

param(
  [int]$Port = 8877,
  [switch]$SkipBuild,
  [switch]$Ui,
  [switch]$KeepRunning
)

$ErrorActionPreference = "Stop"
$env:RASPUTIN_TEST_PORT = "$Port"
$baseUrl = "http://127.0.0.1:$Port"
$composeArgs = @("compose", "-f", "docker-compose.test.yml")
$runId = "{0}-{1}" -f $Port, ([Guid]::NewGuid().ToString("N").Substring(0, 8))
$runRoot = "./testdata/runs/$runId"
$env:RASPUTIN_TEST_DATA_DIR = "$runRoot/data"
$env:RASPUTIN_TEST_WORKSPACE_DIR = "$runRoot/workspace"
New-Item -ItemType Directory -Force -Path $env:RASPUTIN_TEST_DATA_DIR | Out-Null
New-Item -ItemType Directory -Force -Path $env:RASPUTIN_TEST_WORKSPACE_DIR | Out-Null

function Invoke-NativeChecked {
  param(
    [string]$Command,
    [string[]]$Arguments
  )
  & $Command @Arguments
  if ($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0) {
    throw "$Command failed with exit code $LASTEXITCODE"
  }
}

try {
  Invoke-NativeChecked "powershell" @("-ExecutionPolicy", "Bypass", "-File", "./scripts/check-repo-safety.ps1")

  if ($Ui) {
    Invoke-NativeChecked "npm" @("run", "build")
  }

  if ($SkipBuild) {
    Invoke-NativeChecked "docker" ($composeArgs + @("up", "-d"))
  } else {
    Invoke-NativeChecked "docker" ($composeArgs + @("up", "-d", "--build"))
  }

  $ready = $false
  for ($i = 0; $i -lt 45; $i++) {
    try {
      $health = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "$baseUrl/api/health" -TimeoutSec 3
      if ($health.ok -eq $true) {
        $ready = $true
        break
      }
    } catch {
      Start-Sleep -Seconds 1
    }
  }

  if (-not $ready) {
    docker @composeArgs logs --tail 120 rasputin-wrapper-test
    throw "Rasputin test container did not become healthy at $baseUrl"
  }

  Invoke-NativeChecked "docker" ($composeArgs + @("exec", "-T", "rasputin-wrapper-test", "python", "-m", "unittest", "tests.testBackendSmoke"))
  Invoke-NativeChecked "docker" ($composeArgs + @("exec", "-T", "rasputin-wrapper-test", "python", "/app/tests/liveSmoke.py"))

  if ($Ui) {
    $env:RASPUTIN_TEST_BASE_URL = $baseUrl
    Invoke-NativeChecked "npm" @("run", "testUi")
  }

  Write-Host "Rasputin test harness passed at $baseUrl"
  Write-Host "Test state was isolated under $runRoot"
} finally {
  if (-not $KeepRunning) {
    docker @composeArgs down
  }
}


==================================================
FILE: .\scripts\test.sh
==================================================

#!/usr/bin/env sh
set -eu

port="${RASPUTIN_TEST_PORT:-8877}"
baseUrl="http://127.0.0.1:${port}"
export RASPUTIN_TEST_PORT="$port"

cleanup() {
  if [ "${RASPUTIN_KEEP_RUNNING:-0}" != "1" ]; then
    docker compose -f docker-compose.test.yml down
  fi
}

trap cleanup EXIT

if [ "${RASPUTIN_RUN_UI:-0}" = "1" ]; then
  npm run build
fi

if [ "${RASPUTIN_SKIP_BUILD:-0}" = "1" ]; then
  docker compose -f docker-compose.test.yml up -d
else
  docker compose -f docker-compose.test.yml up -d --build
fi

ready=0
i=0
while [ "$i" -lt 45 ]; do
  if python - "$baseUrl" <<'PY'
import json
import sys
import urllib.request

baseUrl = sys.argv[1]
try:
    data = json.loads(urllib.request.urlopen(baseUrl + "/api/health", timeout=3).read().decode("utf-8"))
    sys.exit(0 if data.get("ok") else 1)
except Exception:
    sys.exit(1)
PY
  then
    ready=1
    break
  fi
  i=$((i + 1))
  sleep 1
done

if [ "$ready" != "1" ]; then
  docker compose -f docker-compose.test.yml logs --tail 120 rasputin-wrapper-test
  echo "Rasputin test container did not become healthy at ${baseUrl}" >&2
  exit 1
fi

docker compose -f docker-compose.test.yml exec -T rasputin-wrapper-test python -m unittest tests.testBackendSmoke
docker compose -f docker-compose.test.yml exec -T rasputin-wrapper-test python /app/tests/liveSmoke.py

if [ "${RASPUTIN_RUN_UI:-0}" = "1" ]; then
  RASPUTIN_TEST_BASE_URL="$baseUrl" npm run testUi
fi

echo "Rasputin test harness passed at ${baseUrl}"

﻿<!doctype html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
  <meta charset="utf-8" />
  <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1" />
  <title>Rasputin vs Odysseus Visual Comparison</title>
  <style>
    :root { color-scheme: dark; font-family: Inter, Segoe UI, Arial, sans-serif; }
    body { margin: 0; background: #0a0b0d; color: #f4f0ea; }
    .wrap { min-height: 100vh; padding: 18px; box-sizing: border-box; }
    .header { display: flex; justify-content: space-between; gap: 16px; align-items: end; margin-bottom: 14px; }
    h1 { margin: 0; font-size: 20px; letter-spacing: .02em; }
    .meta { color: #a9a19a; font-size: 12px; }
    .grid { display: grid; grid-template-columns: minmax(0, 1fr) minmax(0, 1fr); gap: 14px; }
    .panel { border: 1px solid #2b2422; background: #111316; border-radius: 14px; overflow: hidden; min-height: 0; }
    .label { display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: center; padding: 11px 13px; border-bottom: 1px solid #2b2422; background: #151515; }
    .label strong { font-size: 13px; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: .08em; }
    .label span { font-size: 12px; color: #b8aca1; }
    .shot { height: calc(100vh - 105px); min-height: 600px; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; background: #090a0c; }
    .shot img { width: 100%; height: 100%; object-fit: contain; display: block; }
    @media (max-width: 900px) { .grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr; } .shot { height: 56vh; } .header { align-items: start; flex-direction: column; } }
  </style>
</head>
<body>
  <main class="wrap">
    <div class="header">
      <h1>Visual UI Comparison</h1>
      <div class="meta">Left: local Rasputin test build at 127.0.0.1:8989. Right: Odysseus official README Chat &amp; Agents visual.</div>
    </div>
    <section class="grid" aria-label="Side by side application screenshots">
      <article class="panel">
        <div class="label"><strong>Rasputin</strong><span>Current local test build</span></div>
        <div class="shot"><img src="rasputin-home.png" alt="Rasputin home screen screenshot" /></div>
      </article>
      <article class="panel">
        <div class="label"><strong>Odysseus</strong><span>README Chat &amp; Agents demo</span></div>
        <div class="shot"><img src="odysseus-chat.gif" alt="Odysseus Chat and Agents README animation" /></div>
      </article>
    </section>
  </main>
</body>
</html>

﻿import http from "node:http";
import { readFile } from "node:fs/promises";
import { extname, join, normalize } from "node:path";

const root = process.cwd();
const types = new Map([
  [".html", "text/html; charset=utf-8"],
  [".png", "image/png"],
  [".gif", "image/gif"],
  [".css", "text/css; charset=utf-8"]
]);

const server = http.createServer(async (req, res) => {
  try {
    const url = new URL(req.url || "/", "http://127.0.0.1:8990");
    const rel = url.pathname === "/" ? "comparison.html" : url.pathname.slice(1);
    const target = normalize(join(root, rel));
    if (!target.startsWith(root)) {
      res.writeHead(403, { "content-type": "text/plain" });
      res.end("Forbidden");
      return;
    }
    const body = await readFile(target);
    res.writeHead(200, { "content-type": types.get(extname(target)) || "application/octet-stream" });
    res.end(body);
  } catch {
    res.writeHead(404, { "content-type": "text/plain" });
    res.end("Not found");
  }
});

server.listen(8990, "127.0.0.1");

import json, sys
print('boot noise from fixture', flush=True)
for line in sys.stdin:
    if not line.strip():
        continue
    msg = json.loads(line)
    mid = msg.get('id')
    method = msg.get('method')
    if method == 'initialize':
        result = {'protocolVersion':'2025-06-18','capabilities':{'tools':{},'resources':{},'prompts':{}},'serverInfo':{'name':'fake-caps','version':'1'}}
        print(json.dumps({'jsonrpc':'2.0','id':mid,'result':result}), flush=True)
    elif method == 'tools/list':
        print(json.dumps({'jsonrpc':'2.0','id':mid,'result':{'tools':[]}}), flush=True)
    elif method == 'resources/list':
        resource = {'uri':'file://local/readme.md','name':'Local Readme','description':'Read-only fixture resource','mimeType':'text/markdown'}
        print(json.dumps({'jsonrpc':'2.0','id':mid,'result':{'resources':[resource]}}), flush=True)
    elif method == 'prompts/list':
        prompt = {'name':'summarize-local','description':'Fixture prompt','arguments':[{'name':'topic','description':'Topic','required':True}]}
        print(json.dumps({'jsonrpc':'2.0','id':mid,'result':{'prompts':[prompt]}}), flush=True)
