import json, sys
for line in sys.stdin:
    if not line.strip():
        continue
    msg = json.loads(line)
    mid = msg.get('id')
    method = msg.get('method')
    if method == 'initialize':
        print(json.dumps({'jsonrpc':'2.0','id':mid,'result':{'protocolVersion':'2025-06-18','capabilities':{'tools':{}},'serverInfo':{'name':'fake-smoke','version':'1'}}}), flush=True)
    elif method == 'tools/list':
        tool = {'name':'echo','description':'Echo a short message','inputSchema':{'type':'object','properties':{'message':{'type':'string'}},'required':['message']}}
        print(json.dumps({'jsonrpc':'2.0','id':mid,'result':{'tools':[tool]}}), flush=True)
    elif method == 'tools/call':
        args = (msg.get('params') or {}).get('arguments') or {}
        text = args.get('message', '')
        print(json.dumps({'jsonrpc':'2.0','id':mid,'result':{'content':[{'type':'text','text':text}], 'structuredContent': {'echo': text}}}), flush=True)
    elif method in {'resources/list', 'prompts/list'}:
        print(json.dumps({'jsonrpc':'2.0','id':mid,'error':{'code':-32601,'message':'unsupported'}}), flush=True)

import json, sys
for line in sys.stdin:
    msg = json.loads(line)
    mid = msg.get('id')
    method = msg.get('method')
    if method == 'initialize':
        print(json.dumps({'jsonrpc':'2.0','id':mid,'result':{'protocolVersion':'2025-06-18','capabilities':{'tools':{}},'serverInfo':{'name':'bad-schema','version':'1'}}}), flush=True)
    elif method == 'tools/list':
        print(json.dumps({'jsonrpc':'2.0','id':mid,'result':{'tools':[{'name':'bad','inputSchema':'not-an-object'}]}}), flush=True)

==================================================
FILE: .\testdata\runs\8877-18e74fdf\workspace\fake_mcp_caps.py
==================================================

import json, sys
print('boot noise from fixture', flush=True)
for line in sys.stdin:
    if not line.strip():
        continue
    msg = json.loads(line)
    mid = msg.get('id')
    method = msg.get('method')
    if method == 'initialize':
        result = {'protocolVersion':'2025-06-18','capabilities':{'tools':{},'resources':{},'prompts':{}},'serverInfo':{'name':'fake-caps','version':'1'}}
        print(json.dumps({'jsonrpc':'2.0','id':mid,'result':result}), flush=True)
    elif method == 'tools/list':
        print(json.dumps({'jsonrpc':'2.0','id':mid,'result':{'tools':[]}}), flush=True)
    elif method == 'resources/list':
        resource = {'uri':'file://local/readme.md','name':'Local Readme','description':'Read-only fixture resource','mimeType':'text/markdown'}
        print(json.dumps({'jsonrpc':'2.0','id':mid,'result':{'resources':[resource]}}), flush=True)
    elif method == 'prompts/list':
        prompt = {'name':'summarize-local','description':'Fixture prompt','arguments':[{'name':'topic','description':'Topic','required':True}]}
        print(json.dumps({'jsonrpc':'2.0','id':mid,'result':{'prompts':[prompt]}}), flush=True)

==================================================
FILE: .\testdata\runs\8877-18e74fdf\workspace\fake_mcp_crash.py
==================================================

import sys
sys.exit(2)


==================================================
FILE: .\testdata\runs\8877-18e74fdf\workspace\fake_mcp_hang.py

import json, sys, time
for line in sys.stdin:
    msg = json.loads(line)
    mid = msg.get('id')
    method = msg.get('method')
    if method == 'initialize':
        print(json.dumps({'jsonrpc':'2.0','id':mid,'result':{'protocolVersion':'2025-06-18','capabilities':{'tools':{}},'serverInfo':{'name':'hang','version':'1'}}}), flush=True)
    elif method == 'tools/list':
        time.sleep(5)

==================================================
FILE: .\testdata\runs\8877-18e74fdf\workspace\fake_mcp_smoke.py
==================================================

import json, sys
for line in sys.stdin:
    if not line.strip():
        continue
    msg = json.loads(line)
    mid = msg.get('id')
    method = msg.get('method')
    if method == 'initialize':
        print(json.dumps({'jsonrpc':'2.0','id':mid,'result':{'protocolVersion':'2025-06-18','capabilities':{'tools':{}},'serverInfo':{'name':'fake-smoke','version':'1'}}}), flush=True)
    elif method == 'tools/list':
        tool = {'name':'echo','description':'Echo a short message','inputSchema':{'type':'object','properties':{'message':{'type':'string'}},'required':['message']}}
        print(json.dumps({'jsonrpc':'2.0','id':mid,'result':{'tools':[tool]}}), flush=True)
    elif method == 'tools/call':
        args = (msg.get('params') or {}).get('arguments') or {}
        text = args.get('message', '')
        print(json.dumps({'jsonrpc':'2.0','id':mid,'result':{'content':[{'type':'text','text':text}], 'structuredContent': {'echo': text}}}), flush=True)
    elif method in {'resources/list', 'prompts/list'}:
        print(json.dumps({'jsonrpc':'2.0','id':mid,'error':{'code':-32601,'message':'unsupported'}}), flush=True)

import json, sys
for line in sys.stdin:
    if not line.strip():
        continue
    msg = json.loads(line)
    mid = msg.get('id')
    method = msg.get('method')
    if method == 'initialize':
        print(json.dumps({'jsonrpc':'2.0','id':mid,'result':{'protocolVersion':'2025-06-18','capabilities':{'tools':{}},'serverInfo':{'name':'fake-smoke','version':'1'}}}), flush=True)
    elif method == 'tools/list':
        tool = {'name':'echo','description':'Echo a short message','inputSchema':{'type':'object','properties':{'message':{'type':'string'}},'required':['message']}}
        print(json.dumps({'jsonrpc':'2.0','id':mid,'result':{'tools':[tool]}}), flush=True)
    elif method == 'tools/call':
        args = (msg.get('params') or {}).get('arguments') or {}
        text = args.get('message', '')
        print(json.dumps({'jsonrpc':'2.0','id':mid,'result':{'content':[{'type':'text','text':text}], 'structuredContent': {'echo': text}}}), flush=True)
    elif method in {'resources/list', 'prompts/list'}:

for line in sys.stdin:
    msg = json.loads(line)
    mid = msg.get('id')
    method = msg.get('method')
    if method == 'initialize':
        print(json.dumps({'jsonrpc':'2.0','id':mid,'result':{'protocolVersion':'2025-06-18','capabilities':{'tools':{}},'serverInfo':{'name':'hang','version':'1'}}}), flush=True)
    elif method == 'tools/list':
        time.sleep(5)

FILE: .\testdata\runs\8877-2d8cbba4\workspace\fake_mcp_smoke.py

import json, sys
for line in sys.stdin:
    if not line.strip():
        continue
    msg = json.loads(line)
    mid = msg.get('id')
    method = msg.get('method')
    if method == 'initialize':
        print(json.dumps({'jsonrpc':'2.0','id':mid,'result':{'protocolVersion':'2025-06-18','capabilities':{'tools':{}},'serverInfo':{'name':'fake-smoke','version':'1'}}}), flush=True)
    elif method == 'tools/list':
        tool = {'name':'echo','description':'Echo a short message','inputSchema':{'type':'object','properties':{'message':{'type':'string'}},'required':['message']}}
        print(json.dumps({'jsonrpc':'2.0','id':mid,'result':{'tools':[tool]}}), flush=True)
    elif method == 'tools/call':
        args = (msg.get('params') or {}).get('arguments') or {}
        text = args.get('message', '')
        print(json.dumps({'jsonrpc':'2.0','id':mid,'result':{'content':[{'type':'text','text':text}], 'structuredContent': {'echo': text}}}), flush=True)
    elif method in {'resources/list', 'prompts/list'}:
        print(json.dumps({'jsonrpc':'2.0','id':mid,'error':{'code':-32601,'message':'unsupported'}}), flush=True)

import json, sys
print('boot noise from fixture', flush=True)
for line in sys.stdin:
    if not line.strip():
        continue
    msg = json.loads(line)
    mid = msg.get('id')
    method = msg.get('method')
    if method == 'initialize':
        result = {'protocolVersion':'2025-06-18','capabilities':{'tools':{},'resources':{},'prompts':{}},'serverInfo':{'name':'fake-caps','version':'1'}}
        print(json.dumps({'jsonrpc':'2.0','id':mid,'result':result}), flush=True)
    elif method == 'tools/list':
        print(json.dumps({'jsonrpc':'2.0','id':mid,'result':{'tools':[]}}), flush=True)
    elif method == 'resources/list':
        resource = {'uri':'file://local/readme.md','name':'Local Readme','description':'Read-only fixture resource','mimeType':'text/markdown'}
        print(json.dumps({'jsonrpc':'2.0','id':mid,'result':{'resources':[resource]}}), flush=True)
    elif method == 'prompts/list':
        prompt = {'name':'summarize-local','description':'Fixture prompt','arguments':[{'name':'topic','description':'Topic','required':True}]}
        print(json.dumps({'jsonrpc':'2.0','id':mid,'result':{'prompts':[prompt]}}), flush=True)

import json, sys
for line in sys.stdin:
    msg = json.loads(line)
    mid = msg.get('id')
    method = msg.get('method')
    if method == 'initialize':
        print(json.dumps({'jsonrpc':'2.0','id':mid,'result':{'protocolVersion':'2025-06-18','capabilities':{'tools':{}},'serverInfo':{'name':'bad-schema','version':'1'}}}), flush=True)
    elif method == 'tools/list':
        print(json.dumps({'jsonrpc':'2.0','id':mid,'result':{'tools':[{'name':'bad','inputSchema':'not-an-object'}]}}), flush=True)

FILE: .\testdata\runs\8877-333aa94d\workspace\fake_mcp_caps.py
==================================================

import json, sys
print('boot noise from fixture', flush=True)
for line in sys.stdin:
    if not line.strip():
        continue
    msg = json.loads(line)
    mid = msg.get('id')
    method = msg.get('method')
    if method == 'initialize':
        result = {'protocolVersion':'2025-06-18','capabilities':{'tools':{},'resources':{},'prompts':{}},'serverInfo':{'name':'fake-caps','version':'1'}}
        print(json.dumps({'jsonrpc':'2.0','id':mid,'result':result}), flush=True)
    elif method == 'tools/list':
        print(json.dumps({'jsonrpc':'2.0','id':mid,'result':{'tools':[]}}), flush=True)
    elif method == 'resources/list':
        resource = {'uri':'file://local/readme.md','name':'Local Readme','description':'Read-only fixture resource','mimeType':'text/markdown'}
        print(json.dumps({'jsonrpc':'2.0','id':mid,'result':{'resources':[resource]}}), flush=True)
    elif method == 'prompts/list':
        prompt = {'name':'summarize-local','description':'Fixture prompt','arguments':[{'name':'topic','description':'Topic','required':True}]}
        print(json.dumps({'jsonrpc':'2.0','id':mid,'result':{'prompts':[prompt]}}), flush=True)

==================================================
FILE: .\testdata\runs\8877-333aa94d\workspace\fake_mcp_crash.py
==================================================

sys.exit(2)

import json, sys, time
for line in sys.stdin:
    msg = json.loads(line)
    mid = msg.get('id')
    method = msg.get('method')
    if method == 'initialize':
        print(json.dumps({'jsonrpc':'2.0','id':mid,'result':{'protocolVersion':'2025-06-18','capabilities':{'tools':{}},'serverInfo':{'name':'hang','version':'1'}}}), flush=True)
    elif method == 'tools/list':
        time.sleep(5)

==================================================
FILE: .\testdata\runs\8877-333aa94d\workspace\fake_mcp_smoke.py
==================================================

import json, sys
for line in sys.stdin:
    if not line.strip():
        continue
    msg = json.loads(line)
    mid = msg.get('id')
    method = msg.get('method')
    if method == 'initialize':
        print(json.dumps({'jsonrpc':'2.0','id':mid,'result':{'protocolVersion':'2025-06-18','capabilities':{'tools':{}},'serverInfo':{'name':'fake-smoke','version':'1'}}}), flush=True)
    elif method == 'tools/list':
        tool = {'name':'echo','description':'Echo a short message','inputSchema':{'type':'object','properties':{'message':{'type':'string'}},'required':['message']}}
        print(json.dumps({'jsonrpc':'2.0','id':mid,'result':{'tools':[tool]}}), flush=True)
    elif method == 'tools/call':
        args = (msg.get('params') or {}).get('arguments') or {}
        text = args.get('message', '')
        print(json.dumps({'jsonrpc':'2.0','id':mid,'result':{'content':[{'type':'text','text':text}], 'structuredContent': {'echo': text}}}), flush=True)
    elif method in {'resources/list', 'prompts/list'}:
        print(json.dumps({'jsonrpc':'2.0','id':mid,'error':{'code':-32601,'message':'unsupported'}}), flush=True)

import json, sys
for line in sys.stdin:
    msg = json.loads(line)
    mid = msg.get('id')
    method = msg.get('method')
    if method == 'initialize':
        print(json.dumps({'jsonrpc':'2.0','id':mid,'result':{'protocolVersion':'2025-06-18','capabilities':{'tools':{}},'serverInfo':{'name':'bad-schema','version':'1'}}}), flush=True)
    elif method == 'tools/list':
        print(json.dumps({'jsonrpc':'2.0','id':mid,'result':{'tools':[{'name':'bad','inputSchema':'not-an-object'}]}}), flush=True)

FILE: .\testdata\runs\8877-3948d387\workspace\fake_mcp_caps.py
==================================================

import json, sys
print('boot noise from fixture', flush=True)
for line in sys.stdin:
    if not line.strip():
        continue
    msg = json.loads(line)
    mid = msg.get('id')
    method = msg.get('method')
    if method == 'initialize':
        result = {'protocolVersion':'2025-06-18','capabilities':{'tools':{},'resources':{},'prompts':{}},'serverInfo':{'name':'fake-caps','version':'1'}}
        print(json.dumps({'jsonrpc':'2.0','id':mid,'result':result}), flush=True)
    elif method == 'tools/list':
        print(json.dumps({'jsonrpc':'2.0','id':mid,'result':{'tools':[]}}), flush=True)
    elif method == 'resources/list':
        resource = {'uri':'file://local/readme.md','name':'Local Readme','description':'Read-only fixture resource','mimeType':'text/markdown'}
        print(json.dumps({'jsonrpc':'2.0','id':mid,'result':{'resources':[resource]}}), flush=True)
    elif method == 'prompts/list':
        prompt = {'name':'summarize-local','description':'Fixture prompt','arguments':[{'name':'topic','description':'Topic','required':True}]}
        print(json.dumps({'jsonrpc':'2.0','id':mid,'result':{'prompts':[prompt]}}), flush=True)

==================================================
FILE: .\testdata\runs\8877-3948d387\workspace\fake_mcp_crash.py

sys.exit(2)

import json, sys, time
for line in sys.stdin:
    msg = json.loads(line)
    mid = msg.get('id')
    method = msg.get('method')
    if method == 'initialize':
        print(json.dumps({'jsonrpc':'2.0','id':mid,'result':{'protocolVersion':'2025-06-18','capabilities':{'tools':{}},'serverInfo':{'name':'hang','version':'1'}}}), flush=True)
    elif method == 'tools/list':
        time.sleep(5)

==================================================
FILE: .\testdata\runs\8877-3948d387\workspace\fake_mcp_smoke.py
==================================================

import json, sys
for line in sys.stdin:
    if not line.strip():
        continue
    msg = json.loads(line)
    mid = msg.get('id')
    method = msg.get('method')
    if method == 'initialize':
        print(json.dumps({'jsonrpc':'2.0','id':mid,'result':{'protocolVersion':'2025-06-18','capabilities':{'tools':{}},'serverInfo':{'name':'fake-smoke','version':'1'}}}), flush=True)
    elif method == 'tools/list':
        tool = {'name':'echo','description':'Echo a short message','inputSchema':{'type':'object','properties':{'message':{'type':'string'}},'required':['message']}}
        print(json.dumps({'jsonrpc':'2.0','id':mid,'result':{'tools':[tool]}}), flush=True)
    elif method == 'tools/call':
        args = (msg.get('params') or {}).get('arguments') or {}
        text = args.get('message', '')
        print(json.dumps({'jsonrpc':'2.0','id':mid,'result':{'content':[{'type':'text','text':text}], 'structuredContent': {'echo': text}}}), flush=True)
    elif method in {'resources/list', 'prompts/list'}:
        print(json.dumps({'jsonrpc':'2.0','id':mid,'error':{'code':-32601,'message':'unsupported'}}), flush=True)

    elif method == 'tools/list':
        print(json.dumps({'jsonrpc':'2.0','id':mid,'result':{'tools':[]}}), flush=True)
    elif method == 'resources/list':
        resource = {'uri':'file://local/readme.md','name':'Local Readme','description':'Read-only fixture resource','mimeType':'text/markdown'}
        print(json.dumps({'jsonrpc':'2.0','id':mid,'result':{'resources':[resource]}}), flush=True)
    elif method == 'prompts/list':
        prompt = {'name':'summarize-local','description':'Fixture prompt','arguments':[{'name':'topic','description':'Topic','required':True}]}
        print(json.dumps({'jsonrpc':'2.0','id':mid,'result':{'prompts':[prompt]}}), flush=True)

    mid = msg.get('id')

    if method == 'initialize':
        print(json.dumps({'jsonrpc':'2.0','id':mid,'result':{'protocolVersion':'2025-06-18','capabilities':{'tools':{}},'serverInfo':{'name':'hang','version':'1'}}}), flush=True)

FILE: .\testdata\runs\8877-49b5a6f2\workspace\fake_mcp_smoke.py

import json, sys
for line in sys.stdin:
    if not line.strip():
        continue
    msg = json.loads(line)
    mid = msg.get('id')
    method = msg.get('method')
    if method == 'initialize':
        print(json.dumps({'jsonrpc':'2.0','id':mid,'result':{'protocolVersion':'2025-06-18','capabilities':{'tools':{}},'serverInfo':{'name':'fake-smoke','version':'1'}}}), flush=True)
    elif method == 'tools/list':
        tool = {'name':'echo','description':'Echo a short message','inputSchema':{'type':'object','properties':{'message':{'type':'string'}},'required':['message']}}
        print(json.dumps({'jsonrpc':'2.0','id':mid,'result':{'tools':[tool]}}), flush=True)
    elif method == 'tools/call':
        args = (msg.get('params') or {}).get('arguments') or {}
        text = args.get('message', '')
        print(json.dumps({'jsonrpc':'2.0','id':mid,'result':{'content':[{'type':'text','text':text}], 'structuredContent': {'echo': text}}}), flush=True)
    elif method in {'resources/list', 'prompts/list'}:
        print(json.dumps({'jsonrpc':'2.0','id':mid,'error':{'code':-32601,'message':'unsupported'}}), flush=True)

import json, sys
print('boot noise from fixture', flush=True)
for line in sys.stdin:
    if not line.strip():
        continue
    msg = json.loads(line)
    mid = msg.get('id')
    method = msg.get('method')
    if method == 'initialize':
        result = {'protocolVersion':'2025-06-18','capabilities':{'tools':{},'resources':{},'prompts':{}},'serverInfo':{'name':'fake-caps','version':'1'}}
        print(json.dumps({'jsonrpc':'2.0','id':mid,'result':result}), flush=True)
    elif method == 'tools/list':
        print(json.dumps({'jsonrpc':'2.0','id':mid,'result':{'tools':[]}}), flush=True)
    elif method == 'resources/list':
        resource = {'uri':'file://local/readme.md','name':'Local Readme','description':'Read-only fixture resource','mimeType':'text/markdown'}
        print(json.dumps({'jsonrpc':'2.0','id':mid,'result':{'resources':[resource]}}), flush=True)
    elif method == 'prompts/list':
        prompt = {'name':'summarize-local','description':'Fixture prompt','arguments':[{'name':'topic','description':'Topic','required':True}]}
        print(json.dumps({'jsonrpc':'2.0','id':mid,'result':{'prompts':[prompt]}}), flush=True)

import json, sys
for line in sys.stdin:
    msg = json.loads(line)
    mid = msg.get('id')
    method = msg.get('method')
    if method == 'initialize':
        print(json.dumps({'jsonrpc':'2.0','id':mid,'result':{'protocolVersion':'2025-06-18','capabilities':{'tools':{}},'serverInfo':{'name':'bad-schema','version':'1'}}}), flush=True)
    elif method == 'tools/list':
        print(json.dumps({'jsonrpc':'2.0','id':mid,'result':{'tools':[{'name':'bad','inputSchema':'not-an-object'}]}}), flush=True)

==================================================
FILE: .\testdata\runs\8877-6adaf782\workspace\fake_mcp_caps.py
==================================================

import json, sys
print('boot noise from fixture', flush=True)
for line in sys.stdin:
    if not line.strip():
        continue
    msg = json.loads(line)
    mid = msg.get('id')
    method = msg.get('method')
    if method == 'initialize':
        result = {'protocolVersion':'2025-06-18','capabilities':{'tools':{},'resources':{},'prompts':{}},'serverInfo':{'name':'fake-caps','version':'1'}}
        print(json.dumps({'jsonrpc':'2.0','id':mid,'result':result}), flush=True)
    elif method == 'tools/list':
        print(json.dumps({'jsonrpc':'2.0','id':mid,'result':{'tools':[]}}), flush=True)
    elif method == 'resources/list':
        resource = {'uri':'file://local/readme.md','name':'Local Readme','description':'Read-only fixture resource','mimeType':'text/markdown'}
        print(json.dumps({'jsonrpc':'2.0','id':mid,'result':{'resources':[resource]}}), flush=True)
    elif method == 'prompts/list':
        prompt = {'name':'summarize-local','description':'Fixture prompt','arguments':[{'name':'topic','description':'Topic','required':True}]}
        print(json.dumps({'jsonrpc':'2.0','id':mid,'result':{'prompts':[prompt]}}), flush=True)

==================================================
FILE: .\testdata\runs\8877-6adaf782\workspace\fake_mcp_crash.py
==================================================

import sys
sys.exit(2)


==================================================

import json, sys, time
for line in sys.stdin:
    msg = json.loads(line)
    mid = msg.get('id')
    method = msg.get('method')
    if method == 'initialize':
        print(json.dumps({'jsonrpc':'2.0','id':mid,'result':{'protocolVersion':'2025-06-18','capabilities':{'tools':{}},'serverInfo':{'name':'hang','version':'1'}}}), flush=True)
    elif method == 'tools/list':
        time.sleep(5)

==================================================
FILE: .\testdata\runs\8877-6adaf782\workspace\fake_mcp_smoke.py
==================================================

import json, sys
for line in sys.stdin:
    if not line.strip():
        continue
    msg = json.loads(line)
    mid = msg.get('id')
    method = msg.get('method')
    if method == 'initialize':
        print(json.dumps({'jsonrpc':'2.0','id':mid,'result':{'protocolVersion':'2025-06-18','capabilities':{'tools':{}},'serverInfo':{'name':'fake-smoke','version':'1'}}}), flush=True)
    elif method == 'tools/list':
        tool = {'name':'echo','description':'Echo a short message','inputSchema':{'type':'object','properties':{'message':{'type':'string'}},'required':['message']}}
        print(json.dumps({'jsonrpc':'2.0','id':mid,'result':{'tools':[tool]}}), flush=True)
    elif method == 'tools/call':
        args = (msg.get('params') or {}).get('arguments') or {}
        text = args.get('message', '')
        print(json.dumps({'jsonrpc':'2.0','id':mid,'result':{'content':[{'type':'text','text':text}], 'structuredContent': {'echo': text}}}), flush=True)
    elif method in {'resources/list', 'prompts/list'}:
        print(json.dumps({'jsonrpc':'2.0','id':mid,'error':{'code':-32601,'message':'unsupported'}}), flush=True)

import json, sys
for line in sys.stdin:
    msg = json.loads(line)
    mid = msg.get('id')
    method = msg.get('method')
    if method == 'initialize':
        print(json.dumps({'jsonrpc':'2.0','id':mid,'result':{'protocolVersion':'2025-06-18','capabilities':{'tools':{}},'serverInfo':{'name':'bad-schema','version':'1'}}}), flush=True)
    elif method == 'tools/list':
        print(json.dumps({'jsonrpc':'2.0','id':mid,'result':{'tools':[{'name':'bad','inputSchema':'not-an-object'}]}}), flush=True)

==================================================
FILE: .\testdata\runs\8877-71ed952d\workspace\fake_mcp_caps.py
==================================================

import json, sys
print('boot noise from fixture', flush=True)
for line in sys.stdin:
    if not line.strip():
        continue
    msg = json.loads(line)
    mid = msg.get('id')
    method = msg.get('method')
    if method == 'initialize':
        result = {'protocolVersion':'2025-06-18','capabilities':{'tools':{},'resources':{},'prompts':{}},'serverInfo':{'name':'fake-caps','version':'1'}}
        print(json.dumps({'jsonrpc':'2.0','id':mid,'result':result}), flush=True)
    elif method == 'tools/list':
        print(json.dumps({'jsonrpc':'2.0','id':mid,'result':{'tools':[]}}), flush=True)
    elif method == 'resources/list':
        resource = {'uri':'file://local/readme.md','name':'Local Readme','description':'Read-only fixture resource','mimeType':'text/markdown'}
        print(json.dumps({'jsonrpc':'2.0','id':mid,'result':{'resources':[resource]}}), flush=True)
    elif method == 'prompts/list':
        prompt = {'name':'summarize-local','description':'Fixture prompt','arguments':[{'name':'topic','description':'Topic','required':True}]}
        print(json.dumps({'jsonrpc':'2.0','id':mid,'result':{'prompts':[prompt]}}), flush=True)

==================================================
FILE: .\testdata\runs\8877-71ed952d\workspace\fake_mcp_crash.py
==================================================

import sys
sys.exit(2)


==================================================
FILE: .\testdata\runs\8877-71ed952d\workspace\fake_mcp_hang.py

import json, sys, time
for line in sys.stdin:
    msg = json.loads(line)
    mid = msg.get('id')
    method = msg.get('method')
    if method == 'initialize':
        print(json.dumps({'jsonrpc':'2.0','id':mid,'result':{'protocolVersion':'2025-06-18','capabilities':{'tools':{}},'serverInfo':{'name':'hang','version':'1'}}}), flush=True)
    elif method == 'tools/list':
        time.sleep(5)

==================================================
FILE: .\testdata\runs\8877-71ed952d\workspace\fake_mcp_smoke.py
==================================================

import json, sys
for line in sys.stdin:
    if not line.strip():
        continue
    msg = json.loads(line)
    mid = msg.get('id')
    method = msg.get('method')
    if method == 'initialize':
        print(json.dumps({'jsonrpc':'2.0','id':mid,'result':{'protocolVersion':'2025-06-18','capabilities':{'tools':{}},'serverInfo':{'name':'fake-smoke','version':'1'}}}), flush=True)
    elif method == 'tools/list':
        tool = {'name':'echo','description':'Echo a short message','inputSchema':{'type':'object','properties':{'message':{'type':'string'}},'required':['message']}}
        print(json.dumps({'jsonrpc':'2.0','id':mid,'result':{'tools':[tool]}}), flush=True)
    elif method == 'tools/call':
        args = (msg.get('params') or {}).get('arguments') or {}
        text = args.get('message', '')
        print(json.dumps({'jsonrpc':'2.0','id':mid,'result':{'content':[{'type':'text','text':text}], 'structuredContent': {'echo': text}}}), flush=True)
    elif method in {'resources/list', 'prompts/list'}:
        print(json.dumps({'jsonrpc':'2.0','id':mid,'error':{'code':-32601,'message':'unsupported'}}), flush=True)

    mid = msg.get('id')
    method = msg.get('method')
    if method == 'initialize':
        result = {'protocolVersion':'2025-06-18','capabilities':{'tools':{},'resources':{},'prompts':{}},'serverInfo':{'name':'fake-caps','version':'1'}}
        print(json.dumps({'jsonrpc':'2.0','id':mid,'result':result}), flush=True)
    elif method == 'tools/list':
        print(json.dumps({'jsonrpc':'2.0','id':mid,'result':{'tools':[]}}), flush=True)
    elif method == 'resources/list':
        resource = {'uri':'file://local/readme.md','name':'Local Readme','description':'Read-only fixture resource','mimeType':'text/markdown'}
        print(json.dumps({'jsonrpc':'2.0','id':mid,'result':{'resources':[resource]}}), flush=True)
    elif method == 'prompts/list':
        prompt = {'name':'summarize-local','description':'Fixture prompt','arguments':[{'name':'topic','description':'Topic','required':True}]}
        print(json.dumps({'jsonrpc':'2.0','id':mid,'result':{'prompts':[prompt]}}), flush=True)

        print(json.dumps({'jsonrpc':'2.0','id':mid,'result':{'protocolVersion':'2025-06-18','capabilities':{'tools':{}},'serverInfo':{'name':'hang','version':'1'}}}), flush=True)

import json, sys
for line in sys.stdin:
    if not line.strip():
        continue
    msg = json.loads(line)
    mid = msg.get('id')
    method = msg.get('method')
    if method == 'initialize':
        print(json.dumps({'jsonrpc':'2.0','id':mid,'result':{'protocolVersion':'2025-06-18','capabilities':{'tools':{}},'serverInfo':{'name':'fake-smoke','version':'1'}}}), flush=True)
    elif method == 'tools/list':
        tool = {'name':'echo','description':'Echo a short message','inputSchema':{'type':'object','properties':{'message':{'type':'string'}},'required':['message']}}
        print(json.dumps({'jsonrpc':'2.0','id':mid,'result':{'tools':[tool]}}), flush=True)
    elif method == 'tools/call':
        args = (msg.get('params') or {}).get('arguments') or {}
        text = args.get('message', '')
        print(json.dumps({'jsonrpc':'2.0','id':mid,'result':{'content':[{'type':'text','text':text}], 'structuredContent': {'echo': text}}}), flush=True)
    elif method in {'resources/list', 'prompts/list'}:
        print(json.dumps({'jsonrpc':'2.0','id':mid,'error':{'code':-32601,'message':'unsupported'}}), flush=True)

import json, sys
for line in sys.stdin:
    msg = json.loads(line)
    mid = msg.get('id')
    method = msg.get('method')
    if method == 'initialize':
        print(json.dumps({'jsonrpc':'2.0','id':mid,'result':{'protocolVersion':'2025-06-18','capabilities':{'tools':{}},'serverInfo':{'name':'bad-schema','version':'1'}}}), flush=True)
    elif method == 'tools/list':
        print(json.dumps({'jsonrpc':'2.0','id':mid,'result':{'tools':[{'name':'bad','inputSchema':'not-an-object'}]}}), flush=True)

==================================================
FILE: .\testdata\runs\8877-ac9796c7\workspace\fake_mcp_caps.py
==================================================

import json, sys
print('boot noise from fixture', flush=True)
for line in sys.stdin:
    if not line.strip():
        continue
    msg = json.loads(line)
    mid = msg.get('id')
    method = msg.get('method')
    if method == 'initialize':
        result = {'protocolVersion':'2025-06-18','capabilities':{'tools':{},'resources':{},'prompts':{}},'serverInfo':{'name':'fake-caps','version':'1'}}
        print(json.dumps({'jsonrpc':'2.0','id':mid,'result':result}), flush=True)
    elif method == 'tools/list':
        print(json.dumps({'jsonrpc':'2.0','id':mid,'result':{'tools':[]}}), flush=True)
    elif method == 'resources/list':
        resource = {'uri':'file://local/readme.md','name':'Local Readme','description':'Read-only fixture resource','mimeType':'text/markdown'}
        print(json.dumps({'jsonrpc':'2.0','id':mid,'result':{'resources':[resource]}}), flush=True)
    elif method == 'prompts/list':
        prompt = {'name':'summarize-local','description':'Fixture prompt','arguments':[{'name':'topic','description':'Topic','required':True}]}
        print(json.dumps({'jsonrpc':'2.0','id':mid,'result':{'prompts':[prompt]}}), flush=True)

==================================================
FILE: .\testdata\runs\8877-ac9796c7\workspace\fake_mcp_crash.py
==================================================

import sys
sys.exit(2)

import json, sys, time
for line in sys.stdin:
    msg = json.loads(line)
    mid = msg.get('id')
    method = msg.get('method')
    if method == 'initialize':
        print(json.dumps({'jsonrpc':'2.0','id':mid,'result':{'protocolVersion':'2025-06-18','capabilities':{'tools':{}},'serverInfo':{'name':'hang','version':'1'}}}), flush=True)
    elif method == 'tools/list':
        time.sleep(5)

==================================================
FILE: .\testdata\runs\8877-ac9796c7\workspace\fake_mcp_smoke.py
==================================================

import json, sys
for line in sys.stdin:
    if not line.strip():
        continue
    msg = json.loads(line)
    mid = msg.get('id')
    method = msg.get('method')
    if method == 'initialize':
        print(json.dumps({'jsonrpc':'2.0','id':mid,'result':{'protocolVersion':'2025-06-18','capabilities':{'tools':{}},'serverInfo':{'name':'fake-smoke','version':'1'}}}), flush=True)
    elif method == 'tools/list':
        tool = {'name':'echo','description':'Echo a short message','inputSchema':{'type':'object','properties':{'message':{'type':'string'}},'required':['message']}}
        print(json.dumps({'jsonrpc':'2.0','id':mid,'result':{'tools':[tool]}}), flush=True)
    elif method == 'tools/call':
        args = (msg.get('params') or {}).get('arguments') or {}
        text = args.get('message', '')
        print(json.dumps({'jsonrpc':'2.0','id':mid,'result':{'content':[{'type':'text','text':text}], 'structuredContent': {'echo': text}}}), flush=True)
    elif method in {'resources/list', 'prompts/list'}:
        print(json.dumps({'jsonrpc':'2.0','id':mid,'error':{'code':-32601,'message':'unsupported'}}), flush=True)

import json, sys
for line in sys.stdin:
    msg = json.loads(line)
    mid = msg.get('id')
    method = msg.get('method')
    if method == 'initialize':
        print(json.dumps({'jsonrpc':'2.0','id':mid,'result':{'protocolVersion':'2025-06-18','capabilities':{'tools':{}},'serverInfo':{'name':'bad-schema','version':'1'}}}), flush=True)
    elif method == 'tools/list':
        print(json.dumps({'jsonrpc':'2.0','id':mid,'result':{'tools':[{'name':'bad','inputSchema':'not-an-object'}]}}), flush=True)

==================================================
FILE: .\testdata\runs\8877-b16cecad\workspace\fake_mcp_caps.py
==================================================

import json, sys
print('boot noise from fixture', flush=True)
for line in sys.stdin:
    if not line.strip():
        continue
    msg = json.loads(line)
    mid = msg.get('id')
    method = msg.get('method')
    if method == 'initialize':
        result = {'protocolVersion':'2025-06-18','capabilities':{'tools':{},'resources':{},'prompts':{}},'serverInfo':{'name':'fake-caps','version':'1'}}
        print(json.dumps({'jsonrpc':'2.0','id':mid,'result':result}), flush=True)
    elif method == 'tools/list':
        print(json.dumps({'jsonrpc':'2.0','id':mid,'result':{'tools':[]}}), flush=True)
    elif method == 'resources/list':
        resource = {'uri':'file://local/readme.md','name':'Local Readme','description':'Read-only fixture resource','mimeType':'text/markdown'}
        print(json.dumps({'jsonrpc':'2.0','id':mid,'result':{'resources':[resource]}}), flush=True)
    elif method == 'prompts/list':
        prompt = {'name':'summarize-local','description':'Fixture prompt','arguments':[{'name':'topic','description':'Topic','required':True}]}
        print(json.dumps({'jsonrpc':'2.0','id':mid,'result':{'prompts':[prompt]}}), flush=True)

==================================================
FILE: .\testdata\runs\8877-b16cecad\workspace\fake_mcp_crash.py
==================================================

import sys
sys.exit(2)


==================================================
FILE: .\testdata\runs\8877-b16cecad\workspace\fake_mcp_hang.py

import json, sys, time
for line in sys.stdin:
    msg = json.loads(line)
    mid = msg.get('id')
    method = msg.get('method')
    if method == 'initialize':
        print(json.dumps({'jsonrpc':'2.0','id':mid,'result':{'protocolVersion':'2025-06-18','capabilities':{'tools':{}},'serverInfo':{'name':'hang','version':'1'}}}), flush=True)
    elif method == 'tools/list':
        time.sleep(5)

==================================================
FILE: .\testdata\runs\8877-b16cecad\workspace\fake_mcp_smoke.py
==================================================

import json, sys
for line in sys.stdin:
    if not line.strip():
        continue
    msg = json.loads(line)
    mid = msg.get('id')
    method = msg.get('method')
    if method == 'initialize':
        print(json.dumps({'jsonrpc':'2.0','id':mid,'result':{'protocolVersion':'2025-06-18','capabilities':{'tools':{}},'serverInfo':{'name':'fake-smoke','version':'1'}}}), flush=True)
    elif method == 'tools/list':
        tool = {'name':'echo','description':'Echo a short message','inputSchema':{'type':'object','properties':{'message':{'type':'string'}},'required':['message']}}
        print(json.dumps({'jsonrpc':'2.0','id':mid,'result':{'tools':[tool]}}), flush=True)
    elif method == 'tools/call':
        args = (msg.get('params') or {}).get('arguments') or {}
        text = args.get('message', '')
        print(json.dumps({'jsonrpc':'2.0','id':mid,'result':{'content':[{'type':'text','text':text}], 'structuredContent': {'echo': text}}}), flush=True)
    elif method in {'resources/list', 'prompts/list'}:
        print(json.dumps({'jsonrpc':'2.0','id':mid,'error':{'code':-32601,'message':'unsupported'}}), flush=True)

import json, sys
for line in sys.stdin:
    msg = json.loads(line)
    mid = msg.get('id')
    method = msg.get('method')
    if method == 'initialize':
        print(json.dumps({'jsonrpc':'2.0','id':mid,'result':{'protocolVersion':'2025-06-18','capabilities':{'tools':{}},'serverInfo':{'name':'bad-schema','version':'1'}}}), flush=True)
    elif method == 'tools/list':
        print(json.dumps({'jsonrpc':'2.0','id':mid,'result':{'tools':[{'name':'bad','inputSchema':'not-an-object'}]}}), flush=True)

FILE: .\testdata\runs\8877-b661f16d\workspace\fake_mcp_caps.py

import json, sys
print('boot noise from fixture', flush=True)
for line in sys.stdin:
    if not line.strip():
        continue
    msg = json.loads(line)
    mid = msg.get('id')
    method = msg.get('method')
    if method == 'initialize':
        result = {'protocolVersion':'2025-06-18','capabilities':{'tools':{},'resources':{},'prompts':{}},'serverInfo':{'name':'fake-caps','version':'1'}}
        print(json.dumps({'jsonrpc':'2.0','id':mid,'result':result}), flush=True)
    elif method == 'tools/list':
        print(json.dumps({'jsonrpc':'2.0','id':mid,'result':{'tools':[]}}), flush=True)
    elif method == 'resources/list':
        resource = {'uri':'file://local/readme.md','name':'Local Readme','description':'Read-only fixture resource','mimeType':'text/markdown'}
        print(json.dumps({'jsonrpc':'2.0','id':mid,'result':{'resources':[resource]}}), flush=True)
    elif method == 'prompts/list':
        prompt = {'name':'summarize-local','description':'Fixture prompt','arguments':[{'name':'topic','description':'Topic','required':True}]}
        print(json.dumps({'jsonrpc':'2.0','id':mid,'result':{'prompts':[prompt]}}), flush=True)

==================================================
FILE: .\testdata\runs\8877-b661f16d\workspace\fake_mcp_crash.py
==================================================

import sys
sys.exit(2)


==================================================

import json, sys, time
for line in sys.stdin:
    msg = json.loads(line)
    mid = msg.get('id')
    method = msg.get('method')
    if method == 'initialize':
        print(json.dumps({'jsonrpc':'2.0','id':mid,'result':{'protocolVersion':'2025-06-18','capabilities':{'tools':{}},'serverInfo':{'name':'hang','version':'1'}}}), flush=True)
    elif method == 'tools/list':
        time.sleep(5)

==================================================
FILE: .\testdata\runs\8877-b661f16d\workspace\fake_mcp_smoke.py
==================================================

import json, sys
for line in sys.stdin:
    if not line.strip():
        continue
    msg = json.loads(line)
    mid = msg.get('id')
    method = msg.get('method')
    if method == 'initialize':
        print(json.dumps({'jsonrpc':'2.0','id':mid,'result':{'protocolVersion':'2025-06-18','capabilities':{'tools':{}},'serverInfo':{'name':'fake-smoke','version':'1'}}}), flush=True)
    elif method == 'tools/list':
        tool = {'name':'echo','description':'Echo a short message','inputSchema':{'type':'object','properties':{'message':{'type':'string'}},'required':['message']}}
        print(json.dumps({'jsonrpc':'2.0','id':mid,'result':{'tools':[tool]}}), flush=True)
    elif method == 'tools/call':
        args = (msg.get('params') or {}).get('arguments') or {}
        text = args.get('message', '')
        print(json.dumps({'jsonrpc':'2.0','id':mid,'result':{'content':[{'type':'text','text':text}], 'structuredContent': {'echo': text}}}), flush=True)
    elif method in {'resources/list', 'prompts/list'}:
        print(json.dumps({'jsonrpc':'2.0','id':mid,'error':{'code':-32601,'message':'unsupported'}}), flush=True)

    elif method == 'tools/list':
        tool = {'name':'echo','description':'Echo a short message','inputSchema':{'type':'object','properties':{'message':{'type':'string'}},'required':['message']}}
        print(json.dumps({'jsonrpc':'2.0','id':mid,'result':{'tools':[tool]}}), flush=True)
    elif method == 'tools/call':
        args = (msg.get('params') or {}).get('arguments') or {}
        text = args.get('message', '')
        print(json.dumps({'jsonrpc':'2.0','id':mid,'result':{'content':[{'type':'text','text':text}], 'structuredContent': {'echo': text}}}), flush=True)
    elif method in {'resources/list', 'prompts/list'}:
        print(json.dumps({'jsonrpc':'2.0','id':mid,'error':{'code':-32601,'message':'unsupported'}}), flush=True)

import json, sys
for line in sys.stdin:
    msg = json.loads(line)
    mid = msg.get('id')
    method = msg.get('method')
    if method == 'initialize':
        print(json.dumps({'jsonrpc':'2.0','id':mid,'result':{'protocolVersion':'2025-06-18','capabilities':{'tools':{}},'serverInfo':{'name':'bad-schema','version':'1'}}}), flush=True)
    elif method == 'tools/list':
        print(json.dumps({'jsonrpc':'2.0','id':mid,'result':{'tools':[{'name':'bad','inputSchema':'not-an-object'}]}}), flush=True)

FILE: .\testdata\runs\8877-d7b6214f\workspace\fake_mcp_caps.py

import json, sys
print('boot noise from fixture', flush=True)
for line in sys.stdin:
    if not line.strip():
        continue
    msg = json.loads(line)
    mid = msg.get('id')
    method = msg.get('method')
    if method == 'initialize':
        result = {'protocolVersion':'2025-06-18','capabilities':{'tools':{},'resources':{},'prompts':{}},'serverInfo':{'name':'fake-caps','version':'1'}}
        print(json.dumps({'jsonrpc':'2.0','id':mid,'result':result}), flush=True)
    elif method == 'tools/list':
        print(json.dumps({'jsonrpc':'2.0','id':mid,'result':{'tools':[]}}), flush=True)
    elif method == 'resources/list':
        resource = {'uri':'file://local/readme.md','name':'Local Readme','description':'Read-only fixture resource','mimeType':'text/markdown'}
        print(json.dumps({'jsonrpc':'2.0','id':mid,'result':{'resources':[resource]}}), flush=True)
    elif method == 'prompts/list':
        prompt = {'name':'summarize-local','description':'Fixture prompt','arguments':[{'name':'topic','description':'Topic','required':True}]}
        print(json.dumps({'jsonrpc':'2.0','id':mid,'result':{'prompts':[prompt]}}), flush=True)

    method = msg.get('method')
    if method == 'initialize':
        print(json.dumps({'jsonrpc':'2.0','id':mid,'result':{'protocolVersion':'2025-06-18','capabilities':{'tools':{}},'serverInfo':{'name':'hang','version':'1'}}}), flush=True)
    elif method == 'tools/list':
        time.sleep(5)

import json, sys
for line in sys.stdin:
    msg = json.loads(line)
    mid = msg.get('id')
    method = msg.get('method')
    if method == 'initialize':
        print(json.dumps({'jsonrpc':'2.0','id':mid,'result':{'protocolVersion':'2025-06-18','capabilities':{'tools':{}},'serverInfo':{'name':'bad-schema','version':'1'}}}), flush=True)
    elif method == 'tools/list':
        print(json.dumps({'jsonrpc':'2.0','id':mid,'result':{'tools':[{'name':'bad','inputSchema':'not-an-object'}]}}), flush=True)

==================================================
FILE: .\testdata\runs\8877-e8e3f1fd\workspace\fake_mcp_caps.py
==================================================

import json, sys
print('boot noise from fixture', flush=True)
for line in sys.stdin:
    if not line.strip():
        continue
    msg = json.loads(line)
    mid = msg.get('id')
    method = msg.get('method')
    if method == 'initialize':
        result = {'protocolVersion':'2025-06-18','capabilities':{'tools':{},'resources':{},'prompts':{}},'serverInfo':{'name':'fake-caps','version':'1'}}
        print(json.dumps({'jsonrpc':'2.0','id':mid,'result':result}), flush=True)
    elif method == 'tools/list':
        print(json.dumps({'jsonrpc':'2.0','id':mid,'result':{'tools':[]}}), flush=True)
    elif method == 'resources/list':
        resource = {'uri':'file://local/readme.md','name':'Local Readme','description':'Read-only fixture resource','mimeType':'text/markdown'}
        print(json.dumps({'jsonrpc':'2.0','id':mid,'result':{'resources':[resource]}}), flush=True)
    elif method == 'prompts/list':
        prompt = {'name':'summarize-local','description':'Fixture prompt','arguments':[{'name':'topic','description':'Topic','required':True}]}
        print(json.dumps({'jsonrpc':'2.0','id':mid,'result':{'prompts':[prompt]}}), flush=True)

==================================================
FILE: .\testdata\runs\8877-e8e3f1fd\workspace\fake_mcp_crash.py
==================================================

import sys
sys.exit(2)


==================================================
FILE: .\testdata\runs\8877-e8e3f1fd\workspace\fake_mcp_hang.py
==================================================

import json, sys, time
for line in sys.stdin:
    msg = json.loads(line)
    mid = msg.get('id')
    method = msg.get('method')
    if method == 'initialize':
        print(json.dumps({'jsonrpc':'2.0','id':mid,'result':{'protocolVersion':'2025-06-18','capabilities':{'tools':{}},'serverInfo':{'name':'hang','version':'1'}}}), flush=True)
    elif method == 'tools/list':
        time.sleep(5)

==================================================
FILE: .\testdata\runs\8877-e8e3f1fd\workspace\fake_mcp_smoke.py
==================================================

import json, sys
for line in sys.stdin:
    if not line.strip():
        continue
    msg = json.loads(line)
    mid = msg.get('id')
    method = msg.get('method')
    if method == 'initialize':
        print(json.dumps({'jsonrpc':'2.0','id':mid,'result':{'protocolVersion':'2025-06-18','capabilities':{'tools':{}},'serverInfo':{'name':'fake-smoke','version':'1'}}}), flush=True)
    elif method == 'tools/list':
        tool = {'name':'echo','description':'Echo a short message','inputSchema':{'type':'object','properties':{'message':{'type':'string'}},'required':['message']}}
        print(json.dumps({'jsonrpc':'2.0','id':mid,'result':{'tools':[tool]}}), flush=True)
    elif method == 'tools/call':
        args = (msg.get('params') or {}).get('arguments') or {}
        text = args.get('message', '')
        print(json.dumps({'jsonrpc':'2.0','id':mid,'result':{'content':[{'type':'text','text':text}], 'structuredContent': {'echo': text}}}), flush=True)
    elif method in {'resources/list', 'prompts/list'}:
        print(json.dumps({'jsonrpc':'2.0','id':mid,'error':{'code':-32601,'message':'unsupported'}}), flush=True)

==================================================

FILE: .\testdata\workspace\fake_mcp_bad_schema.py
==================================================

import json, sys
for line in sys.stdin:
    msg = json.loads(line)
    mid = msg.get('id')
    method = msg.get('method')
    if method == 'initialize':
        print(json.dumps({'jsonrpc':'2.0','id':mid,'result':{'protocolVersion':'2025-06-18','capabilities':{'tools':{}},'serverInfo':{'name':'bad-schema','version':'1'}}}), flush=True)
    elif method == 'tools/list':
        print(json.dumps({'jsonrpc':'2.0','id':mid,'result':{'tools':[{'name':'bad','inputSchema':'not-an-object'}]}}), flush=True)

==================================================
FILE: .\testdata\workspace\fake_mcp_caps.py
==================================================

import json, sys
print('boot noise from fixture', flush=True)
for line in sys.stdin:
    if not line.strip():
        continue
    msg = json.loads(line)
    mid = msg.get('id')
    method = msg.get('method')
    if method == 'initialize':
        result = {'protocolVersion':'2025-06-18','capabilities':{'tools':{},'resources':{},'prompts':{}},'serverInfo':{'name':'fake-caps','version':'1'}}
        print(json.dumps({'jsonrpc':'2.0','id':mid,'result':result}), flush=True)
    elif method == 'tools/list':
        print(json.dumps({'jsonrpc':'2.0','id':mid,'result':{'tools':[]}}), flush=True)
    elif method == 'resources/list':
        resource = {'uri':'file://local/readme.md','name':'Local Readme','description':'Read-only fixture resource','mimeType':'text/markdown'}
        print(json.dumps({'jsonrpc':'2.0','id':mid,'result':{'resources':[resource]}}), flush=True)
    elif method == 'prompts/list':
        prompt = {'name':'summarize-local','description':'Fixture prompt','arguments':[{'name':'topic','description':'Topic','required':True}]}
        print(json.dumps({'jsonrpc':'2.0','id':mid,'result':{'prompts':[prompt]}}), flush=True)

FILE: .\testdata\workspace\fake_mcp_hang.py

import json, sys, time
for line in sys.stdin:
    msg = json.loads(line)
    mid = msg.get('id')
    method = msg.get('method')
    if method == 'initialize':
        print(json.dumps({'jsonrpc':'2.0','id':mid,'result':{'protocolVersion':'2025-06-18','capabilities':{'tools':{}},'serverInfo':{'name':'hang','version':'1'}}}), flush=True)
    elif method == 'tools/list':
        time.sleep(5)

==================================================
FILE: .\testdata\workspace\fake_mcp_smoke.py
==================================================

import json, sys
for line in sys.stdin:
    if not line.strip():
        continue
    msg = json.loads(line)
    mid = msg.get('id')
    method = msg.get('method')
    if method == 'initialize':
        print(json.dumps({'jsonrpc':'2.0','id':mid,'result':{'protocolVersion':'2025-06-18','capabilities':{'tools':{}},'serverInfo':{'name':'fake-smoke','version':'1'}}}), flush=True)
    elif method == 'tools/list':
        tool = {'name':'echo','description':'Echo a short message','inputSchema':{'type':'object','properties':{'message':{'type':'string'}},'required':['message']}}
        print(json.dumps({'jsonrpc':'2.0','id':mid,'result':{'tools':[tool]}}), flush=True)
    elif method == 'tools/call':
        args = (msg.get('params') or {}).get('arguments') or {}
        text = args.get('message', '')
        print(json.dumps({'jsonrpc':'2.0','id':mid,'result':{'content':[{'type':'text','text':text}], 'structuredContent': {'echo': text}}}), flush=True)
    elif method in {'resources/list', 'prompts/list'}:
        print(json.dumps({'jsonrpc':'2.0','id':mid,'error':{'code':-32601,'message':'unsupported'}}), flush=True)
